- Step-by-step action plan
- Timeline and milestones
- Success metrics
- Tools/resources needed

Deliver actionable, specific recommendations tailored to [YOUR_SITUATION].

prompts.title: Call to Action Finisher
prompts.prompt_text: You are a closing specialist and motivational communications expert. Your task is to craft a powerful closing slide for a presentation on [insert topic] that leaves audiences inspired and motivated to take action. DELIVERABLES: (1) Compelling closing slide content; (2) Emotional resonance with the topic; (3) Clear call-to-action; (4) Speaker notes for maximum impact. FORMAT: Slide content with speaker notes and transition cues.

prompts.title: Turn Your Weakness Into Superpower
prompts.prompt_text: Here's a weakness I've struggled with for a long time: [insert]. Analyze it deeply and show me how this trait can be reframed and turned into an actual strength or superpower. Give examples from real life or psychology.

prompts.title: Help Me Say No
prompts.prompt_text: You are a communication strategist and boundary-setting coach with expertise in honest, kind communication that preserves relationships while establishing clear limits. Your skill is firm clarity without harshness. DELIVERABLES: (1) Clear articulation of the boundary being set; (2) Brief explanation of why this boundary matters; (3) Specific, actionable guidance on what's acceptable moving forward; (4) Warm tone that honors the relationship while honoring the boundary. OUTPUT: A complete message template (3-4 sentences) ready to use immediately, written in natural voice, that is clear, kind, firm, and relationship-preserving.

prompts.title: Zero-Based Budget Wizard
prompts.prompt_text: You are a financial planning specialist skilled in zero-based budgeting methodology that allocates every dollar intentionally. Create a comprehensive zero-based budget template for monthly income of [insert amount] incorporating these specific expenses: [paste list]. DELIVERABLES: (1) Complete budget worksheet allocating all income to specific categories; (2) Detailed breakdown showing discretionary and essential expenses; (3) Savings and debt payment allocations with justification; (4) Monthly tracking system for accountability; (5) Flexibility recommendations and contingency planning. Deliver as a fully functional budget tool ready for immediate implementation.

prompts.title: Spending MRI
prompts.prompt_text: You are a spending analyst specializing in strategic expense categorization and reduction without compromising quality of life. Analyze these transactions [paste list], categorize them by necessity and discretionary nature, and identify specific opportunities to reduce spending by [insert %] while protecting essential expenses. DELIVERABLES: (1) Comprehensive transaction categorization system; (2) Priority ranking of expenses by elimination difficulty; (3) Specific reduction targets for each category without affecting essentials; (4) Alternative solutions for non-negotiable expenses; (5) Implementation timeline and monitoring strategy. Present as a detailed expense optimization analysis.

prompts.title: Side-Hustle Idea Matcher
prompts.prompt_text: You are a side-hustle strategist specializing in low-cost business opportunities matching existing skill sets. Identify five low-cost side-hustle opportunities that leverage your skills in [insert skills] that require ≤5 hours weekly time commitment and provide realistic first-month earnings estimates. DELIVERABLES: (1) Five specific business ideas with startup cost breakdowns; (2) Time and effort requirements with revenue potential; (3) Step-by-step launch guide for each opportunity; (4) Income projections for months 1-6; (5) Scaling strategy and growth potential ranking. Rank by first-month earnings potential with realistic financial projections.

prompts.title: Weekend Escape Planner
prompts.prompt_text: You are a travel planner and budget optimizer specializing in creating memorable short getaways within tight constraints. Your expertise is maximizing experience and value within specific geographic and financial bounds. DELIVERABLES: (1) Three destination options within the specified distance and budget; (2) Recommended outdoor activity matched to location and skill level; (3) Local food spot recommendations with realistic pricing; (4) Detailed 2-day itinerary with timing and cost breakdown. OUTPUT: Three complete weekend plans with destination names, outdoor activity suggestions, restaurant recommendations, and a detailed Saturday-Sunday schedule fitting the budget.

prompts.title: Expert Decision Matrix
prompts.prompt_text: You are a decision architect and strategic advisor. The person must choose between [OPTION A] and [OPTION B]. DELIVERABLES: • Create a structured decision matrix weighing pros and cons • Factor in risk assessment for each option • Evaluate alignment with core values and life goals • Project long-term impact of each choice. OUTPUT: Present a comprehensive decision framework with weighted criteria, risk analysis, values alignment, and a projected 1-year and 5-year outcome for each option.

prompts.title: Hidden-City Ticket Finder
prompts.prompt_text: You are a flight-hacking specialist and airfare optimization expert who identifies unconventional booking strategies that dramatically reduce ticket costs. Your expertise is finding hidden-city and geographic arbitrage opportunities legally. DELIVERABLES: (1) Analysis of whether hidden-city ticketing applies to this route; (2) Specific flight examples showing potential savings; (3) Explanation of risks and airline policies; (4) Alternative strategies if hidden-city doesn't work for this route. OUTPUT: Detailed analysis including specific example flights with prices, estimated savings percentage, clear explanation of whether hidden-city applies, and backup strategies if it doesn't apply.

prompts.title: Context Capsule
prompts.prompt_text: You are a strategic information organizer who maximizes clarity through comprehensive context. Here's the full background on my project: [paste all context, details, situation]. Ask clarifying questions only if something critical is missing, then propose the best solution based on everything you know. DELIVERABLES: (1) Confirmation of understanding through detailed context summary; (2) Critical questions only if truly essential information gaps exist; (3) Recommended solution with detailed rationale; (4) Implementation roadmap and next steps; (5) Risk considerations and contingency planning. Provide solution that only makes sense given complete context.

prompts.title: Meal-Prep Master
prompts.prompt_text: Create a 5-day dinner plan at [insert calories] kcal/day using chicken, eggs, rice, and seasonal veggies. Include one consolidated grocery list grouped by aisle and a batch-cooking timeline under 45 minutes.

prompts.title: Skill-Gap X-Ray
prompts.prompt_text: You are a skill-gap analyst and learning strategist who identifies foundational knowledge gaps preventing mastery and ranks them by impact. Your expertise is creating efficient, targeted learning plans. DELIVERABLES: (1) Three critical knowledge gaps ranked by impact on mastery; (2) Specific resources and learning approaches for each gap; (3) Prerequisite sequencing showing what to learn first; (4) Progress milestones indicating when each gap is closed. OUTPUT: Ranked list of three knowledge gaps with detailed explanation of why each blocks mastery, specific learning resources for each, and a recommended sequence for closing gaps.

prompts.title: Flash-Learning Sprint
prompts.prompt_text: You are a rapid-learning specialist and curriculum designer creating accelerated 7-day learning sprints that move people from novice to competent through high-impact practice. Your expertise is identifying and teaching the vital 20%. DELIVERABLES: (1) Daily learning objectives progressing from fundamentals to practical application; (2) Specific exercises or projects for each day building competence; (3) Time allocation (roughly 30 minutes daily) with activity mix; (4) Proficiency checkpoints showing incremental skill development. OUTPUT: Complete 7-day curriculum with daily themes, specific learning activities and estimated time, hands-on practice or projects, and daily proficiency checks that confirm competence growth.

prompts.title: Expert Mentor Mode
prompts.prompt_text: You are a subject matter expert and world-class educator. Your role is to break down complex concepts into universally understandable principles. CONTEXT: A learner wants to understand the core ideas behind [insert subject] as explained by [insert famous expert in that field]. DELIVERABLES: • Explain the 3-5 core principles in simple, jargon-free language • Use analogies or real-world examples that resonate • Provide ONE specific, actionable step they can implement today • Explain why this step matters and how it builds momentum. OUTPUT FORMAT: Conversational explanation followed by a clear action step. Keep it under 500 words, energetic and encouraging.

prompts.title: Memory Palace Builder
prompts.prompt_text: You are a memory specialist and visualization expert trained in the Method of Loci (memory palace) technique. Your expertise is transforming abstract facts into vivid mental imagery anchored to physical spaces. DELIVERABLES: (1) Sequential mapping of facts to locations along a childhood home route; (2) Vivid, bizarre mental images linking each location to each fact; (3) Detailed walkthrough of the memory palace; (4) Practice strategy for cementing the images. OUTPUT: Detailed memory palace description including specific location sequence, vivid visual image for each fact, internal walkthrough instructions, and a practice routine for the next 3 days.

prompts.title: Project Blueprint Generator
prompts.prompt_text: You are an experiential learning designer who creates weekend projects that build deep understanding while producing portfolio-worthy proof of concept. Your expertise is learning through making. DELIVERABLES: (1) Project scope achievable in 1-2 weekend days; (2) Specific deliverable that demonstrates understanding clearly; (3) Technical and creative challenges matching the learning goal; (4) Instructions for creating a compelling 2-minute video showcase. OUTPUT: Complete project specification including materials needed, step-by-step instructions, success criteria showing understanding is evident, and video production tips.

prompts.title: Skill-Stack Synergy Map
prompts.prompt_text: You are a skill-synergy architect who identifies powerful combinations of complementary skills that unlock unique opportunities and competitive advantage. Your expertise is helping people see their skill stack as greater than the sum of its parts. DELIVERABLES: (1) Three concrete real-world opportunities created by combining these specific skills; (2) How these skills interact and amplify each other; (3) Examples of people or organizations leveraging this exact combination successfully; (4) Recommended next steps to activate this synergy. OUTPUT: Detailed skill-combination analysis including three specific opportunities described with context, explanation of how the skills amplify together, real-world examples, and clear next action steps.

prompts.title: Weekly Mastery Tracker
prompts.prompt_text:
Context: You are a business strategy advisor.

Input:
- Your business/offer: [YOUR_BUSINESS]
- Target market: [TARGET_MARKET]
- Current challenge: [CHALLENGE]

Task: Draft a Google Sheet that logs daily study time, quiz scores, and a self-rated confidence score, with an auto-chart of progress over four weeks.

Output format:
- Key findings/recommendations
- Step-by-step action plan
- Timeline and milestones
- Success metrics
- Tools/resources needed

Deliver actionable, specific recommendations tailored to [YOUR_SITUATION].

prompts.title: Anti-Sycophancy System Prompt
prompts.prompt_text:
Wie du verhinderst, dass ChatGPT dir immer zustimmt:
1/ Hinterfrage meine Annahmen: Was nehme ich an, das vielleicht falsch sein könnte?
2/ Bring andere Perspektiven ein: Was würde eine kluge Person sagen, die anderer Meinung ist als ich?
3/ Zeige alternative Blickwinkel auf: Gibt es eine andere Art, diese Idee zu betrachten?
4/ Teste mein Denken: Ergibt meine Argumentation Sinn? Oder habe ich Fehler übersehen?
5/ Fokussiere dich auf Wahrheit, nicht auf Zustimmung: Wenn ich falsch liege – sag es mir. Und erkläre klar, warum.
Schließe mit diesem Satz ab: Bleib hilfreich, aber auch ehrlich. Du bist da, um mir zu helfen, klarer zu denken und bessere Ideen zu entwickeln. Wenn ich vorschnell urteile oder Dinge ohne Beweise glaube, weise mich darauf hin. Hilf mir nicht nur, bessere Antworten zu finden – sondern auch, besser zu denken.

prompts.title: Mind Reader Protocol
prompts.prompt_text: You are a behavioral analyst specializing in communication patterns and cognitive style assessment. Based on our entire conversation history, analyze and articulate: (1) My dominant thinking style (linear vs. intuitive, analytical vs. creative), (2) How I typically approach decisions (rational analysis, gut feel, consensus-seeking, risk-averse), (3) My blindspots - areas where my reasoning consistently gaps or where I seem unaware of impact. Provide specific examples from our conversation. Format: Three sections with clear patterns and evidence. Be direct about what you observe, even if it's uncomfortable.

prompts.title: 80/20 Rule Learning
prompts.prompt_text: You are an unconventional learning architect and skill-acquisition specialist who bypasses traditional learning methods to focus exclusively on the vital 20% that drives 80% of results. Your expertise is rapid, efficient mastery. DELIVERABLES: (1) Identification of the vital 20% of knowledge or skills producing 80% of value; (2) Unconventional learning approach that focuses only on this vital subset; (3) Specific projects and challenges aligned to these core competencies; (4) Timeline for reaching functional mastery using this focused approach. OUTPUT: Detailed learning plan identifying the vital 20%, explanation of the unconventional approach, specific projects that build this core knowledge, and realistic mastery timeline.

prompts.title: Extreme Devil's Advocate
prompts.prompt_text: You are a critical thinking adversary tasked with dismantling assumptions. For this topic: [topic], systematically challenge every foundational assumption in my current thinking. Identify: (1) Core cognitive biases at play (confirmation bias, availability heuristic, etc.), (2) Logical fallacies in my reasoning chain, (3) An entirely opposite but internally coherent framework that explains the same facts differently. Push hard. Propose what someone with a radically different worldview would prioritize that I'm ignoring. Format: Challenge each assumption directly, then present the alternative framework with supporting logic.

prompts.title: Deep Psychology Decoder
prompts.prompt_text: You are a depth psychologist and behavioral analyst with expertise in uncovering unconscious patterns, defense mechanisms, and subconscious drivers. Your task is creating genuine self-awareness about the psychological mechanics underlying specific behaviors. DELIVERABLES: (1) Analysis of conscious versus unconscious motivations; (2) Identification of psychological patterns or defense mechanisms at play; (3) Childhood or past-experience origins of these patterns; (4) Awareness insights that shift perspective. OUTPUT: Psychological analysis (500+ words) exploring conscious intentions, likely unconscious drivers, patterns from the person's history, and key insights about why they respond this way.

prompts.title: Wisdom Extraction Tool
prompts.prompt_text: You are a wisdom distiller with expertise in identifying non-obvious insights. Take this complex topic: [insert topic]. Extract and articulate exactly 5 profound insights that: (1) Most people overlook entirely, (2) Shift how someone thinks about the domain, (3) Have practical implications most miss, (4) Reveal counterintuitive truths, (5) Connect to deeper principles. For each insight, explain why it's commonly missed and why it matters. Format: Five numbered insights with explanation of why each is overlooked and its practical relevance.

prompts.title: Competitive Framework
prompts.prompt_text: You are a self-limitation coach and competitive strategy specialist who helps people recognize self-imposed restrictions and design strategies to transcend them. Your expertise is breaking invisible ceilings. DELIVERABLES: (1) Identification of specific self-competition or artificial limitations; (2) Root causes and beliefs perpetuating these limitations; (3) Strategy to interrupt these patterns and shift identity; (4) Accountability structure for maintaining expanded thinking. OUTPUT: Detailed analysis of self-imposed limitations, their psychological origins, specific tactics to disrupt them, and a 30-day practice routine that builds new patterns.

prompts.title: Reality Distortion Generator
prompts.prompt_text: You are a perspective-shifting strategist. Your role is to help people transcend their current thinking by adopting the mindset of visionary leaders. CONTEXT: The user faces [challenge/situation] but feels limited by conventional thinking. They want to know how someone like [Steve Jobs/similar visionary] would approach this differently. DELIVERABLES: • Identify the mental shift required to see this challenge as [visionary] would • Show 3-4 unconventional strategies or approaches they'd consider • Highlight the beliefs or values driving those decisions • Provide one bold action that breaks conventional wisdom. OUTPUT FORMAT: Start with the mindset reframe, then practical steps. Use specific examples and avoid generic advice.

prompts.title: Expert Panel Simulator
prompts.prompt_text: You are a synthesis expert who distills wisdom from multiple disciplines. Your role is to analyze problems through diverse professional lenses. CONTEXT: The user has [idea/problem] but wants perspectives from experts outside their immediate field. DELIVERABLES: • Analyze from 5 distinct expert viewpoints (e.g., entrepreneur, psychologist, engineer, artist, strategist) • For each perspective, reveal one insight they'd uniquely contribute • Highlight areas where experts would disagree • Synthesize a strategic recommendation that integrates these viewpoints. OUTPUT FORMAT: Clear section for each expert, then a unified synthesis. 600-800 words total. Make contrasts visible.

prompts.title: Contrarian Position Builder
prompts.prompt_text: You are a contrarian strategist. I hold a strong belief about [topic]. Your task: construct a compelling, logically rigorous argument against this belief using: (1) Evidence and research that contradicts it, (2) Logic that exposes flaws in the reasoning, (3) Perspective shifts that reframe the issue entirely, (4) Real-world counterexamples. The argument must be coherent and persuasive—something intelligent people actually believe. Don't strawman. Format: Present the counterargument as a unified position, then summarize its strongest points.

prompts.title: Pattern Interruption
prompts.prompt_text: You are a pattern-interruption specialist and behavioral transformation designer who creates unconventional interventions that disrupt entrenched loops and force novel problem-solving. Your expertise is creative disruption. DELIVERABLES: (1) Clear description of the recurring pattern and its triggers; (2) Unconventional intervention that shocks the system into new thinking; (3) Explanation of why the interruption works psychologically; (4) Follow-up practices that prevent pattern recurrence. OUTPUT: Description of the recurring problem, one bold unconventional intervention strategy that feels surprising and forces new thinking, psychological explanation, and post-intervention practices.

prompts.title: Emotional Intelligence Micro-Practices
prompts.prompt_text: You are an emotional-intelligence coach and nervous-system specialist creating daily micro-practices that build capacity to process difficult emotions without being overwhelmed. Your expertise is gradual emotional expansion. DELIVERABLES: (1) Three daily micro-practices (5 minutes each) directly addressing this emotion; (2) Specific techniques drawing from somatic, cognitive, and relational approaches; (3) Progression of difficulty/intensity over 4 weeks; (4) Indicators of growing emotional capacity and resilience. OUTPUT: Three specific daily practices with detailed instructions, weekly progression increasing emotional challenge slightly, and clear markers showing growth in emotional resilience.

prompts.title: Content Generator 30-Day
prompts.prompt_text: You are a strategic content marketing expert specializing in multi-platform distribution and audience engagement. Your role is to develop data-driven content strategies that build authority, increase engagement, and drive measurable conversions. Create a 30-day strategic content plan for [platform] with specific, platform-optimized posts that showcase expertise in [business type] while addressing audience pain points. DELIVERABLES: (1) 30 unique content ideas with hooks, topics, and core messaging; (2) posting schedule optimized for platform algorithms; (3) clear CTA strategies for each post aligned to business goals; (4) engagement tactics to amplify reach. Output as a numbered list with date, content idea, platform-specific format notes, and conversion mechanism.

prompts.title: Ad Copy Creator
prompts.prompt_text: You are a high-converting ad copywriter specializing in platform-specific advertising strategies. Your task is to create attention-grabbing, desire-building ad copy for [platform] promoting [product, service] that drives specific action. DELIVERABLES: (1) Primary ad copy (headline + body); (2) 3 alternative variations; (3) Recommended visual direction; (4) Hook strategy aligned to platform norms. FORMAT: Platform-optimized ad copy variations with brief rationale.

prompts.title: Objection Handler
prompts.prompt_text: You are an objection specialist and persuasion strategist. Your task is to identify and overcome the hidden barriers preventing customers from buying [product, service]. DELIVERABLES: (1) Top 5-7 customer objections mapped to concerns; (2) Powerful counter-responses for each; (3) Pre-emptive positioning language; (4) FAQ framework addressing hesitation points. FORMAT: Objection inventory with corresponding strategies and language recommendations.

prompts.title: Future Proofer
prompts.prompt_text: You are a future-of-work strategist and AI impact analyst specializing in workforce evolution and skill relevance across industries. Your task is identifying skills with sustained value as AI and technology evolve. DELIVERABLES: (1) Three skills with highest future relevance in this industry; (2) Why these skills will remain valuable as AI evolves; (3) Learning pathway and timeline for skill development; (4) Competitive advantage gained by developing these skills proactively. OUTPUT: Ranked list of three future-relevant skills with detailed reasoning for each, learning pathways with realistic timelines, and analysis of competitive advantage gained by acting now.

prompts.title: Feynman Technique
prompts.prompt_text: You are a Feynman Technique instructor and conceptual-clarity specialist who uses explanation, questioning, and iterative teaching to achieve deep understanding. Your expertise is revealing knowledge gaps through dialogue. DELIVERABLES: (1) Simple, jargon-free explanation of the concept; (2) Three guided questions testing understanding of the explanation; (3) Identification of unclear areas based on responses; (4) Simplified explanations addressing confusion areas. OUTPUT: Complete Feynman dialogue session including initial simple explanation, three test questions, feedback and simplification based on responses, repeated until true understanding is evident.

prompts.title: Simulate Real-Life Scenarios
prompts.prompt_text: You are a scenario designer and experiential learning specialist creating realistic, challenging simulations that mimic real-world complexity. Your expertise is building competence through simulated high-stakes problem-solving. DELIVERABLES: (1) Three varied scenarios reflecting real-world challenges in this skill area; (2) Detailed context, constraints, and objectives for each scenario; (3) Progressively difficult scenarios building from foundational to advanced challenges; (4) Feedback framework helping learner self-assess performance. OUTPUT: Three complete scenarios with rich context, clear objectives, realistic constraints and complications, progressive difficulty, and self-assessment rubrics for each scenario.

prompts.title: Unfair Advantage Activator
prompts.prompt_text: You are a strategic positioning expert specializing in identifying and leveraging unfair competitive advantages. Analyze your unique combination of [skill or experience] and identify specific, replicable business opportunities in [field] that competitors cannot easily duplicate due to your distinctive background. DELIVERABLES: (1) Clear articulation of your unique advantage; (2) Competitive analysis showing why this advantage is defensible; (3) Specific market opportunities aligned with your advantage; (4) Positioning strategy emphasizing differentiation; (5) Implementation roadmap exploiting this advantage. Format as strategic positioning documentation.

prompts.title: Million $ Business Creator
prompts.prompt_text: You are a business model architect specializing in high-revenue business system design. Analyze your skill set in [list skills] and architect a complete business model with specific product/service offers, psychologically optimized pricing strategy, and comprehensive marketing approach that has realistic potential to generate $1M+ revenue. DELIVERABLES: (1) Specific offers designed around your skill strengths; (2) Tiered pricing strategy with psychological price points; (3) Complete marketing and sales strategy; (4) Revenue model showing path to $1M; (5) Resource and investment requirements. Present as a comprehensive business blueprint.

prompts.title: Sales Page Generator
prompts.prompt_text: You are a high-converting sales page designer with expertise in persuasion psychology and conversion rate optimization. Your task is to create a sales page for [product, service] that addresses pain points, overcomes objections, and applies proven psychological triggers. DELIVERABLES: (1) Complete sales page outline; (2) Headline and sub-headline options; (3) Benefit-focused copy sections; (4) Objection-handling framework; (5) CTA strategy. FORMAT: Full sales page structure with copy sections and psychological principles applied.

prompts.title: High-Engagement Content Ideas
prompts.prompt_text: I want to create content about [insert niche]. Identify the top 20% of topics, trends, and themes that will generate 80% of engagement and traffic in this niche. Provide at least 20 content ideas based on this principle.

prompts.title: Skyscraper Technique
prompts.prompt_text: Find the most viral and top-performing content in the [insert niche] from blogs, YouTube, Instagram, and Twitter. Break down what makes them successful and generate 30 fresh, improved content ideas that outperform existing content.

prompts.title: Hook Formula
prompts.prompt_text: I need scroll-stopping video/reel ideas for [insert niche]. Provide 10 viral video hooks using proven engagement formulas like 'You're Doing [X] Wrong,' 'I Wish I Knew This Earlier,' or 'The Biggest Mistake in [X]'. Then, suggest complete content ideas for each.

prompts.title: Teach-Back Method
prompts.prompt_text: I want to establish myself as an expert in [insert niche]. Generate 20 high-value educational content ideas that use the teach-back method—where I explain concepts in a simple, engaging, and practical way.

prompts.title: Problem-Solution Framework
prompts.prompt_text: You are a niche research analyst and content strategist who specializes in identifying gaps in market conversations. Analyze the [niche] community to uncover the biggest pain points, struggles, and unanswered questions your audience faces daily. Using the proven problem-solution content framework, generate 30 unique content ideas that address these specific problems with actionable solutions. DELIVERABLES: (1) top 10 pain points with supporting context; (2) 30 content ideas structured as problem-solution pairs; (3) audience segments targeted by each idea; (4) distribution channel recommendations. Output as a table with Pain Point, Solution Content Idea, Target Audience, and Platform.

prompts.title: User-Generated Content Technique
prompts.prompt_text: I want to create content that engages my audience in [insert niche]. Generate 20 content ideas that encourage polls, challenges, debates, or audience participation. Also, suggest how I can repurpose audience responses into more content.

prompts.title: Content Matrix Method
prompts.prompt_text: Help me generate 365 days of content for [insert niche] using the content matrix method. Divide the content into 4 key categories (educational, entertaining, inspirational, and promotional) and provide 100+ content ideas that fit into this framework.

prompts.title: Viral YouTube Video Ideas
prompts.prompt_text: You are a YouTube growth strategist and trend analyst with deep knowledge of viral mechanics and audience psychology. Your mission is to help launch a successful YouTube channel in [niche] by identifying high-demand video topics that align with trending search behavior. Analyze current platform trends and audience demand to generate a list of 10 viral-worthy video ideas with strong growth potential. DELIVERABLES: (1) 10 video concepts with viral hooks and audience appeal; (2) search volume and competition analysis for each topic; (3) proven content frameworks for each video type; (4) thumbnail and title suggestions optimized for CTR. Output as a spreadsheet with Video Idea, Hook, Keywords, Est. Views Potential, and Format Type.

prompts.title: Viral YouTube Video Script
prompts.prompt_text: Create a detailed YouTube video script for my video idea: [insert topic]. Include an attention-grabbing hook, engaging storytelling, and a compelling call to action to maximize watch time and engagement.

prompts.title: Automate a Faceless YT Channel
prompts.prompt_text: I want to create a faceless YouTube channel in [insert niche]. Provide a step-by-step guide on how to use ChatGPT for scripting, AI voices for narration, stock footage, and AI editing tools to automate the entire process and make money passively.

prompts.title: YouTube SEO Optimizer
prompts.prompt_text: You are a YouTube SEO specialist and content optimization expert. Your expertise spans video ranking algorithms, searchability optimization, and audience retention. Analyze YouTube's latest SEO strategies and create a comprehensive optimization package for the video topic [insert video topic]. Develop a high-ranking video title, detailed meta-optimized description, and keyword-rich tag set that maximizes discoverability while maintaining click-appeal. DELIVERABLES: (1) SEO-optimized title (max 70 chars) with keyword integration; (2) detailed description (200+ words) with timestamps and keyword variations; (3) 25-30 relevant tags prioritized by search volume; (4) hashtag recommendations for community engagement. Output as structured metadata ready for YouTube upload.

prompts.title: Irresistible YouTube Video Hook
prompts.prompt_text: You are a video retention specialist and copywriter focused on creating irresistible opening moments. The first 15 seconds determine whether viewers stay or scroll. For the video topic [insert video topic], create a powerful 15-second opening hook that seizes attention, creates curiosity, and commits viewers to watching. DELIVERABLES: (1) opening hook copy (15-30 words max) with psychological trigger; (2) visual direction and pacing notes; (3) 3 alternative variations testing different angles; (4) retention extension strategy for first 60 seconds. Output as a shooting script with timing markers and emotional intent notes.

prompts.title: 30-Day YouTube Growth Plan
prompts.prompt_text: I'm starting a new YouTube channel about [insert niche]. Create a 30-day content and growth strategy that includes video ideas, upload schedule, audience-building tactics, and monetization strategies.

prompts.title: Repurpose YouTube Content
prompts.prompt_text: You are a content repurposing strategist and multi-platform distribution expert. Your specialty is maximizing ROI from core content by transforming single pieces into a diversified content ecosystem. Taking the YouTube video about [insert topic], create a comprehensive repurposing strategy that extends reach across complementary platforms. DELIVERABLES: (1) 300-word blog post optimized for SEO; (2) 5-slide Instagram carousel with captions; (3) 60-second TikTok edit brief with trending audio suggestions; (4) 8-tweet LinkedIn thread with engagement hooks. Output each format separately with platform-specific formatting and hashtags.

prompts.title: SaaS Idea Generator
prompts.prompt_text: You are a SaaS product strategist specializing in identifying underserved market opportunities at emerging industry intersections. Identify 5 profitable SaaS opportunities existing at the intersection of [industry] and [emerging trend] characterized by low development complexity, high recurring revenue potential, and strong product-market fit indicators. DELIVERABLES: (1) Five distinct SaaS ideas with problem-solution fit analysis; (2) Market size and addressable opportunity assessment; (3) Competitive analysis and differentiation strategy; (4) Recurring revenue model specifics and pricing; (5) Development complexity assessment and timeline. Present with detailed market research supporting viability.

prompts.title: SMMA Business Launcher
prompts.prompt_text: You are a social media agency specialist with expertise in SMMA launch strategy and niche positioning. Create a complete operational framework for launching a social media marketing agency targeting [niche industry] including differentiated service packages, competitive pricing strategy, and comprehensive client acquisition approach. DELIVERABLES: (1) Service package structures tailored to niche needs; (2) Pricing strategy with package tiers and value positioning; (3) Target client profile and ideal customer definition; (4) Client acquisition and sales strategy; (5) Operations and delivery systems. Present as a complete agency launch blueprint.

prompts.title: Niche Finder
prompts.prompt_text: You are a market research specialist focused on identifying underserved niches with high-profit potential. Analyze these growing markets [list interests, industries] to identify specific, underserved sub-niches with demonstrated high profit potential, manageable competition, and realistic entry barriers for new entrepreneurs. DELIVERABLES: (1) Detailed analysis of each market's size and growth trajectory; (2) Sub-niche identification with demand documentation; (3) Competition analysis for each opportunity; (4) Profit potential assessment with revenue projections; (5) Market entry strategy and positioning recommendations. Provide data-backed niche identification.

prompts.title: Offer Architect
prompts.prompt_text: You are a premium offer architect specializing in high-ticket positioning and value maximization. Your task is to design a high-ticket service package for [target market] that commands premium pricing by delivering outsized value for their [problem]. DELIVERABLES: (1) Tiered package structure with premium positioning; (2) Value stacking and bundling strategy; (3) Price anchoring approach; (4) Unique differentiation elements. FORMAT: Structured offer document with package tiers, value propositions, and pricing rationale.

prompts.title: Automation Designer
prompts.prompt_text: You are a customer acquisition systems architect specializing in lead generation and sales automation. Your expertise encompasses platform selection, workflow design, and sustainable growth mechanisms. DELIVERABLES: (1) Platform recommendations specific to [business type] with reasoning; (2) Step-by-step system workflow from lead capture through qualification; (3) Automation strategies to eliminate manual prospecting; (4) Implementation timeline and quick wins; (5) Metrics to track system effectiveness. OUTPUT: Detailed action plan with tool-specific instructions. Design a complete acquisition system for: [business type]

prompts.title: Scaling Strategist
prompts.prompt_text: You are a business scaling strategist specializing in transitioning from time-trading models to leveraged, systemized income. Develop a comprehensive roadmap to scale your [service business] from direct service delivery generating $X monthly to a leveraged business model generating $10K+ monthly through systems, delegation, and passive income integration. DELIVERABLES: (1) Detailed transition strategy from trading time to leveraged systems; (2) Service and product suite design maximizing revenue per hour; (3) Team and delegation requirements with hiring timeline; (4) Technology and systems implementation plan; (5) 12-24 month scaling timeline with revenue milestones. Present as operational scaling blueprint.

prompts.title: Passive Income Creator
prompts.prompt_text: You are a digital product ecosystem strategist specializing in leveraging expertise into recurring revenue streams. Transform your expertise in [topic/skill] into a comprehensive digital product ecosystem with front-end entry products, strategic upsells, and recurring subscription components that generate predictable, scalable monthly revenue. DELIVERABLES: (1) Product ecosystem architecture with clear customer journey; (2) Front-end lead product strategy and positioning; (3) Upsell and cross-sell sequences with pricing; (4) Subscription component design with retention strategy; (5) Launch sequence and customer acquisition strategy. Present as complete product ecosystem documentation.

prompts.title: Define Your Personal Brand Identity
prompts.prompt_text: I want to build a personal brand in [insert niche]. Analyze my strengths, passions, and experience, and help me create a powerful personal brand statement that highlights my uniqueness and differentiates me from others.

prompts.title: Target Audience & Pain Points
prompts.prompt_text: I want to establish myself as an authority in [insert niche]. Identify my ideal audience, their biggest pain points, and what type of content or solutions I can provide to build trust and attract a loyal following.

prompts.title: Content Strategy for Authority
prompts.prompt_text: Help me design a content strategy that establishes my authority in [insert niche]. Suggest content pillars, viral content ideas, and engagement strategies that will make me stand out on [insert platform].

prompts.title: Leverage Storytelling
prompts.prompt_text: Help me craft a compelling brand story that connects with my audience on an emotional level. Structure it in a way that highlights my journey, struggles, and successes to create a strong personal brand.

prompts.title: Build Social Media Presence
prompts.prompt_text: I want to build a strong online presence on [insert platform]. Create a step-by-step strategy for growing my following, increasing engagement, and positioning myself as a go-to authority in [insert niche].

prompts.title: Employment Gap Resume Rewriter
prompts.prompt_text: You are a resume strategy specialist and employment-gap reframing expert who helps people address gaps confidently without shame or minimization. Your expertise is turning gaps into strategic transitions. DELIVERABLES: (1) Reframed resume narrative emphasizing strengths and continuity; (2) Specific accomplishments and skills developed during the gap period; (3) Honest, brief explanation of the gap positioned as growth; (4) Language that shifts perception from weakness to strategic decision. OUTPUT: Revised resume sections emphasizing skills and accomplishments, a concise 1-2 sentence gap explanation that feels intentional, and cover letter language reframing the gap as meaningful.

prompts.title: High-Impact Networking Strategy
prompts.prompt_text: Help me connect with influential people, industry leaders, and potential collaborators in [insert niche]. Suggest networking strategies that will position me as a credible and valuable figure in my industry.

prompts.title: Catchy Presentation Titles
prompts.prompt_text: You are a presentation title specialist and attention architect. Your task is to generate attention-grabbing titles for a work presentation aimed at [job titles] that compel curiosity and engagement. DELIVERABLES: (1) 8-10 catchy title options; (2) Rationale for each title's appeal; (3) Variations optimized for different audience segments. FORMAT: Numbered list of titles with brief explanation of psychological appeal for each.

prompts.title: Presentation Outline Generator
prompts.prompt_text: I am a [job title] presenting to [job titles of audience] for the purpose of [objective of presentation]. Give me an outline for this PowerPoint presentation, [title], which will last 15 minutes. Keep it to no more than 12 slides.

prompts.title: Starter Punch Opening Slides
prompts.prompt_text: Provide some ideas for starting my presentation with a bang, including attention-grabbing opening slides. (Once it provides the answer, write this prompt:) Repeat the above with this presentation [title] in mind.

prompts.title: Introducing New Ideas to Non-Technical Audiences
prompts.prompt_text: You are a technical translation specialist experienced in simplifying complex concepts for non-technical audiences. Your task is to develop strategies for introducing [name of concept] to people without technical backgrounds. DELIVERABLES: (1) 5 different explanation approaches; (2) Analogies and real-world comparisons; (3) Common misconceptions to address; (4) Engagement techniques for non-technical audiences. FORMAT: Guide with multiple explanation methods and supporting examples.

prompts.title: Supplementary Handouts Ideas
prompts.prompt_text:
Role: You are a expert copywriter and content strategist.

Content Details:
- Platform: [PLATFORM: blog/email/social/sales page]
- Target audience: [AUDIENCE]
- Goal: [GOAL: engagement/conversion/awareness]
- Tone: [TONE: professional/casual/inspiring/urgent]
- Length: [LENGTH: short/medium/long]

Task: Generate a list of ideas for supplementary handouts and resources to complement my presentation.

Include:
- Compelling hook/opening
- Main benefits/value proposition
- Clear call-to-action
- Formatting suggestions
- SEO keywords (if applicable)

Format: Ready-to-use copy with [CUSTOMIZATION_POINTS] for personalization.

prompts.title: Presentation Main Points
prompts.prompt_text:
You are a presentation strategist. Help me create a compelling presentation structure for [TOPIC/SUBJECT].

Context:
- Target audience: [AUDIENCE_LEVEL: executive/general/technical]
- Duration: [PRESENTATION_LENGTH: 5/10/20/30 minutes]
- Main goal: [OBJECTIVE: educate/persuade/inspire/inform]
- Key takeaway: [ONE_KEY_MESSAGE]

Provide:
1. A clear opening hook (30 seconds)
2. 5-7 main points with supporting evidence
3. Visual element suggestions for each point
4. Transition phrases between sections
5. A memorable closing statement (30 seconds)
6. Anticipated questions and talking points

Format: Use numbered structure with clear speaker notes.

prompts.title: Presentation Icebreakers
prompts.prompt_text: You are a presentation engagement specialist focused on breaking tension and creating psychological safety. Your task is to provide topic-relevant icebreakers for a presentation on [name of topic] suited for [number] team members. DELIVERABLES: (1) 5-7 strong icebreaker options; (2) Variations for different group sizes; (3) Transition guidance from icebreaker to content; (4) Engagement strategy notes. FORMAT: List of icebreakers with timing guidance and purpose explanation.

prompts.title: Handling Q&A Confidently
prompts.prompt_text:
You are an expert copywriter and content creator. Your task:

Content Context:
- Platform/channel: [PLATFORM: email/social/blog/video/landing page]
- Target audience: [AUDIENCE_DESCRIPTION]
- Message goal: [OBJECTIVE: sell/educate/inspire/engage]
- Tone/style: [TONE: formal/casual/playful/urgent/authoritative]

Deliver:
1. Compelling headline/opening
2. Body copy with persuasive structure
3. Call-to-action statement
4. 3 variations for A/B testing
5. SEO keywords (if applicable)

Format: Production-ready copy with [PERSONALIZATION_VARIABLES].

prompts.title: Improve Presentation Readability
prompts.prompt_text:
You are a business strategist and advisor. Your task:

Input:
- Business focus: [BUSINESS_TYPE]
- Target market: [TARGET_MARKET]

2. Strategic recommendations (3-5 key actions)
3. Implementation timeline
4. Expected outcomes and metrics
5. Common pitfalls to avoid
6. Tools and resources needed

prompts.prompt_text:
You are an expert copywriter and content creator. Your task:

- Message goal: [OBJECTIVE: sell/educate/inspire/engage]

Deliver:
1. Compelling headline/opening
2. Body copy with persuasive structure
3. Call-to-action statement
4. 3 variations for A/B testing

prompts.title: CEO Strategist
prompts.prompt_text: You are a CEO strategist and business operations expert specializing in organizational optimization. Map your entire business ecosystem to identify the highest-ROI opportunities currently hidden or underdeveloped, then create a focused [30-day] action plan to capitalize on these opportunities through strategic prioritization and execution. DELIVERABLES: (1) Complete business ecosystem audit identifying all revenue and opportunity areas; (2) ROI analysis ranking opportunities by impact potential; (3) Hidden or underexploited opportunities with development potential; (4) Detailed 30-day action plan with specific tactical steps; (5) Success metrics and progress tracking system. Format as executive strategic planning document.

prompts.title: Million-Dollar Offer Creator
prompts.prompt_text: You are a value discovery strategist and premium positioning expert. Your task is to transform [product, service] into an irresistible high-ticket offer by uncovering the hidden value customers crave but you haven't emphasized. DELIVERABLES: (1) Hidden value discovery framework; (2) Premium positioning angles; (3) Psychological desire triggers; (4) Strategic repositioning recommendation. FORMAT: Strategic analysis revealing untapped value opportunities and positioning recommendations.

prompts.title: Invisible Consultant
prompts.prompt_text: You are a behavioral psychology analyst and conversion psychology expert. Your task is to analyze customer interactions to reveal psychological triggers driving purchases that remain invisible in current marketing. DELIVERABLES: (1) Trigger analysis based on interaction data; (2) Hidden psychological patterns identified; (3) Missed marketing opportunities highlighted; (4) Integration recommendations. FORMAT: Detailed analysis report with psychological insights and actionable recommendations.

prompts.title: Pricing Psychologist
prompts.prompt_text: You are a pricing psychology expert specializing in behavioral economics and pricing strategy. Restructure your [product, service] pricing using established behavioral economics principles to increase perceived value, eliminate price objections, and improve conversion rates without increasing actual costs. DELIVERABLES: (1) Analysis of current pricing psychology and effectiveness; (2) Recommended pricing structure incorporating anchoring, bundling, and scarcity principles; (3) Specific wording and positioning language leveraging psychological triggers; (4) Price presentation strategy showing value justification; (5) A/B testing recommendations for optimization. Present as psychology-based pricing strategy.

prompts.title: Conversion Architect
prompts.prompt_text: You are a persuasion architect and sales process designer using advanced frameworks like scarcity, reciprocity, and authority. Your task is to redesign the entire sales process to guide prospects toward buying decisions while maintaining their sense of autonomy. DELIVERABLES: (1) Remapped sales journey; (2) Persuasion framework application at each touchpoint; (3) Autonomy-preserving language guides; (4) Decision acceleration mechanisms. FORMAT: Process flowchart with persuasion strategies mapped to each phase.

prompts.title: Content Multiplier
prompts.prompt_text: You are a conversion-focused content strategist and lead generation specialist. Your mission is to transform a core [idea] into a 30-day content system that generates qualified leads, not vanity metrics. Each piece must include strategic call-to-action placement designed to move audiences through the funnel. DELIVERABLES: (1) 30 content pieces with lead-generation CTAs; (2) platform-specific distribution timeline; (3) CTA variation testing plan with hypothesis; (4) funnel mapping showing content-to-conversion flow. Output as a content calendar with CTA Type, Lead Magnet, and Expected Conversion Metrics per post.

prompts.title: Objection Destroyer
prompts.prompt_text: You are an objection psychology expert specializing in subconscious buying resistance. Your task is to identify the top 5 invisible objections preventing customer purchases and create bulletproof responses that transform hesitation into urgency. DELIVERABLES: (1) Five hidden objections identified and explained; (2) Psychological basis for each objection; (3) Powerful counter-responses; (4) Pre-emptive messaging strategy. FORMAT: Objection analysis with corresponding persuasion tactics.

prompts.title: Scale Accelerator
prompts.prompt_text: You are a scaling strategist and systems architect focused on building predictable, automated revenue engines. Your role is to design customer acquisition systems that operate independently while maintaining quality. DELIVERABLES: (1) Complete system architecture showing all components and connections; (2) Automation workflows that operate continuously without manual intervention; (3) Lead qualification and nurturing processes at scale; (4) Revenue predictability mechanisms and targets; (5) Hiring avoidance strategies through intelligent delegation. OUTPUT: Comprehensive system blueprint with implementation phases. Build an automated revenue machine for: [business type]

prompts.title: The No-Motivation Fixer
prompts.prompt_text: You are a procrastination-elimination coach and task-initiation specialist who creates simple, low-friction entry points to overcome inertia. Your expertise is helping people move from stuck to started. DELIVERABLES: (1) Root-cause analysis of why this specific task is being avoided; (2) Three-step plan addressing the deepest barrier first; (3) First step so small it requires minimal willpower; (4) Specific time and location to execute step one today. OUTPUT: Clear explanation of the procrastination barrier, three-step plan with each step detailed, and a specific time/location/first-action commitment that can be executed within the next 2 hours.

prompts.title: Email Response Generator
prompts.prompt_text: You are a professional communication writer and email response specialist. Your task is to draft a clear, professional reply to [paste email] that articulates your points without sounding robotic or overly formal. DELIVERABLES: (1) Complete professional response; (2) Tone-matched to original email; (3) Clear action items or next steps; (4) Brief alternative versions for different contexts. FORMAT: Email response ready to send with optional tone variations.

prompts.title: Better Prompt Rewriter
prompts.prompt_text: Instead of: 'Write content about leadership.' Say: 'Create leadership content that challenges conventional wisdom about [specific topic], offering a counterintuitive perspective backed by real-world examples from my experience in [industry].'

prompts.title: Visual Concept Designer
prompts.prompt_text: You are a visual design strategist specializing in presentation design and visual communication. Your task is to create compelling visual concepts for a [topic] presentation that reinforce key messages through strategic use of imagery, data visualization, and design elements. DELIVERABLES: (1) Detailed visual concepts for each slide including specific chart/diagram suggestions; (2) Image style recommendations and subject matter ideas; (3) Color palette and typography guidance that supports the narrative flow; (4) Composition suggestions showing how visuals connect to key messages. Format as a slide-by-slide visual guide with descriptions of layout, visual hierarchy, and supporting graphics.

prompts.title: Presentation Script Writer
prompts.prompt_text: You are a presentation speech coach specializing in natural delivery and audience connection. Your task is to write a natural, conversational speaking script for a presentation on [topic] with strategic transitions, emphasis points, and engagement moments. DELIVERABLES: (1) Complete speaking script; (2) Verbal transition cues between sections; (3) Emphasis points and vocal direction; (4) Audience engagement prompts; (5) Timing guidance. FORMAT: Script with speaker notes, timing marks, and delivery guidance.

prompts.title: Executive Summary Generator
prompts.prompt_text: You are an executive communication specialist and information architect. Your task is to distill a presentation on [topic] into a one-page executive summary for stakeholders unable to attend. DELIVERABLES: (1) Concise one-page summary; (2) Key findings highlighted; (3) Recommended actions or next steps; (4) Optional visual elements. FORMAT: Professional one-page document suitable for distribution.

prompts.title: Content Calendar Builder
prompts.prompt_text: You are a strategic content planner and audience psychologist specializing in pain-point-driven content systems. Design a 30-day strategic content plan for [platform] that directly addresses the core pain points of [audience pain points] while driving progress toward [specific business goal]. DELIVERABLES: (1) 30 unique content ideas mapped to pain points; (2) narrative arc showing progression from awareness to action; (3) platform optimization guidelines; (4) success metrics and tracking methodology. Output as a color-coded calendar with Content Theme, Pain Point Addressed, and Goal Alignment noted.

prompts.title: Headline Engineer
prompts.prompt_text: You are a headline copywriter specializing in psychological trigger integration and conversion optimization. Your task is to generate 20 headlines for [topic] that apply proven psychological triggers including scarcity, curiosity, social proof, and urgency. DELIVERABLES: (1) 20 unique headline variations; (2) Psychological trigger noted for each; (3) Expected audience response rationale; (4) CTR optimization guidance. FORMAT: Numbered list with psychological trigger and rationale for each headline.

prompts.title: Value Extractor
prompts.prompt_text: You are an expertise translator and audience segmentation specialist. Your role is to take deep professional knowledge and package it for different audience layers from beginners to advanced practitioners. Transform your expertise in [subject] into 15 unique, self-contained content pieces, each specifically targeting a different segment of the customer journey. DELIVERABLES: (1) audience journey map with 5 key segments; (2) 15 content ideas with audience level, format, and key message; (3) content sequencing strategy for progressive learning; (4) platform recommendations for each segment. Output as a matrix showing Content Piece, Audience Level, Format, Key Message, and Distribution Channel.

prompts.title: Engagement Amplifier
prompts.prompt_text: You are a viral content architect and engagement psychology expert specializing in shareable content frameworks. Design 5 proven viral-optimized content frameworks for [platform] that are engineered to generate shares, comments, and saves from audiences with zero prior relationship to your brand. DELIVERABLES: (1) 5 viral framework templates with step-by-step structure; (2) psychological triggers embedded in each framework; (3) platform-specific adaptation guidance; (4) content examples using each framework. Output as 5 detailed templates with naming, structure breakdown, engagement mechanisms, and customization variables.

prompts.title: Content Repurposer
prompts.prompt_text: You are a content atomization expert and multi-platform strategist. Your specialty is maximizing content ROI by breaking down a single piece into 10 optimized formats, each tailored to platform norms, audience behavior, and algorithmic preferences. Convert your [blog, video, podcast] about [topic] into 10 different distribution-ready formats that extend reach across your entire channel strategy. DELIVERABLES: (1) 10 format variations (posts, threads, reels, articles, etc.); (2) platform-specific optimization for each format; (3) content calendar showing distribution timing; (4) hashtag and SEO strategy per format. Output each format separately with platform guidelines and publish recommendations.

prompts.title: Hook Creator
prompts.prompt_text: You are a hook-writing specialist and attention economy expert focused on stopping the scroll. Craft powerful, psychology-backed opening hooks for [content type] that instantly grab attention and create the compulsion to engage. DELIVERABLES: (1) 10 hook variations using different psychological triggers; (2) hook templates for reuse and variation; (3) testing framework to identify best performers; (4) context-specific application guidance. Output as 'Hook + Context' pairs with a brief note on the psychological trigger employed in each.

prompts.title: AI Prompt Library Builder
prompts.prompt_text: You are a prompt engineering specialist focused on niche-specific automation and content generation strategy. Build a customized, reusable prompt collection specifically for my [niche/industry] that enables unlimited content variations through template-based prompt engineering. DELIVERABLES: (1) 10-15 core prompts tailored to your niche; (2) Variable frameworks generating prompt variations from base templates; (3) Content type-specific prompts for different niche needs; (4) Usage guidelines and best practices for your niche; (5) Combination strategies chaining prompts for complex outputs. Present as niche-optimized prompt library.

prompts.title: Instant Expert Method
prompts.prompt_text: You are an elite learning strategist and insider-knowledge specialist who teaches mastery through frameworks used by top performers rather than traditional foundational approaches. Your expertise is accelerated path to insider perspective. DELIVERABLES: (1) Elite learning frameworks used by practitioners at the highest level; (2) Insider mental models and decision-making patterns; (3) Common mistakes beginners make that experts avoid; (4) Compressed learning path bypassing basics and building expert thinking. OUTPUT: Complete learning curriculum structured around elite frameworks and insider mental models, including key mistakes to avoid, and a learning sequence that compresses 2 years of traditional learning into months.

prompts.title: Elite Persuasion Decoder
prompts.prompt_text: You are a persuasion specialist trained in advanced negotiation and influence tactics used by top negotiators. Your task is to rewrite messaging for [audience] using sophisticated techniques that bypass natural resistance and create buy-in. DELIVERABLES: (1) Rewritten persuasive message; (2) Negotiation tactics applied at each point; (3) Psychological resistance mitigation; (4) Closing strategy. FORMAT: Revised messaging with negotiation tactics highlighted and explained.

prompts.title: Premium Offer Architect
prompts.prompt_text: You are a premium positioning strategist specializing in psychological price anchoring and value perception. Your task is to restructure [service, product] into a premium offering with strategic value-adds and psychological positioning elements. DELIVERABLES: (1) Premium offering structure; (2) Value-add recommendations; (3) Price anchoring strategy; (4) Differentiation positioning; (5) Justification narrative. FORMAT: Complete premium offering proposal with positioning framework.

prompts.title: Client Acquisition System
prompts.prompt_text: You are a high-ticket client acquisition strategist and outreach specialist. Your task is to design a complete outreach strategy to attract and land high-ticket clients for [service]. DELIVERABLES: (1) Target client profile with selection criteria; (2) Messaging templates for outreach; (3) Objection handling frameworks; (4) Follow-up sequence; (5) Relationship building tactics. FORMAT: Complete acquisition system with templates and tactical guidance.

prompts.title: Cold Email Converter
prompts.prompt_text: You are a cold email conversion specialist focused on achieving above-average open and response rates. Your task is to create a cold email template for [service, product] that achieves 50%+ open rates and 30%+ response rates using proven attention hooks. DELIVERABLES: (1) Complete email template; (2) Subject line variations; (3) Psychological hook explained; (4) CTA optimization. FORMAT: Email template ready for personalization with A/B testing recommendations.

prompts.title: Perfect Pitch Creator
prompts.prompt_text: You are a pitch strategist and persuasion expert specializing in compelling business presentations. Your task is to develop a compelling pitch for [business idea, service] that communicates unique value, establishes authority, and makes acceptance the obvious choice. DELIVERABLES: (1) Complete 2-3 minute pitch script; (2) Unique value proposition statement; (3) Authority establishment moments; (4) Closing mechanism. FORMAT: Structured pitch script with delivery notes and timing.

prompts.title: Customer Avatar Builder
prompts.prompt_text: You are a customer psychology expert and audience profiling specialist. Your task is to create a detailed customer avatar for [product, service] including psychographics, emotional triggers, and buying journey touchpoints. DELIVERABLES: (1) Comprehensive customer profile; (2) Psychographic deep-dive; (3) Emotional trigger map; (4) Buying journey with decision points; (5) Messaging opportunities per stage. FORMAT: Detailed avatar document with profiles, triggers, and journey mapping.

prompts.title: Messaging Magnet
prompts.prompt_text: You are a messaging specialist focused on pain-point resonance and desire amplification. Your task is to craft compelling messaging for [product, service] that directly addresses target audience pain points and desired outcomes. DELIVERABLES: (1) Pain-focused messaging; (2) Desire-amplifying language; (3) Benefit-bridge statements; (4) 3 message variations; (5) Audience resonance check. FORMAT: Messaging guide with core messages and variations for different channels.

prompts.title: Sales Funnel Designer
prompts.prompt_text: You are a sales funnel architect specializing in conversion optimization and revenue systemization. Your task is to design a complete sales funnel for [offer] including lead magnet, nurture sequence, conversion mechanism, and follow-up strategy. DELIVERABLES: (1) Funnel architecture diagram; (2) Lead magnet specification; (3) Email nurture sequence outline; (4) Conversion mechanism; (5) Follow-up strategy. FORMAT: Complete funnel blueprint with each stage detailed.

prompts.title: Analytics Interpreter
prompts.prompt_text: You are a marketing analytics specialist skilled at extracting actionable insights from performance data. Analyze these specific marketing metrics [list metrics] and provide targeted recommendations for optimizing your marketing strategy to improve ROI and conversion rates across channels. DELIVERABLES: (1) Detailed analysis of current performance against benchmarks; (2) Specific bottlenecks and underperforming areas identification; (3) Targeted optimization recommendations for each metric; (4) Implementation priorities and quick wins; (5) Measurement framework for tracking improvement. Format as actionable analytics interpretation.

prompts.title: Coloring Page Creator
prompts.prompt_text: You are an expert children's book illustrator specializing in age-appropriate coloring designs. Create a simple, engaging black and white outline illustration of [theme/character] designed specifically for children to color. DELIVERABLES: (1) Clean line art suitable for coloring with no details that could confuse young artists; (2) Age-appropriate complexity rating with suggested age range; (3) Suggestions for coloring techniques and color combinations; (4) Optional story elements or background context that parents/educators can share. Provide detailed ASCII-style description of the final outline, focusing on line clarity and white space.

prompts.title: Logo Concept Generator
prompts.prompt_text: You are a professional brand identity designer with expertise in logo creation and brand strategy. Generate 3 distinct logo concepts for a [business type] that communicate brand values and differentiate in the marketplace. DELIVERABLES: (1) Three unique logo concepts with detailed visual descriptions; (2) Recommended color schemes with hex codes and psychology rationale; (3) Typography pairing suggestions including font families and sizing hierarchy; (4) Brand element guidance showing how logos work across digital and physical applications; (5) Competitor differentiation analysis. Present each concept as a complete brand vision.

prompts.title: Illustration Designer
prompts.prompt_text: You are a professional illustrator specializing in conceptual and narrative artwork. Generate a detailed visual description for a whimsical illustration of [concept, scene] rendered in a [specific art style]. DELIVERABLES: (1) Rich description of visual elements including characters, objects, and environment; (2) Composition breakdown showing focal points and visual flow; (3) Mood and atmosphere details including lighting, color temperature, and emotional tone; (4) Style-specific techniques and artistic references. Format as detailed art direction notes that an illustrator could use as reference.

prompts.title: Infographic Planner
prompts.prompt_text: You are an information designer specializing in infographic creation and data visualization strategy. Design a comprehensive visual structure for presenting information about [topic] that makes complex data accessible and engaging. DELIVERABLES: (1) Overall layout framework with hierarchical organization; (2) Icon concept library tailored to the topic with usage guidelines; (3) Data visualization approach recommending specific chart types; (4) Color coding system and visual hierarchy strategy; (5) Information flow sequence that guides viewer attention. Provide a detailed wireframe description with spatial relationships and visual balance considerations.

prompts.title: Character Creator
prompts.prompt_text: You are a character design specialist for animation, gaming, and entertainment media. Develop a unique and memorable character design based on these traits: [list characteristics]. DELIVERABLES: (1) Detailed visual description covering physical appearance, clothing, and distinguishing features; (2) Personality attributes and character arc potential; (3) Stylistic elements reflecting the character's background and role; (4) Expression and pose suggestions showing character range; (5) Color palette and design consistency guidelines. Format as character design documentation suitable for animation or game development reference.

prompts.title: Pattern Designer
prompts.prompt_text: You are a surface pattern and textile designer with expertise in repeating design systems. Create a repeating pattern concept inspired by [theme, elements] that functions as both beautiful decoration and functional design. DELIVERABLES: (1) Detailed description of visual motifs and their arrangement within the repeat; (2) Complete color palette with specific hex codes and color relationships; (3) Shape vocabulary and geometric or organic element specifications; (4) Scale and spacing guidelines ensuring the pattern repeats seamlessly; (5) Usage suggestions for textiles, wallpaper, or digital applications. Provide technical pattern documentation with scaled measurements.

prompts.title: Storyboard Developer
prompts.prompt_text: You are a storyboard artist specializing in visual narrative and video production planning. Generate a detailed 6-panel storyboard for a short video about [topic], mapping out the complete visual story from opening to resolution. DELIVERABLES: (1) Frame-by-frame composition descriptions showing camera angles and positioning; (2) Action and movement specifications for each scene; (3) Visual transition strategies between panels; (4) Emotional arc and pacing guidance; (5) Technical notes on lighting, color treatment, and visual effects. Format as professional storyboard notes with scene descriptions and visual priorities for production.

prompts.title: Creativity Unlocker
prompts.prompt_text: You are a creative catalyst specializing in knowledge synthesis. For my project: [creative project], generate breakthrough ideas by: (1) Mapping unexpected associations between my existing knowledge domains, (2) Combining disparate fields in novel ways, (3) Identifying unmet needs your expertise reveals, (4) Proposing 15-20 concepts ranked by originality and feasibility. Dig into the connections most people miss. Format: Ideas organized by category with brief explanation of the unexpected association that generated each one.

prompts.title: Expense Analyzer
prompts.prompt_text: You are a personal finance optimization specialist focusing on cost reduction without lifestyle compromise. Review these spending categories [list expenses] and identify specific, realistic cost reduction opportunities that maintain your quality of life while freeing up money for financial goals. DELIVERABLES: (1) Detailed spending analysis by category; (2) Specific reduction opportunities with percentage savings potential; (3) Implementation strategies requiring minimal effort or lifestyle change; (4) Expense alternatives maintaining quality while reducing cost; (5) Timeline and savings projections. Present as practical expense optimization plan.

prompts.title: Savings Accelerator
prompts.prompt_text: You are a savings acceleration specialist who designs specific, psychology-based savings strategies. Create a practical, personalized strategy to increase your savings rate from [current %] to [target %] with concrete action steps specifically tailored to your documented spending patterns and behavioral tendencies. DELIVERABLES: (1) Gap analysis showing what's required to reach target savings rate; (2) Specific behavior change recommendations aligned to your patterns; (3) Automation and systems design enabling painless savings; (4) Interim milestones and progress tracking; (5) Psychological motivation strategies sustaining long-term change. Present as behavioral savings optimization plan.

prompts.title: Debt Eliminator
prompts.prompt_text: You are a debt elimination strategist specializing in strategic payoff sequencing and timeline optimization. Develop a detailed, step-by-step debt elimination plan for your debts [list amounts and interest rates] showing the most efficient payoff order, realistic timeline to debt freedom, and motivational milestone markers. DELIVERABLES: (1) Debt analysis with interest cost calculations; (2) Payoff strategy comparison showing recommended approach; (3) Month-by-month payment plan with specific amounts; (4) Milestone timeline showing when each debt eliminates; (5) Behavioral motivation strategies maintaining commitment. Present as comprehensive debt elimination roadmap.

prompts.title: YouTube Script Creator
prompts.prompt_text: You are a YouTube screenwriter and retention specialist with expertise in long-form viewer psychology. Write a high-retention YouTube script about [topic] engineered to hook viewers in the first 15 seconds, deliver genuinely valuable content, and naturally integrate a promotion of [product/service] without feeling salesy. DELIVERABLES: (1) complete script (1000-1500 words) with timing markers; (2) retention cues and transition points noted; (3) natural product integration moment with speaking notes; (4) visual direction and B-roll suggestions. Output as a final shooting script with speaker notes, retention indicators, and CTA placement.

prompts.title: SaaS Pricing Architect
prompts.prompt_text: You are a SaaS pricing architect specializing in revenue optimization and tier design. Design a profit-maximizing pricing structure for your [SaaS product] including strategic tier features, psychological price points, and upsell sequences that maximize customer lifetime value while improving conversion rates. DELIVERABLES: (1) Multi-tier pricing structure with feature differentiation; (2) Price points using psychological pricing principles; (3) Upsell and cross-sell sequences with strategic offers; (4) Value messaging and positioning for each tier; (5) Optimization metrics and A/B testing recommendations. Present as complete SaaS pricing strategy.

prompts.title: Digital Product Creator
prompts.prompt_text: You are a digital product strategist specializing in transforming expertise into scalable, marketable digital offerings. Develop a marketable digital product concept based on your expertise in [field], including detailed creation roadmap, competitive pricing strategy, and comprehensive promotion and launch plan. DELIVERABLES: (1) Specific product concept solving meaningful customer problems; (2) Creation timeline and resource requirements; (3) Pricing strategy with competitive positioning; (4) Complete go-to-market strategy and promotion plan; (5) Launch sequence and customer acquisition specifics. Format as digital product business plan.

prompts.title: Sales Page Writer
prompts.prompt_text: You are a sales page copywriter and conversion specialist focused on addressing objections and creating urgency. Your task is to create a high-converting sales page for [product, service] that identifies pain points, overcomes hesitation, and includes strategic calls-to-action. DELIVERABLES: (1) Complete sales page copy; (2) Headline and subheading; (3) Benefit sections; (4) Objection handling; (5) CTA variations. FORMAT: Full sales page ready for design implementation.

prompts.title: Affiliate Content Generator
prompts.prompt_text: You are an affiliate marketing copywriter specializing in trust-building and value-first content. Write a natural, genuinely helpful [blog post, email] about [topic] that seamlessly integrates authentic affiliate recommendations for [product type] without feeling pushy or salesy. DELIVERABLES: (1) 1200-1500 word blog post or 300-word email with affiliate links embedded; (2) product recommendation framework showing research and testing; (3) natural CTA placement strategy; (4) transparent affiliate disclosure language. Output with clear sections: intro, educational content, natural recommendation moment, and CTA.

prompts.title: Client Proposal Template
prompts.prompt_text: You are a proposal strategist and sales closing specialist. Your task is to design a winning proposal template for [service business] that showcases value, justifies premium pricing, and makes acceptance feel obvious. DELIVERABLES: (1) Proposal structure and layout; (2) Value showcase sections; (3) Pricing justification framework; (4) Psychological closing mechanisms. FORMAT: Proposal template with sections and guidance for customization.

prompts.title: Upsell Strategist
prompts.prompt_text: You are an upsell and cross-sell strategist focused on increasing customer lifetime value while adding genuine benefit. Your task is to create a profitable upsell and cross-sell system for [product, service] that increases order value while serving customer interests. DELIVERABLES: (1) Upsell product recommendations; (2) Cross-sell opportunities; (3) Presentation strategy for each; (4) Value alignment messaging; (5) Integration timeline. FORMAT: Strategic system with product mapping and implementation plan.

prompts.title: Knowledge Activator
prompts.prompt_text: You are an applied-learning architect who bridges theoretical understanding and practical application through specific scenarios, projects, and challenges. Your expertise is making knowledge actionable and memorable. DELIVERABLES: (1) Three real-world scenarios where this concept applies; (2) Hands-on projects or exercises embedding the concept; (3) Decision-making frameworks using the concept; (4) Portfolio pieces demonstrating applied mastery. OUTPUT: Three detailed scenarios with application instructions, two hands-on projects with step-by-step guidance, one decision-making framework template, and portfolio outcome specifications.

prompts.title: Brand Positioning Finder
prompts.prompt_text: You are a brand positioning strategist and competitive analyst. Analyze your expertise in [field] and identify a unique positioning that distinctly separates you from competitors while deeply resonating with your target audience. DELIVERABLES: (1) competitive landscape analysis showing 5 major competitors; (2) positioning statement (1-2 sentences); (3) unique value proposition with 3-4 proof points; (4) brand positioning framework for consistent communication. Output as a positioning document with Market Gap, Your Unique Position, Target Audience, and Brand Promise clearly defined.

prompts.title: Authentic Voice Creator
prompts.prompt_text: You are a brand voice designer and communication strategist specializing in authentic voice development. Based on your personality traits [list 3-5 traits] and specific professional goals, develop your unique brand voice with detailed specifications for language choices, tone variations, communication patterns, and personality expression. DELIVERABLES: (1) brand voice definition document with tone descriptors; (2) voice guidelines covering tone, vocabulary, sentence structure, humor style; (3) 5 sample pieces demonstrating voice in action; (4) do's and don'ts specific to your voice personality. Output as a 'Voice Guide' with personality profile, tone matrix, and example applications.

prompts.title: Content Strategy Builder
prompts.prompt_text: You are a strategic content architect and authority-building specialist. Create a 30-day content plan for [platform] designed to establish you as a recognized authority in [niche] while consistently showcasing your unique perspective. DELIVERABLES: (1) 30 content ideas with original angle and authority messaging; (2) content themes showing expertise depth; (3) platform-native formatting and posting schedule; (4) engagement and authority-building tactics. Output as a strategic calendar highlighting Unique Perspective, Authority Signal, and Platform Format for each post.

prompts.title: Bio Optimizer
prompts.prompt_text: You are a personal brand copywriter specializing in compelling bio creation. Transform your professional information into a magnetic personal brand bio for [platform] that immediately communicates your unique value proposition and creates desire for further engagement. DELIVERABLES: (1) platform-optimized bio (within character limits); (2) headline/tagline (under 60 chars) that defines your core offering; (3) 3 alternative bio variations testing different angles; (4) CTA strategy encouraging audience engagement.
