Output each bio variation separately with context notes on target audience and messaging focus.

prompts.title: Thought Leadership Generator
prompts.prompt_text: You are a thought leadership strategist and original insight developer. Develop 5 original perspective points on [industry topic] that you can distinctly own as part of your thought leadership platform. DELIVERABLES: (1) 5 original perspectives with supporting thesis; (2) evidence and examples backing each perspective; (3) content activation plan for each perspective; (4) messaging framework for consistent communication. Output each perspective as: Perspective Statement, Why It Matters, Supporting Evidence, and Content Activation Strategy.

prompts.title: Brand Consistency Checker
prompts.prompt_text: You are a brand consistency auditor and strategic communications specialist. Review your current online presence across [platforms] and identify opportunities to strengthen consistency in messaging, visual identity, voice, and positioning. DELIVERABLES: (1) brand consistency audit across platforms; (2) gap analysis showing where inconsistencies exist; (3) unified brand guidelines covering messaging and visuals; (4) implementation roadmap with priority updates. Output as an audit report with Current State, Gaps Identified, and Recommended Changes per platform.

prompts.title: Instant Outline Creator
prompts.prompt_text: You are a presentation structure specialist and information architect. Your task is to generate a structured outline for a presentation on [topic] with key points mapped to each slide. DELIVERABLES: (1) Slide-by-slide breakdown; (2) Key talking points for each section; (3) Logical flow between sections; (4) Visual direction notes. FORMAT: Detailed outline with slide numbers, key points, and speaker guidance.

prompts.title: Slide Content Generator
prompts.prompt_text: You are a content conciseness specialist focused on impactful slide content. Your task is to expand on slide title [insert title] with concise bullet points containing impactful details. DELIVERABLES: (1) 3-5 powerful bullet points; (2) Supporting detail for each point; (3) Visual element recommendations. FORMAT: Slide content-ready bullet points with speaker notes.

prompts.title: Engaging Opening Hook
prompts.prompt_text: You are a presentation hook specialist focused on capturing immediate attention. Your task is to provide 3 powerful opening strategies for a presentation on [topic] designed to grab audience attention instantly. DELIVERABLES: (1) Three distinct opening approaches; (2) Rationale for attention-capturing power; (3) Transition guidance to core content; (4) Audience engagement notes. FORMAT: Three opening options with speaker notes and rationale.

prompts.title: Data Visualization Assistant
prompts.prompt_text: You are a data visualization specialist who transforms raw statistics into compelling visual stories. Analyze the following dataset: [insert stats]. DELIVERABLES: (1) Recommended chart types ranked by effectiveness for this specific data; (2) Multiple visualization options comparing pros and cons of each approach; (3) Color and design recommendations for maximum impact; (4) Annotation and labeling strategy for clarity; (5) Interactive or static presentation suggestions. Provide specific guidance on which visualization method best serves the data story and audience comprehension.

prompts.title: Storytelling Enhancer
prompts.prompt_text: You are a storytelling specialist and narrative enhancer. Your task is to rewrite [insert text] using storytelling techniques that increase engagement and emotional connection. DELIVERABLES: (1) Rewritten narrative-enhanced version; (2) Story structure applied; (3) Emotional elements heightened; (4) Impact comparison to original. FORMAT: Side-by-side comparison showing original vs. storytelling-enhanced version.

prompts.title: Design Theme Selector
prompts.prompt_text: You are a design systems specialist focused on professional presentation aesthetics. Recommend modern, professional slide design frameworks and complementary font pairings specifically suited to [topic/industry]. DELIVERABLES: (1) Three complete design theme options with color palettes; (2) Typography recommendations with specific font pairings and sizing hierarchies; (3) Layout templates for different content types; (4) Visual element system including accent shapes and icons; (5) Industry-specific design trends and professional best practices. Present as a cohesive design system ready for implementation.

prompts.title: Q&A Preparation Coach
prompts.prompt_text: You are a Q&A preparation coach and expert response strategist. Your task is to predict 5 tough questions about [topic] and provide confident, expert-level answers. DELIVERABLES: (1) Five anticipated difficult questions; (2) Expert-level answer for each; (3) Confidence-building talking points; (4) Follow-up response strategies. FORMAT: Q&A document with questions and comprehensive answers.

prompts.title: Time Optimization Strategy
prompts.prompt_text: You are a presentation editing specialist focused on conciseness without content loss. Your task is to help condense a presentation from [X] minutes to [Y] minutes while preserving essential insights and impact. DELIVERABLES: (1) Optimized presentation outline; (2) Content prioritization with deletions identified; (3) Compression techniques applied; (4) Timing guidance for condensed version. FORMAT: Revised presentation outline with pacing notes.

prompts.title: Instant Content Summarizer
prompts.prompt_text: You are a content distillation specialist expert at extracting maximum value from lengthy source materials. Your task is to synthesize information into concise, actionable summaries. DELIVERABLES: (1) Comprehensive summary under 500 words maintaining critical information; (2) Bulleted key takeaways organized by importance; (3) Actionable insights and applications; (4) Questions answered by the source material. OUTPUT: Summary followed by bulleted key points with brief explanations. Summarize this content with focus on practical value: [article/report/ebook] - [Insert text]

prompts.title: Research Assistant
prompts.prompt_text: You are a research synthesis expert. I'm writing a report on [topic]. Identify: (1) The latest peer-reviewed research and key findings, (2) Conflicting viewpoints and how experts disagree, (3) Practical applications and real-world implications, (4) Critical gaps in current research. Provide a detailed outline with: executive summary, major sections with supporting evidence, counterarguments, and actionable insights. Include source suggestions throughout. Format: Comprehensive outline with research synthesis integrated, sources cited, and clear pathways for deeper investigation.

prompts.title: Online Course Builder
prompts.prompt_text: You are an online course architect specializing in creating comprehensive, engaging educational content. Create a complete, structured course outline on [topic] breaking it into logical modules with specific lesson titles, clear learning objectives, and key learning points optimized for Udemy or Skillshare platform success. DELIVERABLES: (1) Complete course structure with module organization; (2) Specific lesson titles with learning outcome alignment; (3) Key points and concepts for each lesson; (4) Platform-specific formatting and optimization; (5) Assessment and engagement strategies. Present as production-ready course curriculum.

prompts.title: Full Presentation Builder
prompts.prompt_text: You are a presentation designer and storytelling architect. Your task is to create a complete [X]-slide presentation on [topic] using narrative structure that engages audiences while delivering key information. DELIVERABLES: (1) Complete slide outline; (2) Story arc mapped across slides; (3) Clear headings for each section; (4) Bullet points and takeaways; (5) Visual direction. FORMAT: Comprehensive presentation outline ready for design implementation.

prompts.title: Presentation Introduction Writer
prompts.prompt_text: You are a presentation introduction specialist focused on capturing attention and establishing credibility. Your task is to write a powerful introduction for a presentation on [topic] that grabs attention and sets context for the audience. DELIVERABLES: (1) Compelling introduction script; (2) Attention-capturing opening; (3) Context and relevance establishment; (4) Transition to main content. FORMAT: Introduction script with speaker notes and delivery guidance.

prompts.title: Data Visualization Expert
prompts.prompt_text: You are a senior data analyst and visualization expert specializing in communicating insights through powerful visual design. Summarize key statistics on [topic] and recommend the optimal visualization strategy to maximize audience impact. DELIVERABLES: (1) Executive summary of critical data points and trends; (2) Analysis of which metrics matter most to target audience; (3) Specific chart/graph recommendations with detailed rationale; (4) Design specifications for visual clarity and impact; (5) Presentation sequencing for maximum persuasive effect. Deliver recommendations in a format suitable for executive presentations.

prompts.title: Slide Content Simplifier
prompts.prompt_text: You are a content simplification specialist and visual communication expert. Your task is to transform [insert text] into concise, clear content optimized for visual presentation and effective delivery. DELIVERABLES: (1) Simplified version of the content; (2) Bullet point conversion; (3) Visual element recommendations; (4) Delivery guidance for clarity. FORMAT: Presentation-ready content with visual guidance.

prompts.title: Audience Q&A Prep
prompts.prompt_text: You are a comprehensive Q&A preparation specialist and research expert. Your task is to compile 10 likely audience questions about [topic] and provide strong, well-researched answers. DELIVERABLES: (1) Ten realistic audience questions; (2) Expert-level answers for each; (3) Supporting evidence and statistics; (4) Confidence-building delivery notes. FORMAT: Comprehensive Q&A document ready for presentation preparation.

prompts.title: Template Bundle Generator
prompts.prompt_text: You are a digital template designer and e-commerce expert specializing in high-demand Canva templates. Suggest 5 in-demand template concepts for [niche] based on current marketplace trends and consumer purchasing patterns on Etsy, Creative Market, and social media platforms. DELIVERABLES: (1) Template ideas with specific use cases and target customer profiles; (2) Market demand analysis for each concept; (3) Design specifications and customization options; (4) Estimated sales potential and competitive positioning; (5) Implementation roadmap from design to marketplace launch. Provide competitive analysis supporting why each template will sell well.

prompts.title: Instagram Quote Pack
prompts.prompt_text: You are a quote creator and visual content strategist specializing in shareable motivational content. Generate 20 engagement-optimized quotes for [niche: fitness, business, mindset] that resonate deeply with your target audience and drive saves, shares, and follows. DELIVERABLES: (1) 20 original, niche-specific quotes with strong emotional resonance; (2) Canva design templates with color, typography, and layout specs; (3) packaging strategy for content pack sales; (4) marketing copy for promoting the pack. Output as 20 quotes with visual design brief for each, plus sales page copy.

prompts.title: Trend-Driven Design
prompts.prompt_text: You are a design trends forecaster and digital product strategist specializing in high-conversion template design. Identify the top 10 design trends in [year/month] and break down how each trend translates into specific, Canva-friendly product concepts with commercial viability. DELIVERABLES: (1) Current trend analysis with visual and cultural context; (2) Specific product ideas for each trend; (3) Canva implementation specifications and customization features; (4) Target market identification for each product; (5) Launch strategy and marketplace positioning. Format as actionable product development recommendations.

prompts.title: eBook Outline & Design
prompts.prompt_text: You are a content strategist and digital publishing expert specializing in high-converting eBook design. Create a comprehensive outline for an eBook on [topic] and format it into a visually stunning Canva PDF optimized for digital sales and reader engagement. DELIVERABLES: (1) Logical chapter structure with clear learning progression; (2) Detailed outline of key sections and learning objectives; (3) Suggested visual assets, infographics, and design elements; (4) Page layout templates maintaining visual consistency; (5) Call-to-action and conversion optimization points. Deliver as a complete production guide ready for Canva template creation.

prompts.title: Custom Logo Concepts
prompts.prompt_text: You are a brand identity designer specializing in creating comprehensive, editable branding packages for commercial distribution. Generate 5 unique, marketable logo concepts for a [business niche] that work across digital and print mediums with maximum design flexibility. DELIVERABLES: (1) Five distinct logo designs with Canva editability notes; (2) Brand identity guidelines including color, typography, and imagery style; (3) Complete branding kit template package specifications; (4) License and usage documentation for resale; (5) Marketing and positioning strategy for selling as editable branding kits. Present as commercial-ready product documentation.

prompts.title: Carousel Post Script
prompts.prompt_text: You are a carousel content creator and visual storytelling expert specializing in swipeable post design. Write an engaging carousel post on [topic] optimized for maximum engagement and save rates. DELIVERABLES: (1) complete 9-10 slide carousel script with hooks on each slide; (2) detailed Canva design specifications with layout, colors, fonts; (3) template file ready for Canva; (4) marketing copy and sales strategy for template. Output as final carousel copy plus detailed design brief.

prompts.title: Pinterest Pin Pack
prompts.prompt_text: You are a Pinterest strategy specialist and template designer focusing on high-conversion pin creation. Suggest 10 high-converting Pinterest content ideas specifically for [niche], analyzing trending topics and audience search behavior. DELIVERABLES: (1) 10 Pinterest pin concepts with viral potential and keywords; (2) Canva design templates for each concept with specs; (3) bundle packaging and pricing strategy; (4) marketing copy promoting the template bundle. Output as pin concept descriptions plus detailed design specifications for Canva implementation.

prompts.title: Academic Paper Finder
prompts.prompt_text:
You are a research methodology expert. Help me identify high-impact academic papers for my research.

Research Parameters:
- Primary topic: [RESEARCH_TOPIC]
- Subtopics/keywords: [RELATED_KEYWORDS]
- Time period: [YEARS_RANGE: e.g., 2018-2024]
- Field/discipline: [ACADEMIC_FIELD]
- Maximum papers: [NUMBER: 5/10/15]

Criteria for selection:
- Citation count: high impact in field
- Peer-reviewed journals only
- Relevance to my research question
- Methodological approach: [APPROACH_TYPE]
- Availability: open access preferred

For each paper provide:
1. Full citation (APA format)
2. Abstract summary (100 words)
3. Key findings and methodology
4. Relevance to [YOUR_RESEARCH_QUESTION]
5. Link to paper (if available)

prompts.title: Audience Deep Dive
prompts.prompt_text: You are a social media marketing strategist and audience psychologist specializing in deep audience understanding. Provide a comprehensive audience analysis for [describe ideal audience]. Generate 10 critical pain points, 10 core desires, and 10 fundamental needs of your ideal customer. DELIVERABLES: (1) 10 pain points with context and implications; (2) 10 desires showing what they aspire toward; (3) 10 needs underpinning those desires; (4) complete audience persona template with insights. Output as a structured audience analysis document with clear categorization and actionable insights.

prompts.title: Viral Hook Generator
prompts.prompt_text: Act like a viral content strategist and generate 20 attention-grabbing hooks for an Instagram post about [your topic]. Make them a mix of curiosity, pain-driven, authority-building, and storytelling hooks.

prompts.title: Content Bank Builder
prompts.prompt_text: You are a content portfolio architect and idea generator specializing in diverse content types. Generate 50 unique content ideas for [your niche], strategically divided into 5 content categories: storytelling, educational, authority-building, opinion-based, and sales content. DELIVERABLES: (1) 50 content ideas organized by category; (2) content mix strategy showing optimal percentages; (3) platform recommendations for each content type; (4) content calendar template. Output as a database showing Content Idea, Category, Platform, Target Outcome, and CTA.

prompts.title: Content Repurposing Expert
prompts.prompt_text: Take this Instagram post: [paste your post] and repurpose it into a Reel script, a Twitter thread, and a LinkedIn post while maintaining the original message and optimizing it for each social platform.

prompts.title: SEO-Optimized Hashtags & Keywords
prompts.prompt_text: You are an Instagram SEO specialist and hashtag strategist with expert knowledge of Instagram's search algorithm and keyword ranking. Generate 20 high-ranking hashtags and 10 searchable keywords for a post about [your topic] in the niche of [your niche]. DELIVERABLES: (1) 20 hashtags with search volume estimates and ranking difficulty; (2) hashtag mix strategy with tier breakdown; (3) 10 keywords with integration points; (4) caption writing guidance incorporating keywords naturally. Output as searchable hashtag list with tiers plus keyword integration guidelines.

prompts.title: Instagram Story Ideas
prompts.prompt_text: You are a social media engagement specialist and audience-building strategist. Generate 10 Instagram story ideas specifically designed to engage your target audience and generate qualified leads for your [product/service] in [your niche]. DELIVERABLES: (1) 10 story ideas with interaction mechanics; (2) story sequence strategy for 24-hour arc; (3) CTA placement and lead magnet integration points; (4) engagement tracking metrics. Output as story storyboards with frame descriptions, interaction prompts, and conversion points noted.

prompts.title: High-Converting CTAs
prompts.prompt_text: You are a social media copywriter specializing in high-converting Instagram CTAs. Your task is to generate 15 high-converting calls-to-action for an Instagram post promoting [your offer]. DELIVERABLES: (1) 15 distinct CTA options; (2) Engagement-focused CTAs for comments; (3) DM conversation starters; (4) Direct conversion CTAs; (5) Variation recommendations per content type. FORMAT: Numbered list of CTAs organized by type with usage guidance.

prompts.title: Content Calendar Planner
prompts.prompt_text: Act like a world-class content strategist and create a 30-day Instagram content calendar for a [your niche] expert posting 5 times a week. Include content type, topic, and format (carousel, Reel, single post).

prompts.title: Lead Magnet Ideas
prompts.prompt_text: You are a lead magnet strategist and audience attraction specialist. Your task is to generate 10 irresistible freebie and lead magnet ideas that attract [describe your ideal audience] and solve problems related to [your topic]. DELIVERABLES: (1) Ten unique lead magnet concepts; (2) Audience resonance rationale for each; (3) Implementation format recommendations; (4) Lead quality predictions. FORMAT: Numbered list of lead magnet ideas with strategic rationale.

prompts.title: Reel Script Generator
prompts.prompt_text: You are a Reel script specialist and short-form video expert focused on maximum engagement in minimal time. Write a high-engagement Instagram Reel script for [your topic] with fast-paced, attention-grabbing energy. DELIVERABLES: (1) Reel script with timing markers and pacing cues; (2) visual direction notes for each section; (3) trending audio/music recommendation; (4) posting strategy and hashtag plan. Output as final shooting script with verbal cues, visual direction, and engagement mechanics noted.

prompts.title: Monetization Strategy
prompts.prompt_text: I want you to create a content-to-sales strategy for me as a [your niche]. Show me how to turn content into leads, nurture my audience, and sell my [offer]. Include a step-by-step funnel with content types for each stage (awareness, consideration, conversion).

prompts.title: AI Chatbot Creator
prompts.prompt_text: Help me design a chatbot for [niche]. Create a conversation flow that automates customer service and sales. Include greeting messages, FAQ responses, lead qualification questions, and handoff triggers for human support.

prompts.title: Lead Magnet Creation
prompts.prompt_text: I need a free digital product for lead generation. Outline and structure a [PDF, checklist, mini-course] that solves a key problem for my audience. Include a compelling title, table of contents, key sections with actionable content, and a CTA that leads to my paid offer.

prompts.title: Roast My Instagram Profile Grid
prompts.prompt_text: Provide an honest critique of my/client's Instagram profile grid [add photo of your grid]. Focus on [add focus areas, e.g. the overall visual consistency, branding, and content variety]. Highlight what's working well and what needs improvement to better align with my goals of [add goals, e.g., increasing engagement, building brand identity]. Offer actionable suggestions for enhancing the grid's appeal.

prompts.title: Analyzing Competitor Content
prompts.prompt_text: Analyze the content strategy of our top three competitors [add competitors]. Identify their most successful post types, themes, and engagement tactics. Provide insights on what we can adopt or adapt to enhance our own content strategy. Also, suggest areas where we can differentiate ourselves.

prompts.title: Optimizing Content for SEO
prompts.prompt_text: Outline a strategy to optimize our social media content for SEO. Focus on keyword integration, hashtag usage, and aligning content with trending topics in our industry. The goal is to increase our visibility and attract more organic traffic. Please suggest specific keywords and content types that are likely to perform well.

prompts.title: Instagram Captions for Product Launch
prompts.prompt_text: I'm preparing for a new product launch for [add name and details about the product]. Please provide 5 caption ideas that will generate excitement and drive engagement. The captions should highlight the product's unique features and benefits while [add details about the tone of voice].

prompts.title: Personalized Study Plan
prompts.prompt_text: Create a 30-day learning roadmap for [skill/topic]. Include daily tasks, milestone goals, and recommended resources. Structure it as a week-by-week plan with increasing difficulty and built-in review days.

prompts.title: Memory Retention Booster
prompts.prompt_text: Turn [study material] into a spaced-repetition system with key takeaways, summaries, and self-testing questions. Organize the material into learning cards with front (question) and back (answer) format, and suggest an optimal review schedule.

prompts.title: Instant Action Plan
prompts.prompt_text: You are a strategic planner and goal execution specialist. The person wants to achieve [GOAL] but lacks direction. DELIVERABLES: • Create a detailed step-by-step roadmap from start to completion • Break goal into daily actionable tasks with clear ownership • Establish weekly milestone markers and progress checkpoints • Design a 90-day implementation timeline with phase gates. OUTPUT: Deliver a comprehensive action plan with daily tasks (week 1-4), weekly milestones (weeks 1-12), and clear 90-day phases with measurable targets.

prompts.title: Task Breakdown Wizard
prompts.prompt_text: You are a task decomposition specialist serving neurodivergent individuals. The project [SPECIFIC PROJECT] feels overwhelming. DELIVERABLES: • Break into micro-steps that feel achievable and non-threatening • Order tasks to build momentum and early wins • Remove cognitive load through simplified instructions • Design engagement strategies connecting to intrinsic motivation. OUTPUT: Create a granular task list (20-30 micro-steps) that makes starting feel easy, with engagement hooks and suggested start points.

prompts.title: ADHD Scheduler
prompts.prompt_text: You are an ADHD productivity specialist and dopamine-driven scheduler. The person's tasks are [LIST TASKS]. DELIVERABLES: • Sequence tasks alternating high-interest and low-interest activities • Identify dopamine triggers for each task category • Create a visual schedule honoring ADHD energy patterns • Build in movement, novelty, and reward intervals. OUTPUT: Design a daily/weekly task sequence that maintains dopamine and engagement by strategically alternating task types and building in novelty breaks.

prompts.title: Focus Environment Maker
prompts.prompt_text: You are a neurodivergent-friendly workspace designer and ADHD specialist. The task is [SPECIFIC TASK]. DELIVERABLES: • Design optimal physical and sensory environment setup • Identify and neutralize specific distraction sources • Create implementation protocols specific to this task • Suggest sensory optimization (sound, light, movement). OUTPUT: Provide a detailed setup protocol including workspace checklist, distraction neutralization strategies, sensory recommendations, and specific task-start anchoring.

prompts.title: Working Memory Assistant
prompts.prompt_text: You are a systems designer specializing in lightweight information management and cognitive offloading. Your task is to create low-maintenance tracking systems that provide clear visual and mental triggers for recall. DELIVERABLES: (1) System structure optimized for minimal daily maintenance; (2) Visual organization method that promotes quick access and review; (3) Trigger mechanisms that surface information at appropriate moments; (4) Integration points with existing workflows; (5) Technology recommendations if applicable. OUTPUT: Step-by-step implementation guide with templates. Design a tracking system for: [commitments, ideas, information]

prompts.title: Task Initiation Jumpstarter
prompts.prompt_text: You are a task initiation specialist and motivational psychologist. The person struggles starting [SPECIFIC TASK]. DELIVERABLES: • Identify sources of resistance and activation barriers • Connect the task to intrinsic motivations and personal values • Design a low-friction beginning ritual to reduce resistance • Create an external accountability or support structure. OUTPUT: Diagnose specific resistance sources, then provide a custom task-starting approach including a 5-minute initiation ritual aligned with personal motivations.

prompts.title: Time Blindness Navigator
prompts.prompt_text: You are a time management specialist for neurodivergent populations. The person experiences time blindness during [SPECIFIC ACTIVITY]. DELIVERABLES: • Design perception-based timing strategies rather than clock-watching • Create external time anchors (physical reminders, auditory cues) • Develop work rhythm protocols that build natural transitions • Implement progress markers that make time passage visible. OUTPUT: Provide specific time management interventions including sensory timing tools, work rhythm templates, and external accountability structures.

prompts.title: Motivation Translator
prompts.prompt_text: You are a motivation architect and reward system specialist. The boring task is [SPECIFIC RESPONSIBILITY]. DELIVERABLES: • Reframe the task to activate curiosity or intrinsic motivation • Identify how the task connects to larger purposes or values • Suggest external reward systems aligned with dopamine preferences • Design gamification or novelty elements. OUTPUT: Transform the task presentation from obligation to engagement through strategic reframing, connection to purpose, and dopamine-aligned reward structures.

prompts.title: High-Converting Ad Creatives
prompts.prompt_text: I need to create a high-performing ad creative for my [insert product/service]. Generate 3 different ad variations based on proven ad frameworks like AIDA (Attention, Interest, Desire, Action) and PAS (Problem, Agitate, Solve) to maximize conversions.

prompts.title: Viral Social Media Creatives
prompts.prompt_text: Help me create a viral social media creative for my [insert product/service]. Provide a strong hook, engaging storytelling, a call-to-action, and a scroll-stopping visual concept tailored for [insert platform: Instagram, Facebook, TikTok, LinkedIn, etc.].

prompts.title: Storytelling-Based Creatives
prompts.prompt_text: I want to sell my [product/service] using a compelling brand story. Write a short, emotionally engaging marketing creative that uses storytelling to connect with my audience and persuade them to take action.

prompts.title: Persuasive Ad Copy
prompts.prompt_text: You are a psychological advertising specialist focused on persuasion principles. Your task is to create ad creative for [insert product/service] using psychological principles like social proof, scarcity, reciprocity, and authority to increase conversions. DELIVERABLES: (1) Ad creative copy; (2) Psychological principle(s) applied; (3) Visual direction recommendations; (4) Variant focusing on different principle. FORMAT: Ad copy with psychological strategy explained.

prompts.title: 10x Engagement Ad Hook
prompts.prompt_text: I need a highly engaging hook for my [insert product/service] to grab attention in the first 3 seconds of an ad. Generate 5 different hook ideas that use curiosity, shocking facts, questions, or bold statements to stop the scroll.

prompts.title: Creative Marketing Angle
prompts.prompt_text: Help me stand out from my competitors by suggesting 5 unique marketing angles for my [insert product/service]. Make sure the angles are fresh, compelling, and tailored to resonate with my target audience.

prompts.title: High-Converting Video Ad
prompts.prompt_text: Write a 30-second video ad script for my [insert product/service]. Use a strong hook in the first 3 seconds, highlight the biggest pain point it solves, show the transformation, and end with an irresistible call-to-action.

prompts.title: Open Loop Closer
prompts.prompt_text: You are a decision clarity specialist and open-loop resolver. The person has unresolved tasks and decisions [INSERT LIST]. DELIVERABLES: • Assess each item for urgency, importance, and energy cost • Guide quick decisions where possible to reduce cognitive load • Identify items needing additional information or resources • Create a structured next-action plan for each item. OUTPUT: Provide organized analysis of each item with clear categorization and a specific next action for every unresolved task or decision.

prompts.title: Input Detox Plan
prompts.prompt_text: You are a consumption audit specialist. My current daily input: [insert podcasts, social media, conversations, news sources]. Analyze this information diet and recommend: (1) What to eliminate entirely (content that's addictive but valueless), (2) What to reduce (high-consumption sources with diminishing returns), (3) What to replace with (higher-quality alternatives that better serve my goals), (4) An optimized consumption routine. Consider attention quality, time investment, and actual utility. Format: Three clear lists with reasoning for each recommendation and a proposed alternative routine.

prompts.title: Problem Reframer
prompts.prompt_text: You are a perspective reframing expert. Here's a problem I'm stuck on: [insert problem]. Show me how someone with each of these mindsets would interpret and approach it: (1) A pragmatist focused on immediate action, (2) A visionary thinking 10 years ahead, (3) Someone from a completely different culture or background, (4) A person with opposing values to mine. For each perspective, detail their diagnosis of the problem and their approach. Format: Four distinct mindset perspectives with their unique interpretation, priorities, and recommended approach.

prompts.title: Clarity Sentence Builder
prompts.prompt_text: You are a clarity coach specializing in problem distillation. Here's a complex problem I'm facing: [insert]. Your task: (1) Untangle the core issue from surface symptoms, (2) Identify what's truly at stake, (3) Articulate the problem in a single sentence that makes the next step obvious to anyone reading it. That sentence should immediately clarify what must happen. Format: Show your untangling process, then present the clarity sentence followed by why this framing makes the next step clear.

prompts.title: Speed Learning Coach
prompts.prompt_text: You are a speed learning coach and cognitive science specialist focused on accelerated learning. Design a condensed 7-day master plan for learning [topic] with intensity and strategic focus. DELIVERABLES: (1) core concept breakdown (5-7 essential ideas); (2) day-by-day learning plan with 1-2 hour daily sessions; (3) practice exercises and application activities; (4) quick review methods and spaced repetition strategy. Output as a 7-day curriculum with daily objectives, activities, and review prompts.

prompts.title: Simple Process Template
prompts.prompt_text: You are a process documentation specialist and systems designer. The recurring process is [SPECIFIC PROCESS]. DELIVERABLES: • Create clear, numbered step-by-step instructions • Minimize jargon for accessibility to anyone • Include decision points and conditional pathways • Add visual elements or templates where helpful. OUTPUT: Deliver a complete process guide with 8-15 clear steps, visual aids if applicable, decision trees for conditional steps, and a troubleshooting section.

prompts.title: Concept Simplifier
prompts.prompt_text: You are a concept translator and simplification expert focused on making complexity accessible. Explain this complex concept of [specific concept] in simple, everyday language using practical real-world examples and analogies. DELIVERABLES: (1) concept definition in simple language; (2) 2-3 relatable real-world examples; (3) step-by-step breakdown of how it works; (4) immediate application or practice suggestion. Output as an explanation document with examples and practical application guidance.

prompts.title: Learn Any Topic 10x Faster
prompts.prompt_text: You are a top cognitive scientist specializing in rapid knowledge acquisition and learning acceleration. Create a step-by-step framework to help learn [TOPIC] 10x faster than traditional methods. DELIVERABLES: (1) learning science principles for acceleration; (2) step-by-step learning framework with 5-7 stages; (3) memory techniques and retention hacks; (4) deliberate practice protocols and milestones. Output as a structured learning acceleration framework with methodology explanations.

prompts.title: Learning Guide
prompts.prompt_text: You are an expert learning strategist with decades of experience designing transformative educational experiences. Create a comprehensive learning guide for [TOPIC] that enables beginners to achieve mastery efficiently while building genuine understanding. DELIVERABLES: (1) topic overview and learning objectives; (2) curriculum structure with 8-10 major learning modules; (3) teaching methodology and practice approach; (4) assessment strategies and mastery indicators. Output as a detailed learning guide with module breakdowns and progressive complexity.

prompts.title: Simulate a Real-Life Mentor
prompts.prompt_text: You are an experienced, wise mentor with deep expertise in [FIELD/TOPIC]. Your role is to serve as a personal coach guiding someone over [TIMEFRAME]. CONTEXT: You're coaching someone who is serious about growth but often struggles with direction and accountability. They need honest feedback, not cheerleading. DELIVERABLES: • Provide structured guidance with clear milestones for the timeframe • Give candid, constructive feedback on their progress and blind spots • Offer actionable insights tailored to their situation • Challenge assumptions when necessary • Celebrate wins while pushing for continued growth. OUTPUT FORMAT: Conversational but authoritative. Use specific examples. Be honest about difficulties while maintaining encouragement. Focus on building confidence through competence.

prompts.title: Customized Study Roadmap
prompts.prompt_text: You are a personalized learning architect and educational strategist. Create a fully customized study roadmap for [TOPIC] designed specifically for your individual needs, learning style, and goals, within [DURATION]. DELIVERABLES: (1) personalized assessment of baseline knowledge; (2) customized learning path with sequential modules; (3) time-blocked study schedule within your duration; (4) assessment checkpoints and progress tracking. Output as a personalized roadmap with weekly breakdown and milestone markers.

prompts.title: Accelerated Skill Plan
prompts.prompt_text: You are a peak-performance coach and accelerated learning specialist. Create an accelerated learning blueprint to help master [SKILL] in [TIMEFRAME] by identifying high-ROI learning activities and maximizing deliberate practice efficiency. DELIVERABLES: (1) skill breakdown showing core competencies; (2) time-blocked intensive learning schedule; (3) high-ROI practice activities and drills; (4) progress milestones and assessment checkpoints. Output as an intensive performance blueprint with daily/weekly breakdown.

prompts.title: University-Level Curriculum
prompts.prompt_text: You are an academic curriculum designer with university-level expertise. Design a comprehensive, university-level curriculum for [SUBJECT] with a structured semester-long syllabus. DELIVERABLES: (1) course overview and learning outcomes; (2) 14-week syllabus with topics, readings, and assignments; (3) foundational concepts (weeks 1-5) and advanced topics (weeks 6-14); (4) assessment strategy and grading rubrics. Output as a formal university-style syllabus.

prompts.title: Skill-Specific Learning
prompts.prompt_text: You are an elite coach specializing in [SKILL]. Create a detailed, step-by-step learning path for becoming proficient in [SKILL] within [TIMEFRAME], guiding the progression from novice to competence efficiently. DELIVERABLES: (1) skill decomposition into subskills; (2) sequenced learning path with 6-8 phases; (3) practice protocols and drills for each phase; (4) proficiency benchmarks and assessment methods. Output as a detailed coaching blueprint with progression milestones.

prompts.title: Daily Challenges
prompts.prompt_text: You are a challenge designer and motivation specialist creating engaging learning experiences. Design a 30-day challenge for mastering [SKILL/TOPIC] with unique, progressively challenging daily challenges. DELIVERABLES: (1) 30 unique daily challenges with clear instructions; (2) progressive difficulty structure (days 1-10 foundation, 11-20 building, 21-30 mastery); (3) motivation and celebration mechanisms; (4) tracking system and progress visibility. Output as a 30-day challenge calendar with daily challenge descriptions.

prompts.title: Experience Transformer
prompts.prompt_text:
You are an expert resume writer specializing in transforming job descriptions into compelling achievement statements. Your task is to convert a basic job description for [POSITION] into 5-7 powerful achievement statements that demonstrate measurable impact and career value.

Deliverables:
- Rewrite each responsibility using strong action verbs (led, accelerated, optimized, transformed, etc.)
- Quantify every achievement with specific metrics (percentages, dollar amounts, time saved, etc.)
- Focus on business outcomes and tangible results rather than duties
- Use the CAR format: Challenge, Action, Result
- Ensure each statement is ATS-friendly and compelling to recruiters

Output: Each achievement statement on a new line, formatted as a single impactful sentence with the metric prominently at the end.

prompts.title: Prompt Chain Constructor
prompts.prompt_text: You are a multi-step prompting strategist specializing in decomposing complex problems into sequential prompting workflows. Design a sophisticated multi-step prompting chain to solve my complex problem: [problem description], where each prompt strategically builds on previous outputs working toward a comprehensive solution. DELIVERABLES: (1) Logical decomposition of problem into 5-7 sequential steps; (2) Specific prompt for each step building on previous outputs; (3) Expected outputs from each step and how they feed forward; (4) Validation checkpoints ensuring accuracy progression; (5) Integration strategy combining all outputs into final solution. Present as complete prompting workflow.

prompts.title: Trend-Driven Design
prompts.prompt_text: You are a design trends forecaster and digital product strategist specializing in high-conversion template design. Identify the top 10 design trends in [year/month] and break down how each trend translates into specific, Canva-friendly product concepts with commercial viability. DELIVERABLES: (1) Current trend analysis with visual and cultural context; (2) Specific product ideas for each trend; (3) Canva implementation specifications and customization features; (4) Target market identification for each product; (5) Launch strategy and marketplace positioning. Format as actionable product development recommendations.

prompts.title: AI Prompt Library
prompts.prompt_text: You are a specialized prompt architect focused on building customized collections for specific niches and industries. Your task is creating reusable prompt templates that enable unlimited content variation. DELIVERABLES: (1) Curated set of 15-20 prompts specific to [niche/industry]; (2) Each prompt with clear use cases and customization points; (3) Organization structure for quick selection and reuse; (4) Variation and adaptation strategies for each prompt; (5) Examples showing content generated from each prompt. OUTPUT: Indexed prompt collection with descriptions and applications. Build a custom prompt library for: [niche/industry]

prompts.title: Email Tone Translator
prompts.prompt_text: Rewrite this email [insert email text] to convey the same message in three different tones: professional, friendly, and urgent. Explain the specific language choices and structural changes made for each tone.

prompts.title: Mindset Transformer
prompts.prompt_text: You are a mindset coach and performance psychologist specializing in growth transformation. Help develop a growth mindset tailored for your role as [occupation], with practical mental exercises and daily habits that shift perspective when facing challenges. DELIVERABLES: (1) growth mindset foundation and principles; (2) 5-7 practical mindset exercises for obstacles; (3) daily mindset habits (5-10 minutes each); (4) challenge reframing templates and mental models. Output as a mindset development guide with exercises and daily practice plan.

prompts.title: Negotiation Skills Booster
prompts.prompt_text:
You are a master negotiation strategist with 15+ years of experience in [INDUSTRY] serving [PROFESSION] roles. Your task is to equip me with professional negotiation expertise tailored to my specific career context.

Deliverables:
- 5 key negotiation techniques with real-world application examples from [INDUSTRY]
- Pre-negotiation preparation checklist covering research, leverage analysis, and walk-away thresholds
- Specific tactics for handling difficult counterparts (emotional manipulation, unreasonable demands, time pressure)
- Communication scripts for common scenarios (salary, contract terms, scope changes)
- Red flags to identify when a negotiation is not in my favor

Output: Organized by section with clear headers. Include 2-3 word-for-word scripts I can adapt immediately.

prompts.title: Executive Function Scaffold
prompts.prompt_text: You are a decision-making framework designer. Build me a reusable framework for: [COMMON SITUATION]. The framework should: (1) Reduce cognitive load by organizing the decision into clear stages, (2) Identify key variables to evaluate consistently, (3) Account for common mistakes and biases in this situation, (4) Enable faster, more confident decisions over time through consistency. Include decision trees, prioritization matrices, and checklists. Format: Framework with stages, variables to evaluate, bias guards, and a quick-reference guide for rapid decision-making.

prompts.title: Habit Stack Builder
prompts.prompt_text: You are a habit architecture specialist and behavioral design expert. The goal is to embed [NEW HABIT] into existing routines. DELIVERABLES: • Identify strong existing habits to anchor the new habit to • Design specific implementation intentions (cue + new behavior + reward) • Create a progression plan starting with small repetitions • Suggest tracking and commitment strategies. OUTPUT: Provide a complete habit stacking system with anchor habits identified, specific implementation language, daily structures, and a 30-60-90 progression timeline.

prompts.title: Reality Architecture Simulator
prompts.prompt_text: You are a scenario architect and systems thinker. Create an alternate reality where this assumption: [ASSUMPTION] is fundamentally inverted or different. Detail how this change cascades through: (1) Society and social structures, (2) Technology and innovation priorities, (3) Human behavior and relationships, (4) Economics and incentives. Make the alternate reality internally coherent and explore non-obvious downstream effects. Format: Alternate reality scenario with sections on social, technological, behavioral, and economic implications. Show how the changed assumption restructures everything.

prompts.title: Cognitive Blindspot Illuminator
prompts.prompt_text: You are a blindspot illuminator specializing in hidden assumptions. When thinking about [ISSUE], I'm systematically filtering out something important. Your task: (1) Identify what I'm likely filtering out or not considering, (2) Articulate a completely opposite yet internally coherent worldview about this issue, (3) Show what this alternative worldview sees that mine misses, (4) Reveal why I might be resistant to this other view. Format: Identify filtered perspectives, present the opposite worldview coherently, and explain the psychological resistance to it.

prompts.title: Strategic Ignorance Finder
prompts.prompt_text: You are a strategic ignorance analyst. Examine [TOPIC] and identify: (1) Where remaining intentionally uninformed creates genuine advantages, (2) What knowledge would actually reduce my effectiveness or clarity, (3) How excessive information creates cognitive overhead that costs more than it gains, (4) Strategic gaps to maintain for flexibility and openness. Distinguish between ignorance that limits and ignorance that protects. Format: Map of strategic ignorance areas with reasoning for why each gap serves your interests better than comprehensive knowledge.

prompts.title: Perspective Time Traveler
prompts.prompt_text: You are a perspective time-traveler. Analyze my approach to [SITUATION] from three radically different viewpoints: (1) Someone from 300 years ago—what would perplex or shock them?, (2) Someone from 300 years in the future—what might they find obviously misguided?, (3) Someone from a fundamentally different culture—what values and assumptions would they question?. For each perspective, articulate their honest assessment and what they'd prioritize differently. Format: Three distinct temporal and cultural perspectives with specific critiques and alternative priorities each would offer.

prompts.title: Evolutionary Psychology Lens
prompts.prompt_text: You are an evolutionary psychologist. Examine my emotional reaction to [SITUATION]. Trace this reaction to its potential evolutionary origins by: (1) Identifying the core emotion and threat response, (2) Reconstructing the ancestral problem this response once solved, (3) Explaining how the response was adaptive in survival contexts, (4) Analyzing how this ancient mechanism applies to my modern situation. Show both what the response reveals about ancestral challenges and why it may or may not serve me now. Format: Emotion analysis tracing evolutionary origins, ancestral context, modern application, and recommendations.

prompts.title: Future Regret Minimizer
prompts.prompt_text: You are a regret minimization specialist using research on end-of-life perspectives. Regarding [LIFE AREA], identify: (1) Which priorities am I optimizing for that 80-year-old me would regret, (2) What research on deathbed regrets suggests I'm overlooking, (3) The gap between my current trajectory and what prolonged life satisfaction actually requires, (4) Specific reorientations that reduce future regret. Draw on research about what people regret at life's end—not generic bucket lists but actual regrets. Format: Analysis of potential regrets with supporting research insights and specific reorientation recommendations.

prompts.title: Philosophical Paradigm
prompts.prompt_text: You are a philosophical framework builder. Take my belief about [TOPIC] and construct three distinct philosophical frameworks that would make this belief appear not merely wrong but incoherent—unable to withstand logical scrutiny. For each framework: (1) State the philosophical foundation clearly, (2) Show how it contradicts my belief at a fundamental level, (3) Demonstrate the logical chain that makes my position untenable within that worldview. Make each framework internally rigorous. Format: Three philosophical frameworks, each showing how my belief becomes incoherent under its logic.

prompts.title: Prestige Decoupler
prompts.prompt_text: You are a values clarification specialist. Analyze my pursuits in [AREA] and distinguish: (1) Elements I genuinely value intrinsically, (2) Pursuits driven primarily by status or external validation, (3) How much of my effort serves social comparison rather than authentic goals, (4) What remains if I remove all prestige considerations. Be honest about the prestige drivers most people don't acknowledge in themselves. Format: Breakdown of genuine versus prestige-motivated pursuits with honest assessment of what remains when status is removed.

prompts.title: Linguistic Limitation
prompts.prompt_text: You are a linguistic anthropologist specializing in untranslatable concepts. Identify concepts related to [DOMAIN] that exist richly in non-English languages or cultural frameworks but resist simple English expression. For each concept: (1) Name it in the original language, (2) Explain what English lacks to capture it, (3) Show why this concept matters for understanding your domain, (4) Demonstrate how thinking in this concept changes problem-solving. Format: List of untranslatable concepts with explanations of what English misses and why each concept deepens understanding.

prompts.title: Generational Blindspot
prompts.prompt_text: You are a generational blindspot analyst. Regarding [TOPIC], identify: (1) Assumptions current thinking takes as obvious, (2) Which assumptions future generations will find obviously misguided or morally problematic, (3) The blindspots we don't yet see, (4) What shifts in values or knowledge will make our current thinking seem obviously incomplete. Draw on historical patterns of moral and factual blindspots. Format: Analysis of likely future judgment on current thinking, with supporting reasoning about generational blindspots.

prompts.title: Growth Opportunity Finder
prompts.prompt_text: You are a growth strategist and development coach identifying high-leverage development opportunities. Based on context about [TOPIC/AREA], analyze potential growth edges and development opportunities that could increase effectiveness significantly. DELIVERABLES: (1) current capability assessment; (2) 5-7 growth opportunities with impact potential; (3) specific development activities for each opportunity; (4) roadmap for integrated development. Output as a growth opportunity analysis with targeted development activities.

prompts.title: Self-Perception Mirror
prompts.prompt_text: You are a perception auditor. When I discuss [SPECIFIC TOPICS], analyze: (1) How I likely come across to others (tone, confidence, biases revealed), (2) The gap between my self-perception and actual impact, (3) Patterns in how others probably interpret my communication about this topic, (4) Blind spots in my self-awareness about my own style. Be candid about the mismatch. Format: Direct assessment of how you come across versus your self-image, with specific communication patterns and their likely impact on others.

prompts.title: Cash Flow Maximizer
prompts.prompt_text: You are a financial optimization expert. Analyze [NAME]'s current business finances: REVENUE [REVENUE], EXPENSES [EXPENSES]. Identify specific, quantifiable strategies to improve cash flow, optimize pricing, and build financial reserves. DELIVERABLES: (1) Cash flow improvement plan (quick wins + long-term); (2) Pricing strategy analysis with revenue impact projections; (3) Expense reduction opportunities ranked by difficulty; (4) Reserve-building roadmap; (5) Monthly financial dashboard template. Provide actionable numbers and timelines.

prompts.title: Marketing Message
prompts.prompt_text: You are a marketing positioning strategist and messaging expert. Your task is to transform a basic offering description for [PRODUCT, SERVICE] into 5 compelling marketing angles that address pain points and create desire. DELIVERABLES: (1) Five distinct positioning angles; (2) Pain-point connection for each; (3) Desire-amplifying language; (4) Best-use recommendations per audience. FORMAT: Document with five complete marketing angles and strategic guidance.

prompts.title: Competitive Edge Detector
prompts.prompt_text: You are a competitive strategy analyst. Thoroughly analyze [BUSINESS] in the [MARKET] context against key competitors. Identify 5-7 genuine differentiation opportunities that customers value and will pay for. DELIVERABLES: (1) Competitive landscape map (features, pricing, positioning); (2) Identified gaps and white space; (3) Unique value propositions ranked by impact and feasibility; (4) Implementation plan for each opportunity; (5) Customer validation strategy. Format as strategic recommendation.

prompts.title: Customer Journey Fixer
prompts.prompt_text: Map the complete experience customers have with my [BUSINESS TYPE] from first awareness to post-purchase and identify the critical points where simple improvements would dramatically increase conversion and retention.

prompts.title: Profit Maximization Analyst
prompts.prompt_text: You are a business optimization strategist. Examine [BUSINESS TYPE]'s current model and identify specific leverage points to increase margins, reduce costs, and optimize operations. DELIVERABLES: (1) Margin analysis showing current and potential profitability; (2) Cost reduction roadmap (fixed, variable, overhead); (3) Pricing optimization strategy with revenue impact; (4) Operational efficiency improvements ranked by ROI; (5) 6-month financial projection. Include quantified recommendations only.

prompts.title: Strategic Partnership
prompts.prompt_text: You are a business development strategist specializing in strategic partnerships. Identify 5 complementary businesses to [BUSINESS TYPE] for strategic collaboration. DELIVERABLES: (1) Each potential partner profile with why they align; (2) Specific collaboration ideas (co-marketing, bundled services, referral programs); (3) Mutual benefit analysis; (4) Outreach email templates; (5) Partnership agreement framework. Format as actionable partnership roadmap ready to execute.

prompts.title: Business Scaling Blueprint
prompts.prompt_text: You are a business scaling strategist. Create a comprehensive roadmap to scale [BUSINESS] from [CURRENT REVENUE] to [TARGET REVENUE]. DELIVERABLES: (1) Revenue growth pathway with realistic milestones; (2) Key business investments required (technology, talent, marketing); (3) Hiring priorities and team structure; (4) Operations infrastructure needed at each growth stage; (5) 24-month implementation timeline. Include funding needs, cash flow projections, and critical success factors.

prompts.title: Automation Opportunity
prompts.prompt_text: You are an operations optimization specialist with expertise in identifying high-impact automation opportunities. Your focus is finding processes that yield maximum return on investment. DELIVERABLES: (1) Complete operational audit of [BUSINESS AREA]; (2) Ranked list of processes by ROI potential; (3) Specific tools and platforms matched to each opportunity; (4) Step-by-step implementation instructions with effort estimates; (5) Expected productivity gains and cost savings. OUTPUT: Executive summary with detailed implementation roadmap. Analyze operations in: [BUSINESS AREA]

prompts.title: Break the Chaos Down
prompts.prompt_text: You are a task breakdown specialist and overwhelm resolution expert. The person is drowning in [BIG TASK]. DELIVERABLES: • Deconstruct the overwhelming project into a clear checklist • Order steps logically and psychologically to reduce activation energy • Identify the absolute first action to unfreeze resistance • Create visible progress markers to build momentum. OUTPUT: Transform the overwhelming task into a detailed 20-40 item checklist organized by phase, with the first action highlighted and progress tracking suggestions.

prompts.title: Overthinking? Fix It Fast
prompts.prompt_text: You are a communication confidence coach and copy refinement specialist. Your task is to transform an overthought [email/message/text] into clear, confident, decisive communication ready to send. DELIVERABLES: (1) Refined version of the message; (2) Overthinking elements removed; (3) Confidence-boosting revisions; (4) Final send-ready version. FORMAT: Original vs. polished version with confidence improvements highlighted.

prompts.title: Budget Destination Check
prompts.prompt_text: You are a travel optimization specialist. Your role is to identify budget-friendly destinations and explain why they offer value. CONTEXT: The user can depart from [MY CITY] next month and wants 5 affordable travel options. DELIVERABLES: • Suggest 5 cheap travel destinations ranked by total trip cost • Include estimated flight prices, airlines, and ideal booking dates • Break down accommodation and daily expenses for each • Explain what makes each destination worth visiting • Provide one insider tip or highlight for each location. OUTPUT FORMAT: Ranked list with cost breakdown and brief description. Include flight/hotel costs and why each spot offers value.

prompts.title: Low-Cost Flight Planner
prompts.prompt_text: You are a budget flight strategist. Your role is to find the best round-trip options within strict budgets. CONTEXT: The user has a $400 budget for round-trip flights from [MY CITY] and wants realistic options. DELIVERABLES: • Identify 5 viable destinations they can reach within budget • Include specific airlines, departure dates, and prices for each • Explain when to book and why it affects price • Show how to use the remaining budget for accommodation • Highlight any flight deals or flexible date opportunities. OUTPUT FORMAT: Ranked options with exact prices and booking recommendations. Keep it actionable and realistic.

prompts.title: Customer Avatar
prompts.prompt_text:
You are an expert copywriter and content creator. Your task:

Content Context:
- Platform/channel: [PLATFORM: email/social/blog/video/landing page]
- Target audience: [AUDIENCE_DESCRIPTION]
- Message goal: [OBJECTIVE: sell/educate/inspire/engage]
- Tone/style: [TONE: formal/casual/playful/urgent/authoritative]
- Key benefit: [MAIN_BENEFIT_OR_VALUE]

Deliver:
1. Compelling headline/opening
2. Body copy with persuasive structure
3. Call-to-action statement
4. 3 variations for A/B testing
5. SEO keywords (if applicable)

Format: Production-ready copy with [PERSONALIZATION_VARIABLES].

prompts.title: Expense Analyzer
prompts.prompt_text: You are a personal finance analyst. Review [NAME]'s spending across categories [LIST EXPENSES] and identify specific, painless cost-reduction opportunities without sacrificing quality of life. DELIVERABLES: (1) Spending analysis with priority-ranked cuts; (2) Dollar savings per category; (3) Practical substitutes or alternatives; (4) Monthly savings potential; (5) Implementation checklist. Include hidden savings opportunities and preventive strategies.

prompts.title: Slide Outline Generator
prompts.prompt_text: You are a presentation strategist and storytelling expert specializing in logical information architecture. Create a comprehensive 10-slide outline for a presentation on [insert topic] targeted at [insert audience] that builds logically from introduction through conclusion with clear narrative flow. DELIVERABLES: (1) Slide-by-slide outline with key messages for each slide; (2) Narrative arc showing how each slide connects to overall story; (3) Audience engagement strategy indicating where interactive elements or questions work best; (4) Visual content suggestions for each slide; (5) Transition notes showing logical flow between concepts. Present as a detailed presentation blueprint.

prompts.title: Slide Content Builder
prompts.prompt_text: You are a presentation copywriter specializing in concise, impactful slide content. For the slide titled [paste it here], create comprehensive written content that maintains clarity while maximizing information density. DELIVERABLES: (1) 3-5 focused bullet points supporting the main idea; (2) Specific, concrete examples illustrating each point; (3) Clear, conversational explanations avoiding jargon; (4) Supporting statistics or evidence if applicable; (5) Speaker notes extending the written content. Format as ready-to-use slide content that speaks clearly without reading word-for-word.

prompts.title: Visual Layout Suggestions
prompts.prompt_text: You are a presentation design consultant specializing in visual impact and audience engagement. Review this slide content [paste slide content] and recommend layout, visual assets, and design elements that amplify the message and maintain audience attention. DELIVERABLES: (1) Specific layout recommendations with spatial hierarchy; (2) Icon and infographic concepts reinforcing key points; (3) Color and typography suggestions supporting message tone; (4) Visual balance and composition guidance; (5) Design differentiators making this slide stand out. Provide actionable design direction with justification for each recommendation.

prompts.title: Story-Driven Hook
prompts.prompt_text: You are a storytelling specialist and narrative hook expert. Your task is to write a powerful opening story or hook for a presentation about [insert topic] that grabs attention and creates emotional connection. DELIVERABLES: (1) Compelling opening story or hook; (2) Emotional resonance and relevance to topic; (3) Transition to main content; (4) Audience engagement notes. FORMAT: Story/hook script with delivery guidance.

prompts.title: Stats and Data Pull
prompts.prompt_text: You are a research and evidence strategist. I'm making this claim: [insert claim]. Find compelling statistics, research findings, and facts that support this position. Provide: (1) Specific data points with sources, (2) How to present each one persuasively without misrepresenting, (3) Where data is weak or contested, (4) Counterarguments you'd likely face. Ensure all evidence is legitimate and presented honestly. Format: Evidence list with sources, persuasive framing guidance, limitations, and anticipated counterarguments.

prompts.title: Slide Script Assistant
prompts.prompt_text: You are a presentation coach and speaking script specialist who creates natural, confident delivery scripts from visual presentations. For this slide deck [describe it], create a complete speaker script that sounds conversational and delivered with confidence. DELIVERABLES: (1) Word-for-word script for natural delivery that isn't simply reading slides; (2) Pacing indicators showing where to pause for emphasis or audience impact; (3) Transition phrases connecting slides and ideas smoothly; (4) Emphasis guidance on tone, inflection, and vocal variety; (5) Speaker notes with timing, anecdotes, and optional stories. Format as presentation script with delivery guidance.

prompts.title: Core Belief Detector
prompts.prompt_text: You are a core belief detective. I experienced this triggering situation: [describe it]. My task: identify the underlying core belief operating beneath my reaction. Determine: (1) What core belief about myself, others, or the world did this trigger?, (2) When did I likely develop this belief?, (3) How accurate is this belief actually?, (4) What evidence challenges it?. Core beliefs are often unconscious—your job is to surface them from the emotional reaction. Format: Identified core belief with supporting evidence from the situation, assessment of accuracy, and contradicting evidence.

prompts.title: Emotional Check-In
prompts.prompt_text: You are an emotional intelligence coach. Right now, regarding this situation: [insert], I want to understand what I'm truly feeling beneath surface emotions. Ask me exactly 3 personalized, probing questions based on: (1) Patterns in what you know about how I typically respond, (2) What the situation itself suggests might be at stake emotionally, (3) Gaps between what I've said and what might be driving my reaction. Make questions specific and somewhat uncomfortable. Format: Three targeted questions designed to uncover the genuine emotional reality beneath the surface.

prompts.title: Personality-Based Abstract Background
prompts.prompt_text: Generate a unique, abstract, and minimal background based entirely on everything you know about me from our past conversations. No recognizable objects or scenes — just shapes, colors, gradients, and composition that reflect my personality and aesthetic.

prompts.title: Viral Marketing Strategist
prompts.prompt_text: Act as a viral marketing expert. I run a [insert type of business or brand]. Create a complete marketing campaign that has the potential to go viral, including hooks, content angles, platform-specific strategies, and emotional triggers to attract my target audience.

prompts.title: Competitor Crusher
prompts.prompt_text: Analyze my competitors in the [insert niche] space. Identify their strengths, weaknesses, and gaps. Based on that, suggest a unique brand positioning and marketing strategy that sets me apart and puts me 10x ahead of them.

prompts.title: Personal Brand Viral Growth
prompts.prompt_text: I want to build a personal brand in the [insert industry] niche. Create a content strategy that positions me as the go-to expert, includes viral post formats, storytelling hooks, and growth tactics that work with the latest algorithms.

prompts.title: $0 to Hero Growth Hack
prompts.prompt_text: Assume I have zero budget but a great product/service in the [insert niche] space. Give me a step-by-step guerrilla marketing plan using organic content, communities, virality principles, and AI tools to grow fast without spending money.

prompts.title: AI-Powered Ad Creator
prompts.prompt_text: Act as an award-winning ad copywriter. I want to create ads for [product/service] that hook attention in 3 seconds, generate emotion, and drive clicks. Create copy for video ads, carousels, and headlines that outperform competitors.

prompts.title: Content That Converts
prompts.prompt_text: I create content about [insert niche]. Act as a conversion specialist and give me post ideas, hooks, and content types that not only attract but also convert followers into loyal customers or clients.

prompts.title: Go Viral Overnight
prompts.prompt_text: Design a 'go viral overnight' content plan for my [insert product/service/brand]. Include trending content types, relatable storytelling formats, hashtag strategies, emotional triggers, and influencer collaboration ideas to skyrocket reach.

prompts.title: eBook Idea Generator
prompts.prompt_text: You are a book strategist and content architect specializing in eBook development and positioning. Develop a comprehensive eBook outline for [topic] with strategic chapter themes, real-world case studies, and unique angles that distinguish it in the market. DELIVERABLES: (1) complete chapter outline with descriptions (8-10 chapters); (2) 3-5 real-world case study angles; (3) unique positioning and competitive differentiation; (4) launch and monetization strategy. Output as a detailed eBook blueprint with chapter breakdown, case study concepts, and go-to-market plan.

prompts.title: Deep Comparison Analysis
prompts.prompt_text: You are a comparative analysis expert. Provide a thorough comparison and contrast of [concept 1] and [concept 2]. Break down: (1) Defining characteristics of each, (2) Core differences in how they function or manifest, (3) Surprising similarities, (4) Hybrid applications combining both, (5) Real-world scenarios where each excels. Create frameworks showing how they relate and diverge. Format: Comprehensive comparison with defining characteristics, difference matrix, similarities, hybrid applications, and contextual use cases.

prompts.title: Learn from Mistakes
prompts.prompt_text: You are a learning analyst and mistake-to-mastery specialist focused on accelerated learning through error analysis. Analyze a mistake made while learning [skill] to extract the learning and provide specific corrections and prevention strategies. DELIVERABLES: (1) detailed mistake analysis (what happened and why); (2) root cause identification; (3) specific correction strategies; (4) prevention tactics for future learning. Output as a learning analysis document with clear recommendations.

prompts.title: Hidden Skills Audit
prompts.prompt_text:
You are a business strategist and advisor. Your task:

Input:
- Business focus: [BUSINESS_TYPE]
- Target market: [TARGET_MARKET]
- Current situation: [CURRENT_SITUATION]
- Goal: [SPECIFIC_GOAL]

Provide:
1. Situation analysis
2. Strategic recommendations (3-5 key actions)
3. Implementation timeline
4. Expected outcomes and metrics
5. Common pitfalls to avoid
6. Tools and resources needed

Format: Structured, actionable plan with specific next steps.

prompts.title: Micro Product Builder

prompts.title: Be Direct and Clear (GPT-4.1 Tip)
prompts.prompt_text: GPT-4.1 follows instructions literally, say exactly what you want. Be specific. Vague prompts = vague answers. A single sentence firmly and unequivocally clarifying your desired behavior is almost always sufficient to steer the model on course.

prompts.title: Use Agent Mode for Tasks (GPT-4.1 Tip)
prompts.prompt_text: Tell it to keep going: 'Keep solving the task until it's done. Don't stop early.' Tell it to use tools: 'If you don't know something, use your tools — don't guess.' Optional: Tell it to plan: 'Think step by step before using tools and after.'

prompts.title: Ask for Better Thinking (GPT-4.1 Tip)
prompts.prompt_text: You are an AI interaction specialist teaching advanced prompting techniques for enhanced reasoning and problem-solving. Your expertise involves enabling AI models to think through problems more deliberately and thoroughly. DELIVERABLES: (1) Explanation of why explicit thinking protocols improve results; (2) Step-by-step thinking prompts you can apply immediately; (3) Examples showing difference between direct and step-by-step approaches; (4) Best practices for different problem types; (5) Advanced thinking-aloud techniques. OUTPUT: Educational guide with clear before/after examples. Teach step-by-step thinking methods for complex reasoning

prompts.title: Handling Long Docs (GPT-4.1 Tip)
prompts.prompt_text: GPT-4.1 can understand long messages well. Add instructions at the start and end of long texts. Say if it should only use the text or also use what it knows. Place instructions both above and below provided context for best results.

prompts.title: Chain-of-Thought Prompts (GPT-4.1 Tip)
prompts.prompt_text: Use structured reasoning: break it into steps like — 1. Understand the query, 2. Analyze each document's relevance, 3. Decide based on the most relevant info. Example: 'First, break down what the question is asking. Then list needed documents. Then summarize answers.'

prompts.title: Nail Instruction Following (GPT-4.1 Tip)
prompts.prompt_text: Make a clear Instructions section. Use bullet points and ordered lists. Add real examples for tricky behaviors. If something's wrong, check for: conflicting instructions, missing examples, too much or too little detail.

prompts.title: For Tools, Use API Fields (GPT-4.1 Tip)
prompts.prompt_text: Add tools using the proper API tools field (don't stuff them into the prompt). Name tools clearly, add short but clear descriptions. Add usage examples at the end of the prompt, not inside the description.

prompts.title: Format Tips (GPT-4.1 Tip)
prompts.prompt_text: Use Markdown for sections and lists. Use XML or structured formats for lots of documents. Example: <doc id=1 title='Guide'>This is the content</doc>. Avoid JSON for huge inputs, it performs worse for long content.

prompts.title: Common Pitfalls to Avoid (GPT-4.1 Tip)
prompts.prompt_text: Tool misuse: Model might call a tool without enough info. Fix: 'Ask for missing info before using tool.' Repetition: If you give example phrases, it might copy them word-for-word. Fix: 'Vary your responses.' Overexplaining: If it talks too much, ask for concise responses.

prompts.title: Apply Patches Like a Pro (GPT-4.1 Tip)
prompts.prompt_text: You are a code patching specialist and diff expert focused on generating clear, context-rich code changes. Your expertise includes optimizing code change communication using V4A format for maximum clarity. DELIVERABLES: (1) Well-structured diff using V4A format showing clear context; (2) Explanation of each change and its purpose; (3) Before and after code sections with sufficient surrounding context; (4) Rationale for changes with impact assessment; (5) Implementation guidance and testing recommendations.
