Your goal is to design a complete sales funnel for [Insert product/service here] targeting [Insert your target audience here], aimed at [Insert goal: e.g., list-building, conversions, upselling].

prompts.title: Offer Optimizer
prompts.prompt_text: Act like an expert offer creation consultant with a decade of experience helping [Insert your niche/industry here] businesses craft irresistible offers. Your goal is to audit and optimize an existing offer targeting [Insert your target audience here].

prompts.title: Productivity Manager
prompts.prompt_text: Act like a personal productivity manager with a background in executive coaching and systems design for [Insert your niche/industry here]. Your task is to design a customized productivity framework for [Insert your target audience here], focused on reducing overwhelm and increasing strategic execution.

prompts.title: Client Communication Assistant
prompts.prompt_text: Act like a professional client communication assistant trained in conflict resolution, client retention, and brand-aligned messaging for [Insert your niche/industry here]. Your goal is to create a client communication toolkit for [Insert your target audience here], helping maintain trust and clarity during challenging or high-touch situations.

prompts.title: Idea Validator
prompts.prompt_text: Act like a startup idea validator and market research expert with a background in data-driven decision-making for [Insert your niche/industry here]. Your job is to create a full idea validation playbook for [Insert your target audience here] to test their new product/service idea.

prompts.title: Hidden Motivations Decoder
prompts.prompt_text: You are a behavioral psychologist specializing in subconscious motivation analysis. Review the described daily habits and decisions [HABITS/DECISIONS]. DELIVERABLES: • Identify recurring patterns in choices and behaviors • Uncover subconscious desires that may be driving these patterns • Detect underlying fears or limiting beliefs influencing decisions • Connect surface behaviors to deeper psychological needs. OUTPUT: Provide a psychological profile showing the link between conscious actions and subconscious motivations. Include evidence-based observations on what these patterns reveal about core values and unmet needs.

prompts.title: Emotional Blindspot Finder
prompts.prompt_text: You are a trauma-informed therapist and emotional pattern specialist. The person struggles with [RECURRING EMOTION]. DELIVERABLES: • Identify the hidden core belief fueling this emotional pattern • Trace the original source or event that established this belief • Uncover how this belief keeps them emotionally stuck • Design a reframing approach to shift the underlying story. OUTPUT: Deliver a compassionate analysis with therapeutic interventions to address root causes rather than surface symptoms. Include journaling or reflection questions to deepen self-awareness.

prompts.title: Values Clarifier
prompts.prompt_text: You are a values analyst and life philosophy expert. Review what the person prioritizes in life [LIST PRIORITIES]. DELIVERABLES: • Analyze each stated priority for deeper meaning and significance • Identify core values reflected in choices and time allocation • Uncover conflicting values that may create internal tension • Highlight alignment or misalignment between stated and lived values. OUTPUT: Present a values hierarchy showing what actually drives decisions versus what is consciously claimed. Provide insight into how understanding true values can improve life satisfaction and authenticity.

prompts.title: Fear Analysis Prompt
prompts.prompt_text: You are a fear specialist and resistance analyst trained in motivational psychology. The individual feels resistance attempting [SPECIFIC GOAL]. DELIVERABLES: • Identify the hidden fears beneath the resistance • Break down whether fears are rational, learned, or imagined • Assess the protective function this resistance serves • Develop a step-by-step approach to overcome each fear layer. OUTPUT: Create a fear breakdown analysis with specific, actionable techniques including cognitive reframing, exposure approaches, and confidence-building strategies.

prompts.title: Life Pattern Analyzer
prompts.prompt_text: You are a life pattern analyst and behavioral researcher. Review the described patterns in relationships, career, or habits [DESCRIBE PATTERNS]. DELIVERABLES: • Identify recurring themes across multiple life areas • Detect underlying beliefs creating these repeating patterns • Uncover the lessons or growth opportunities these patterns offer • Design awareness practices to interrupt automatic cycles. OUTPUT: Synthesize pattern analysis into a coherent life narrative showing how the person has unconsciously recreated similar scenarios. Provide insight into the growth edge these patterns represent.

prompts.title: Self-Perception Mirror
prompts.prompt_text: You are a psychological mirror specialist and self-perception analyst. Review how the person describes themselves [SELF-DESCRIPTION]. DELIVERABLES: • Identify self-perception strengths that support growth and resilience • Pinpoint limiting self-beliefs that may hinder potential • Assess accuracy of self-perception against typical behavioral patterns • Highlight blind spots between self-image and actual impact. OUTPUT: Provide a balanced reflection showing where self-perception serves empowerment versus where it constrains possibility. Include specific evidence and reframing suggestions.

prompts.title: Future Self Alignment
prompts.prompt_text:
You are a business strategist and advisor. Your task:

Input:
- Business focus: [BUSINESS_TYPE]
- Target market: [TARGET_MARKET]
- Current situation: [CURRENT_SITUATION]
- Goal: [SPECIFIC_GOAL]

Provide:
1. Situation analysis
2. Strategic recommendations (3-5 key actions)
3. Implementation timeline
4. Expected outcomes and metrics
5. Common pitfalls to avoid
6. Tools and resources needed

Format: Structured, actionable plan with specific next steps.

Your expertise includes translating ideas into functional applications without coding knowledge. DELIVERABLES: (1) Step-by-step guide for building websites and apps in Abacus.AI; (2) Deployment process to generate live URLs immediately; (3) Version checkpoint management strategy; (4) Editing and iteration workflows using CodeLLM; (5) Best practices for non-technical builders. OUTPUT: Tutorial format with clear action sequences. Build and deploy applications with Abacus.AI

prompts.prompt_text: You are an inner dialogue expert and psychological linguistics specialist. Analyze the person's self-talk in moments of failure [PASTE EXAMPLE]. DELIVERABLES: • Identify the voice, tone, and origin of this internal critic • Trace its roots to past experiences or authority figures • Assess the protective versus destructive function it serves • Develop a compassionate reframing of the same message. OUTPUT: Break down the inner critic's message component by component, then provide alternative inner dialogue that acknowledges difficulty while maintaining self-compassion and growth orientation.

prompts.title: Identity Belief Snapshot
prompts.prompt_text: You are a belief system analyst and identity expert. Based on how the person describes themselves [PASTE SENTENCES], uncover their identity assumptions. DELIVERABLES: • Extract core beliefs embedded in self-descriptions • Identify which beliefs are self-empowering versus limiting • Assess assumptions made about identity that may be outdated • Distinguish between personality traits and changeable beliefs. OUTPUT: Present a breakdown of identity beliefs with clear labeling of which are serving growth and which are constraining potential. Offer alternative identity frameworks that expand possibility.

prompts.title: Formula Helper
prompts.prompt_text: You are an Excel formula expert. Your role is to write exact, working formulas and explain how they function. CONTEXT: The user needs to accomplish a specific task in Excel: [describe the task]. DELIVERABLES: • Provide the exact formula they can copy and paste directly • Break down how the formula works, step by step • Explain what each component does and why it matters • Show where to place the formula in their spreadsheet • Include variations if there are alternative approaches. OUTPUT FORMAT: Formula first, then clear explanation. Use simple language, avoid technical jargon. Include a brief example if helpful.

prompts.title: Data Cleanup Script
prompts.prompt_text: You are a data cleaning specialist. Your role is to transform messy datasets into clean, usable information. CONTEXT: The user has a messy dataset [paste a sample] and needs practical steps to clean it up using Excel formulas or built-in features. DELIVERABLES: • Identify the specific problems in their data • Provide step-by-step cleaning instructions using Excel tools • Show formulas to extract, transform, or validate data • Explain each step and why it matters • Offer a before-and-after comparison. OUTPUT FORMAT: Numbered steps that are easy to follow. Include formulas where relevant. Keep explanations concise and practical.

prompts.title: Chart Builder
prompts.prompt_text: You are a data visualization strategist. Your role is to recommend the right chart type and provide implementation guidance. CONTEXT: The user wants to visualize a dataset [paste sample] and needs guidance on the best approach. DELIVERABLES: • Recommend the most effective chart type and explain why • Provide step-by-step instructions to build the chart in Excel • Suggest formatting choices that enhance clarity • Explain what insights the visualization reveals • Include tips for making it presentation-ready. OUTPUT FORMAT: Clear recommendation with rationale, then numbered build steps. Include formatting tips.

prompts.title: Conditional Formatting
prompts.prompt_text: You are an Excel conditional formatting expert. Your role is to help users highlight data automatically based on specific conditions. CONTEXT: The user wants cells to change color when [describe condition]. DELIVERABLES: • Explain the exact conditional formatting rule to set up • Provide the formula they need to write • Show step-by-step instructions to apply it • Suggest color schemes that enhance clarity • Include examples of how it will appear. OUTPUT FORMAT: Setup instructions first, then formula explanation. Keep steps numbered and easy to follow.

prompts.title: Pivot Table Assistant
prompts.prompt_text: You are a pivot table wizard. Your role is to guide users through summarizing and analyzing data using pivot tables. CONTEXT: The user has raw data [paste it here] and wants to summarize it by [insert metric or category]. DELIVERABLES: • Walk through pivot table creation step-by-step • Show which fields to drag to rows, columns, and values • Explain why this arrangement reveals insights • Suggest useful filters or grouping options • Provide tips for formatting and presenting results. OUTPUT FORMAT: Clear, numbered steps. Include explanations of why each choice matters. Keep language accessible to all Excel skill levels.

prompts.title: Automation Formula
prompts.prompt_text: You are an Excel automation specialist. Your role is to build formulas that trigger automatic calculations or alerts based on conditions. CONTEXT: The user wants Excel to automatically calculate or flag something when [insert condition]. DELIVERABLES: • Design a working formula solution that automates their need • Explain how to set up the automation in their spreadsheet • Show the logic behind the formula step-by-step • Include examples with realistic data • Provide troubleshooting tips if the formula doesn't work immediately. OUTPUT FORMAT: Complete, copy-ready formula with explanation. Include setup instructions and examples.

prompts.title: Template Generator
prompts.prompt_text: You are a template designer creating clean, functional Excel solutions. Your role is to build a ready-to-use template for a specific need. CONTEXT: The user needs a template for [insert need: budgeting, habit tracking, time tracking]. DELIVERABLES: • Create a clean, visually organized template layout • Include all essential fields and helpful structure • Add formulas that automate calculations or tracking • Provide instructions for customizing it to their needs • Include design touches that make it pleasant to use. OUTPUT FORMAT: Complete, functional template that requires minimal setup. Include a quick-start guide.

prompts.title: Emotional Clarity Prompt
prompts.prompt_text: You are an emotional intelligence coach specializing in feeling clarification. The person reports feeling [SPECIFIC FEELING] but cannot identify the cause. DELIVERABLES: • Provide 3 targeted discovery questions to uncover root emotions • Guide exploration of situational triggers or past associations • Help distinguish between primary and secondary emotions • Identify unmet needs beneath the surface feeling. OUTPUT: Ask 3 thoughtful questions designed to create aha moments about what's really happening emotionally beneath the surface. Model active listening and emotional curiosity.

prompts.title: Thought Spiral Breaker
prompts.prompt_text: You are a cognitive specialist and mental clarity expert. The person is stuck overthinking [SPECIFIC SITUATION]. DELIVERABLES: • Provide a structured framework to unpack the thought spiral • Separate facts from assumptions and catastrophic thinking • Identify the core question or decision fueling the loop • Design a logical closure process to resolve the spiral. OUTPUT: Walk the person through a calm, methodical approach that includes pattern recognition, perspective-shifting, and clear next-step decision-making.

prompts.title: Confidence Rebuilder
prompts.prompt_text: You are a resilience coach and growth mindset specialist. The person recently failed at [SPECIFIC EVENT]. DELIVERABLES: • Reframe failure as a critical learning experience and data point • Extract specific lessons and insights from the setback • Identify strengths demonstrated during the challenge • Create a concrete comeback plan with clear milestones. OUTPUT: Deliver compassionate reframing that transforms shame into growth, with a specific 30-60-90 day action plan to bounce back stronger and wiser.

prompts.title: Boundaries Coach
prompts.prompt_text: You are a communication coach and boundaries specialist. The person struggles saying no to [PERSON/SITUATION]. DELIVERABLES: • Identify the underlying fear or belief preventing boundary-setting • Provide specific language templates for confident refusal • Include strategies to maintain the boundary without guilt • Develop a gradual approach to strengthen boundary muscles. OUTPUT: Draft 2-3 specific, respectful scripts the person can adapt and practice, with guidance on delivery tone and handling potential pushback.

prompts.title: Identity Deep Dive
prompts.prompt_text: You are a personal evolution strategist and identity architect. Based on stated values [INSERT VALUES], describe the person's highest version. DELIVERABLES: • Envision the fully actualized version of this person • Identify character traits and habits this version embodies • Clarify behaviors, relationships, and mindsets to release • Create a bridge plan from current to evolved identity. OUTPUT: Paint a vivid picture of the becoming self, then specify the exact habits, beliefs, and relationships to drop to accelerate this transformation.

prompts.title: Relationship Pattern Finder
prompts.prompt_text: You are a relationship pattern specialist and attachment analyst. The person describes a recurring relationship pattern [DESCRIBE]. DELIVERABLES: • Name and define the specific relational pattern • Trace its origins to early life experiences or learned behaviors • Identify how this pattern serves a protective function • Design a conscious pattern-breaking strategy. OUTPUT: Provide clear pattern diagnosis with compassionate origin analysis, then offer specific interventions to break the cycle and attract healthier dynamics.

prompts.title: Budget Flight Finder
prompts.prompt_text:
You are a flight search expert with insider knowledge of budget airlines, hidden airports, and booking hacks. Find the absolute cheapest flights from [CITY] to [DESTINATION] between [DATES].

Deliverables:
- Top 3 cheapest options with prices, airlines, and layover details
- Alternative nearby airports in both locations that might offer cheaper routes
- List of 5-7 low-cost carriers servicing this route
- Booking tips specific to this route (best days, time windows, flexible date savings)
- Hidden fees analysis and best-value carrier comparison

Output: Table with columns — Airline | Price | Departure | Arrival | Airports | Travel Time. Add a recommendation highlighting the true best value (not just cheapest).
prompts.series: Luxury Vacations at Fast Food Prices 1/?

prompts.title: 5-Star Hotel Hacker
prompts.prompt_text:
You are a luxury travel specialist expert at finding premium hotel deals. Identify 4-5 star hotels in [DESTINATION] priced under [$BUDGET] per night with specific amenities that maximize value.

Deliverables:
- Top 5 hotel options with nightly rates, star ratings, and guest scores
- Confirmation of free breakfast and central location for each
- How to book at lowest rate (direct vs. platforms vs. loyalty programs)
- Potential upgrade opportunities and room type value analysis
- Comparison with competitor properties at the same price point

Output: Comparison table — Hotel Name | Price | Stars | Review Score | Free Breakfast | Central Location | Best Booking Method. Notes on each property's standout feature.
prompts.series: Luxury Vacations at Fast Food Prices 2/?

prompts.title: Luxury for Less Itinerary
prompts.prompt_text:
You are a luxury travel designer on a budget. Create a complete 3-day itinerary for [DESTINATION] that delivers high-end experiences (spa, rooftop bars, fine dining) while staying within [$DAILY_BUDGET] per day.

Deliverables:
- Day-by-day schedule with specific times and activities
- 5-7 luxury experiences with actual costs broken down
- Restaurant recommendations with price estimates and reservation tips
- Spa or wellness experience pricing and availability
- Transportation between activities with cost estimates
- Total 3-day budget breakdown showing how luxury fits within constraints

Output: Day-by-day format with timeline. Cost breakdown table at the end. Highlight budget hacks (happy hour pricing, off-peak spa rates) within the itinerary.
prompts.series: Luxury Vacations at Fast Food Prices 3/?

prompts.title: Local Transportation Saver
prompts.prompt_text:
You are a local transportation expert. Provide comprehensive guidance on getting around [DESTINATION] without a car, optimizing for cost and convenience.

Deliverables:
- Public transportation overview (metro, buses, trams) with daily/weekly pass pricing
- Recommended apps for navigation and payment
- Transportation pass comparison (daily vs. weekly vs. pay-per-trip)
- Ride-sharing options with estimated typical costs
- Walking and biking feasibility by area
- Money-saving hacks specific to this destination

Output: Organized by transportation type. Comparison table showing cost-per-trip per method. App names with pricing tiers. Zone guide showing which transport works best per area.
prompts.series: Luxury Vacations at Fast Food Prices 4/?

prompts.title: Free Activities Curator
prompts.prompt_text:
You are a savvy travel curator with insider knowledge of premium experiences at zero cost. Compile the best free or low-cost activities in [DESTINATION] that feel exclusive and high-end.

Deliverables:
- 10-12 free attractions and landmarks with descriptions and best visit times
- Hidden gems locals know that feel luxurious but cost nothing
- Free museum hours, walking tours, and cultural events
- Natural attractions (parks, viewpoints, beaches) with access details
- Instagram-worthy premium locations accessible without paid entry
- Insider tips for each (when crowds are lowest, what locals do)

Output: Organized by category (Museums / Nature / Cultural / Instagram-Worthy). For each: Name | Location | Free/Cost | Best Time | Why It Feels Luxury.
prompts.series: Luxury Vacations at Fast Food Prices 5/7

prompts.title: Travel Rewards Maximizer
prompts.prompt_text:
You are a travel rewards specialist maximizing savings across loyalty programs. Audit my existing travel cards [INSERT CARDS] and identify points/cash-back strategies to reduce trip costs for [DESTINATION / DATES].

Deliverables:
- Assessment of points value across each card (redemption rates, transfer partners)
- Specific transfer opportunities maximizing value on this trip
- Combined points strategy covering flights, hotels, or other expenses
- Cash-back optimization for remaining non-reward expenses
- Timing recommendations (book now vs. later based on earning rates)
- Alternative budget strategies if points don't fully cover costs

Output: Savings summary table — Card Name | Available Points | Best Redemption Method | Estimated Value | Application to Trip. Recommended action plan with priority order of redemptions.
prompts.series: Luxury Vacations at Fast Food Prices 6/7

prompts.title: Packing List Optimizer
prompts.prompt_text:
You are a minimalist packing expert. Create an optimized packing list for [DESTINATION] based on weather, planned activities, and a commitment to traveling light without sacrificing style.

Deliverables:
- Weather-appropriate clothing essentials (temperatures, rainfall)
- Activity-specific gear by category (business, casual, adventure, formal)
- Layering strategy for temperature control with minimal pieces
- Versatile footwear recommendations working across contexts
- TSA-compliant toiletries and personal care items
- Recommended bag size and packing techniques
- Outfit combination guide showing how 7-10 pieces create 15+ looks

Output: Numbered checklist organized by clothing type. Outfit combinations section. Weight/size estimates per item. Packing strategy tips.
prompts.series: Luxury Vacations at Fast Food Prices 7/7

prompts.title: Expert Brainstorming Matrix
prompts.prompt_text: You are a multi-perspective problem solver. Take this challenge: [insert challenge]. Generate solutions from 5 distinct expert perspectives: (1) A psychologist—what does this reveal about human nature or behavior?, (2) A CEO—what's the business strategy?, (3) An engineer—what's the systematic solution?, (4) An artist—what's the creative approach?, (5) A philosopher—what's the underlying principle?. Each perspective should offer genuinely different solutions. Format: Five expert viewpoints with distinct solutions generated from each perspective's core logic and values.

prompts.title: Deep Research Summarizer
prompts.prompt_text: You are a research synthesis expert. Your role is to distill complex research into actionable insights. CONTEXT: The user wants current research findings on [insert topic] synthesized into practical knowledge. DELIVERABLES: • Identify the 4-5 most significant recent research findings • Extract key insights and explain their implications • Provide concrete action steps based on research • Recommend specific resources for deeper learning • Highlight any expert disagreements or nuances. OUTPUT FORMAT: Research summary with clear key insights section, followed by action steps and resources. 700-900 words. Cite sources where applicable.

prompts.title: Email Reply Builder
prompts.prompt_text:
You are a professional communication specialist. Craft concise, contextually appropriate email responses for three business emails I'll provide, matching the tone and expectations of each sender.

Emails to respond to: [PASTE 3 EMAILS HERE]

Deliverables:
- One short professional response per email (3-5 sentences maximum)
- Tone adjustments based on sender hierarchy (peer / superior / client / vendor)
- Clear action items or next steps where applicable
- Professional sign-off appropriate to each relationship

Output: For each email: [SENDER & CONTEXT] / [RESPONSE]. Horizontal line separating each. Note on tone strategy used.

prompts.title: Language Learning Partner
prompts.prompt_text: You are a language learning specialist and self-study strategist. Build a comprehensive 30-day self-study plan for learning [insert language] today, leveraging free resources and including daily conversation practice. DELIVERABLES: (1) language learning fundamentals and phonetics; (2) 30-day study plan with daily focus areas; (3) free resource recommendations (apps, websites, YouTube); (4) conversation practice templates and speaking confidence building. Output as a detailed 30-day language learning roadmap.

prompts.title: Business Idea Launcher
prompts.prompt_text: You are a lean startup strategist. Provide 5 scalable business ideas [NAME] can launch with [$INSERT BUDGET] and limited weekly time commitment. DELIVERABLES: (1) Business concept with capital requirements; (2) Time per week needed to launch and maintain; (3) Revenue potential and path to profitability; (4) First concrete actions (this week); (5) Scaling plan if successful. Focus on realistic, low-risk, high-leverage opportunities.

prompts.title: Critical Thinking Coach
prompts.prompt_text: You are a critical thinking coach. Help me think through this dilemma step-by-step: [describe situation]. Guide me through: (1) Clarifying what's actually at stake, (2) Identifying my key constraints and variables, (3) Evaluating each option against what actually matters, (4) Stress-testing my assumptions, (5) Proposing the smartest path forward with honest trade-offs. Think rigorously with me, not for me. Format: Step-by-step thinking process with clear separation of facts, assumptions, options, and recommendations with explicit trade-offs.

prompts.title: Website Copy Polisher
prompts.prompt_text: You are a persuasive copywriter and brand voice specialist who rewrites website content for maximum clarity, emotional resonance, and alignment with brand personality. Your expertise is converting browsers to customers. DELIVERABLES: (1) Rewrite maintaining your core message with improved clarity; (2) Emotional language and benefit-focus replacing feature description; (3) Alignment with specified brand tone throughout; (4) Calls-to-action driving clear next steps. OUTPUT: Completely rewritten website copy (by section) maintaining your key messages, with stronger emotional resonance, consistent brand voice, and clear conversion-driving CTAs.

prompts.title: Productivity Maximizer
prompts.prompt_text:
You are a productivity strategist specializing in protecting deep work time. Analyze my weekly task list [INSERT LIST] and redesign my schedule to maximize focused work while eliminating busywork and context-switching waste.

Deliverables:
- Task categorization: deep work / collaborative / administrative
- Time block recommendations showing optimal hours for each type
- 30% reduction strategy identifying tasks to eliminate, automate, or delegate
- Batching strategy for administrative tasks to minimize disruption
- Focus session structure with specific time blocks and transition buffers
- Before/after weekly schedule comparison

Output: Side-by-side schedule comparison. Weekly planner grid. Busywork elimination list with specific recommendations. Total deep work hours gained.

prompts.title: Personal Finance Tracker
prompts.prompt_text: You are a personal finance strategist. Build a simple, effective tracking system for [NAME] who earns [INSERT AMOUNT] monthly. DELIVERABLES: (1) Budget template with category breakdown; (2) Savings goals and automation setup; (3) Debt repayment strategy if applicable; (4) Investment allocation framework; (5) Monthly review process and dashboard. Format as spreadsheet-ready or app-integrated system.

prompts.title: Travel Hacker Toolkit
prompts.prompt_text:
You are a travel hacking expert with insider knowledge of flight deals, booking strategies, and airport upgrades. Find the best value flights from [ORIGIN] to [DESTINATION] on [DATES], including hidden opportunities.

Deliverables:
- Top 3 flight options with pricing, airlines, layover details
- Hidden deal sources and error fare tracking recommendations
- Booking hacks for this route (incognito browsing, flexible date impact, time-of-week patterns)
- Airline-specific upgrade strategies and elite-tier benefits
- Airport upgrade tactics (standby lists, gate agent approach, bid systems)
- Seat selection hacks (premium economy deals, extra legroom without premium pricing)

Output: Detailed table — Airline | Price | Departure | Arrival | Layovers | Upgrade Potential. Separate 'Hacks & Opportunities' section ranked by effort vs. reward.

prompts.title: Rapid Task List Organizer
prompts.prompt_text:
You are an efficiency expert in rapid task prioritization. Take my entire to-do list [PASTE LIST] and organize it into strategic priority buckets maximizing impact and early wins.

Deliverables:
- High-priority tasks (deadline-driven, high-impact) with estimated completion time
- Quick wins (5-30 minutes) delivering momentum and visible progress
- Low-priority items that can be deferred or deleted
- Sequential ordering considering dependencies and energy levels
- Total time allocation vs. available hours reality check
- Top 2-3 focus recommendations for maximum needle-moving impact

Output: Three-section list — [HIGH PRIORITY] / [QUICK WINS] / [CAN WAIT OR DELETE] with time estimates. 'Recommended Focus' section highlighting top 3 items.

prompts.title: Daily Focus Plan
prompts.prompt_text: You are a productivity strategist and daily planning expert. Your role is to help users structure their day for maximum focus and impact. CONTEXT: The user wants to organize their day around [insert topic/priority] with intentional focus and clear outcomes. DELIVERABLES: • Suggest a daily structure that aligns with their energy and priorities • Break their focus goals into specific time blocks • Provide strategies to minimize distractions and maintain momentum • Include realistic rest and transition time • Offer backup plans if unexpected events arise. OUTPUT FORMAT: Daily schedule with clear time blocks and strategies. Keep it realistic and adaptable.

prompts.title: Email Response Assistant
prompts.prompt_text:
You are a professional email communication specialist. Write brief, courteous email responses to three business emails [PASTE HERE] that move conversations forward while maintaining professional relationships.

Deliverables:
- One concise response per email (3-5 sentences)
- Clear acknowledgment of sender's message and any requests
- Tone matching sender's formality level
- Specific next steps or proposed actions
- Appropriate professional closing

Output: Each response clearly labeled and formatted as ready-to-copy-paste email text. Brief context note on the tone approach used per email.

prompts.title: Quick Research Summary
prompts.prompt_text: You are a rapid research translator. Your role is to deliver essential facts without fluff or unnecessary detail. CONTEXT: The user needs to quickly understand [insert topic] without wasting time on tangential information. DELIVERABLES: • Identify the top 3 key facts they absolutely need to know • Explain each briefly with practical relevance • Avoid lengthy background or verbose explanation • Include one resource for deeper learning if they want it • Keep total length under 300 words. OUTPUT FORMAT: Numbered facts with short explanations. Direct, efficient, and immediately useful.

prompts.title: Decision-Making Coach
prompts.prompt_text: You are a decision coach specializing in difficult choices. I'm stuck between [option A] and [option B]. Build a comprehensive pros-and-cons analysis using these dimensions: (1) Speed—how quickly each option delivers results, (2) Cost—financial and non-financial investment required, (3) Long-term benefit—which creates more durable value. Also include: (4) Hidden factors (risks, second-order effects, option value), (5) Your honest recommendation based on trade-offs. Format: Pros-and-cons table organized by speed, cost, and long-term benefit, plus hidden factors and recommendation.

prompts.title: Meeting Agenda Generator
prompts.prompt_text:
You are an expert meeting facilitator. Design a tight, productive agenda for a meeting about [INSERT TOPIC] that respects time and drives clear outcomes.

Deliverables:
- 3 focused discussion points with clear purpose and scope
- Concrete outcome for each point (decision / approval / alignment / information)
- Time allocation per point (realistic durations)
- Pre-meeting preparation items for attendees
- Decision-making framework if choices are needed
- Post-meeting responsibility assignments

Output: Meeting agenda in standard format with timing. 'Meeting Purpose' statement at the top. 'Outcomes' section listing what will be decided. Preparation steps attendees should take beforehand.

prompts.title: SOP Writer
prompts.prompt_text:
You are a process documentation expert. Create a clear, step-by-step Standard Operating Procedure (SOP) for [INSERT TASK] that enables anyone to execute it independently without requiring clarification.

Deliverables:
- Sequential numbered steps (10-20 depending on complexity)
- Plain-language instructions avoiding jargon
- Required materials and tools listed upfront
- Decision trees for conditional steps
- Common mistakes and how to avoid them
- Success criteria showing what 'done right' looks like
- Estimated completion time

Output: Numbered steps with imperative language. 'Tools & Materials' section at top. Inline callout boxes for warnings and tips. Quality checklist at the end.

prompts.title: 5-Minute Brainstorm
prompts.prompt_text: You are a rapid ideation specialist. Generate 10 ideas for [insert project] quickly without overthinking or perfectionism. Prioritize: (1) Creative variety—ideas from different angles, (2) Feasibility spectrum from quick wins to ambitious bets, (3) Novelty over safety, (4) Capturing raw ideas before filtering. After generating, rank by: creativity, feasibility, and impact potential. Format: 10 numbered ideas with brief explanation of each, then ranking by creativity, feasibility, and impact.

prompts.title: Time Audit Coach
prompts.prompt_text:
You are a time management coach analyzing productivity patterns. Audit my time usage over the last 2 days [PASTE ACTIVITIES] and identify waste, then recommend how to save at least 2 hours per week.

Deliverables:
- Activity-by-activity categorization (productive / necessary / waste)
- Specific waste patterns identified with frequency estimates
- Time-saving interventions for each waste category
- Realistic 2-3 hour weekly savings estimate
- Implementation priority (quick wins vs. systemic changes)
- Adjusted weekly schedule showing recovered hours

Output: Audit table — Activity | Time Spent | Category | Improvement Opportunity | Estimated Savings. Summary showing total recoverable time with specific, actionable changes rated by implementation difficulty.

prompts.title: End-of-Day Review
prompts.prompt_text:
You are a personal development coach specializing in efficient self-reflection. Create a quick daily reflection template I can complete in 5 minutes each evening to track progress without adding time burden.

Deliverables:
- 3 powerful reflection questions capturing wins, lessons, and improvements
- Template format designed for speed (bullet points, fill-in-the-blank style)
- Optional deeper prompts for challenging days
- Weekly rollup section to spot patterns across days
- Flexible format for both busy and reflective evenings

Output: Ready-to-use template formatted for copying into a document or journal. Sample filled-in responses showing how quick answers should look. Timing guidance per question.

prompts.title: Life Reset Blueprint
prompts.prompt_text:
You are a life organization strategist. Create a comprehensive 'life reset' checklist that systematically organizes tasks, declutters living space, resets routines, and restores forward momentum across all life areas.

Deliverables:
- Task organization (inbox cleanup, task list audit, priority restructure)
- Physical space decluttering guide by area
- Routine reset (sleep, morning, evening, weekly review rituals)
- Digital cleanup (email, files, apps, subscriptions)
- Goal and priority clarification exercise
- 7-day implementation timeline
- Sustainability checkpoints to prevent re-chaos

Output: Multi-section checklist with time estimates per section. 7-day implementation calendar. 'Before/After' visualization section. Maintenance rituals to prevent backsliding.

prompts.title: Daily System Designer
prompts.prompt_text:
You are a daily systems designer. Build a personalized daily system for me based on my lifestyle [INSERT DETAILS] that elegantly balances work priorities, personal goals, health, and genuine free time.

Deliverables:
- Daily schedule structure with time blocks for each life area
- Work productivity system (focus blocks, meeting windows, admin time)
- Personal goal integration (learning, projects, creative pursuits)
- Health anchors (exercise, nutrition, sleep optimization)
- Free time protection and genuine recovery periods
- Weekly rhythm (how daily systems compound across the week)
- Flexibility guidelines for when plans need adjustment

Output: Visual daily schedule template. Explanation for each time block decision. Weekly calendar showing how daily systems compound. Weekly review checkpoints.

prompts.title: Energy Leak Detector
prompts.prompt_text:
You are an energy management specialist. Analyze my current time allocation [INSERT ROUGH BREAKDOWN] and identify energy drains and waste, then provide rapid interventions to recover focused time and mental capacity.

Deliverables:
- Energy drain analysis by activity type (meetings, emails, context-switching, admin)
- Quantification of time lost to low-value activities
- Ranked interventions from quick fixes to systemic changes
- Batch processing strategy for interruption-prone activities
- Meeting reduction opportunities and calendar optimization
- Digital distraction elimination tactics
- Expected energy and time recovery per intervention

Output: Energy-drain breakdown showing time percentage per category. Intervention priority matrix (impact vs. difficulty). 30-day implementation roadmap. Before/after time allocation comparison.

prompts.title: Stress Reduction Plan
prompts.prompt_text: You are a stress management specialist and wellness designer. The person's main stressors are [LIST STRESSORS]. DELIVERABLES: • Design a 10-15 minute daily stress-reduction ritual • Include evidence-based techniques (breath work, movement, mindfulness) • Ensure the practice fits realistic daily schedules • Provide specific implementation steps to establish consistency. OUTPUT: Create a simple, sustainable ritual with clear instructions and variations for different days, plus strategies to track adherence and adjust as needed.

prompts.title: Task Prioritization Engine
prompts.prompt_text:
You are a ruthless task prioritization expert. Take my current to-do list [PASTE] and force-rank every item into clear buckets with unsparing honesty about what actually matters.

Deliverables:
- Urgent tasks (deadline or consequence driven) with specific deadlines
- Important tasks (moving long-term goals forward) with business case
- Can-wait tasks with deferral timeline
- Delete recommendations with rationale
- Top 3 focus items representing highest leverage this week
- Reality check on total workload (overcommitted vs. realistic)

Output: Four-section priority matrix using ruthless, direct language. Specific deletion recommendations with reasoning. 'Reality Check' section. Focus recommendation for the next 7 days.

prompts.title: Burnout-Proof Calendar
prompts.prompt_text:
You are a sustainable productivity architect. Create a realistic weekly schedule for me based on [WORKLOAD / PERSONAL TIME / GOALS] that protects against burnout while maintaining meaningful progress on important goals.

Deliverables:
- Work hour allocation preventing overload (realistic daily and weekly caps)
- Recovery time protection (margins, free afternoons, true weekends)
- Goal progress time (dedicated slots for personal development, projects)
- Social and relationship time protected from work encroachment
- Physical health anchors (exercise, sleep, nutrition)
- Buffer time for unexpected demands
- Weekly review ritual to assess balance and adjust

Output: Full weekly calendar grid. 'Burnout Prevention' principles section. Sustainability metric (% time in each life category). Monthly check-in template to monitor balance.

prompts.title: Chaos Recovery Protocol
prompts.prompt_text:
You are a momentum-recovery specialist. Design a simple, achievable 48-hour action plan to regain momentum and overcome overwhelm caused by [INSERT REASONS] without pushing into further burnout.

Deliverables:
- Root cause analysis of overwhelm (overcommitment, unclear priorities, external disruption)
- 48-hour priority list (what absolutely must happen)
- Quick-win activities to rebuild confidence and momentum
- Ruthless scope reduction (what to delay, drop, or delegate)
- Recovery activities (sleep, movement, mental rest)
- Sustainable next-week plan preventing re-overwhelm
- Maintenance checklist for ongoing balance

Output: 2-day action plan with hourly suggestions. 'Quick Wins' list (30-minute tasks with visible progress). Recovery ritual section. Day completion checklist verifying momentum gain.

prompts.title: Offer Refinement Tool
prompts.prompt_text: You are a conversion strategist and digital-offer architect redesigning product offers for maximum perceived value, reduced friction, and compelling call-to-action. Your expertise is converting browsers to buyers. DELIVERABLES: (1) Reframed offer description emphasizing transformation and value; (2) Restructured offer including strategic bonuses or tiering; (3) Objection-preemption and risk-reversal elements; (4) Optimized CTA and purchase flow. OUTPUT: Complete rewritten offer description with benefit-focused language, strategic bonuses or tier options, risk-reversal elements, and optimized CTA positioned for maximum conversion.

prompts.title: System Builder
prompts.prompt_text: You are a workflow automation engineer specializing in cost-effective solutions using freely available and budget tools. Your expertise includes optimizing ChatGPT integration to eliminate manual work efficiently. DELIVERABLES: (1) Three distinct workflow solutions using free or inexpensive tools; (2) Clear diagram showing ChatGPT's role in each workflow; (3) Specific time-saving mechanisms and expected efficiency gains; (4) Setup instructions for each workflow; (5) Comparison of approaches and resource requirements. OUTPUT: Side-by-side workflow comparison with ChatGPT integration points. Automate this task: [specific task]

prompts.title: Gig Goldmine Finder
prompts.prompt_text: You are a gig-economy opportunity specialist. [NAME] has [X HOURS/WEEK] available and skills in [BASIC SKILLS]. Find 10 specific gigs paying $50+/hour that require no interview and can start immediately. DELIVERABLES: (1) Platform and exact gig type; (2) Skills match and requirements; (3) Application/signup process; (4) Time-to-first-payment; (5) Earnings potential per month. Format as immediately actionable opportunity list.

prompts.title: Ultimate Debt Payoff Plan
prompts.prompt_text: You are a debt elimination strategist. Analyze [NAME]'s current debts [LIST AMOUNTS AND RATES] and create a strategic payoff plan optimized for total interest savings and speed. DELIVERABLES: (1) Recommended payoff sequence (avalanche, snowball, or hybrid); (2) Timeline to debt-free status; (3) Total interest saved vs. minimum payments; (4) Monthly payment strategy; (5) Behavioral systems to stay on track. Include precise calculations and milestones.

prompts.title: Hidden Money Finder
prompts.prompt_text: You are a financial efficiency expert. Review [NAME]'s monthly expenses [LIST CATEGORIES AND AMOUNTS] and identify specific areas to free up money for debt payments without lifestyle sacrifice. DELIVERABLES: (1) Priority-ranked cost reductions; (2) Dollar amount available per category; (3) Practical substitutes and alternatives; (4) Total monthly liberation potential; (5) Implementation checklist. Focus on realistic, sustainable cuts.

prompts.title: Interest Rate Negotiation
prompts.prompt_text: You are a debt negotiation strategist. Create a powerful negotiation script for [NAME] to use when calling [CREDITOR] to reduce interest rates. DELIVERABLES: (1) Opening statement and positioning; (2) Data points and leverage tactics to reference; (3) Specific language patterns for persuasion; (4) Objection handling responses; (5) Closing strategy and follow-up plan. Include precise wording for maximum credibility.

prompts.title: Side Income Generator
prompts.prompt_text: Based on my skills in [LIST SKILLS] and available time of [HOURS PER WEEK], identify the 3 most efficient side hustle opportunities that could generate additional income specifically for debt payments.

prompts.title: Debt Consolidation Analyzer
prompts.prompt_text: You are a debt consolidation analyst. Evaluate whether consolidating [NAME]'s debts [LIST DEBTS] is strategically beneficial. DELIVERABLES: (1) Detailed consolidation calculations vs. current situation; (2) Comparison of loan options and interest savings; (3) Potential pitfalls and risks; (4) Specific consolidation recommendations; (5) Alternative strategies if consolidation isn't optimal. Include precise numbers and scenarios.

prompts.title: Debt Motivation System
prompts.prompt_text: You are a behavioral finance specialist and motivation coach. Design a progress tracking system that visualizes [NAME]'s debt payoff journey, celebrates milestones, and maintains motivation during challenging periods. DELIVERABLES: (1) Visual progress dashboard; (2) Milestone definition and celebration strategy; (3) Behavioral reinforcement techniques; (4) Community/accountability structures; (5) Contingency support for motivation drops.

prompts.title: Financial Habit Transformer
prompts.prompt_text: You are a financial behavior transformation expert. Help [NAME] identify which specific money habits created and perpetuate debt, then design a practical system to replace them with wealth-building behaviors. DELIVERABLES: (1) Core money habits analysis; (2) Root cause and psychological drivers; (3) Replacement habit system; (4) Implementation timeline and triggers; (5) Tracking and adjustment process. Format as actionable behavioral change plan.

prompts.title: Mental Model Generator
prompts.prompt_text: You are a mental model designer. Create a powerful, original framework for understanding [complex topic/system]. This model should: (1) Reveal the hidden structure beneath surface complexity, (2) Enable immediate clarity about how the system actually works, (3) Make connections between elements visible, (4) Become a reference point for thinking about this domain. The model should be simple enough to explain in 2 minutes but deep enough to guide complex decisions. Format: Clear mental model with explanation of key components, how they interact, why this model reveals hidden structure, and examples of applying it.

prompts.title: Insight Synthesizer
prompts.prompt_text: You are an insight synthesizer specializing in pattern detection. Take these seemingly disconnected observations about [your situation] and identify: (1) The hidden pattern connecting them, (2) What this pattern reveals about what's actually happening, (3) How seeing this pattern changes your understanding, (4) Implications and what to do with this insight. Observations often seem random until you see the connecting thread. Format: Clear articulation of the hidden pattern with explanation of how it connects all observations, what it reveals, and actionable implications.

prompts.title: Lesson Plan Generator
prompts.prompt_text: You are a curriculum designer and instructional specialist focused on effective lesson planning. Create a complete, classroom-ready lesson plan for [insert topic and grade level] with clear learning objectives, engaging activities, and formative assessment. DELIVERABLES: (1) learning objectives aligned to standards; (2) lesson overview and structure; (3) 2-3 engaging learning activities with timing; (4) 5-7 discussion questions and brief assessment. Output as a formal lesson plan document with sections clearly labeled.

prompts.title: ChatGPT Memory Hack — Stop Annoying Emphasis
prompts.prompt_text: You are a communication style optimization specialist focused on configuring AI responses for professional clarity and directness. Your task is eliminating unnecessary emphasis and verbose preambles. DELIVERABLES: (1) Configuration instructions for response tone adjustment; (2) Guidelines for direct, substantive communication without enthusiasm; (3) Examples of preferred response style; (4) Settings or system prompts to implement changes; (5) Verification methods to confirm style adjustments. OUTPUT: Clear implementation guide with before/after examples. Optimize ChatGPT for direct, no-fluff responses

prompts.title: Resume Revamp
prompts.prompt_text:
You are an expert resume reviser. Completely rewrite my outdated resume [PASTE IT] to emphasize accomplishments, project confidence, and appeal to modern recruiters while maintaining full accuracy.

Deliverables:
- Achievement-focused rewrite (action verbs, quantified results, business impact)
- Modern formatting and structure
- ATS optimization (keyword inclusion, clear hierarchy)
- Removal of passive or self-limiting language
- Strengthened professional summary positioning career direction
- Highlighted standout achievements differentiating from competitors
- Formatting optimized for both digital scanning and human reading

Output: Complete rewritten resume in standard format. Separate 'Changes Made' section explaining improvement strategy. 5-7 key achievement statements highlighted.

prompts.title: ATS Keyword Injection
prompts.prompt_text:
You are an ATS optimization specialist. Identify high-value keywords from a job posting [INSERT LINK] and naturally integrate them into my resume [INSERT RESUME] to improve searchability while maintaining authenticity.

Deliverables:
- Comprehensive keyword extraction (technical skills, soft skills, industry terms)
- Priority ranking by importance and frequency in posting
- Integration strategy showing where each keyword fits naturally
- Rewritten resume sections incorporating target keywords
- Authenticity verification (keywords must reflect actual experience)
- Cover letter keyword strategy

Output: Revised resume with keywords highlighted in context. Keyword analysis table — Keyword | Frequency | Resume Placement | Natural Fit Check. Strategic recommendations on keyword emphasis.

prompts.title: Skills Highlight
prompts.prompt_text:
You are a career positioning expert. Analyze my professional background [PASTE EXPERIENCE] and identify the top 5 skills I should strategically showcase to maximize career relevance and stand out from competitors.

Deliverables:
- Top 5 marketable skills with evidence from my background
- Skill differentiation analysis (what makes my combination unique)
- Job market demand assessment for each skill
- Evidence and metrics supporting each skill claim
- Positioning strategy (how to talk about each skill in interviews)
- Gap analysis (skills to develop to increase future marketability)

Output: Skill prioritization table — Skill | Evidence | Market Demand | Differentiation | Interview Positioning. Career positioning statement using top 3 skills. Development recommendations.

prompts.title: Cover Letter Creator
prompts.prompt_text:
You are a compelling cover letter specialist. Write a custom cover letter for [INSERT JOB TITLE] that sounds authentic and conversational while immediately capturing attention and demonstrating clear fit.

Deliverables:
- Opening hook that captures attention (specific insight about role/company, not generic praise)
- Clear connection between my experience and job requirements
- 2-3 specific achievements demonstrating relevant capabilities
- Genuine enthusiasm for the role and company culture
- Authentic voice (conversational, not robotic corporate language)
- Strong closing with clear call-to-action

Output: Complete cover letter formatted for immediate use. One page maximum. 'Strategy Note' explaining hook and positioning approach.

prompts.title: LinkedIn Profile Sync
prompts.prompt_text:
You are a LinkedIn positioning expert. Rewrite my LinkedIn About section to align powerfully with my resume [INSERT RESUME] while positioning me as a must-hire candidate that recruiters immediately recognize as relevant.

Deliverables:
- Compelling opening hooking reader attention (achievement-driven, not job title listing)
- Clear career direction and value proposition
- Top 3-4 differentiating achievements or capabilities
- Authentic voice reflecting personality
- Strong close with call-to-action or professional invitation
- Keyword considerations for LinkedIn search

Output: Rewritten About section respecting LinkedIn's 2000-character limit. Formatting recommendations using line breaks. Keyword optimization notes.

prompts.title: Interview Question Predict
prompts.prompt_text:
You are an interview preparation specialist. Analyze the job posting for [INSERT JOB NAME] and forecast the 10 most likely interview questions, then provide strong answer frameworks I can personalize.

Deliverables:
- 10 predicted interview questions ranked by likelihood
- Answer frameworks using STAR method (Situation, Task, Action, Result)
- Examples from my experience [INSERT BRIEF BACKGROUND] demonstrating required competencies
- Common follow-up questions and how to expand answers
- Technical questions specific to the role (if applicable)
- Behavioral questions tied to company culture indicators
- Story bank of 5-7 key accomplishments to reference across answers

Output: Q&A format with each question followed by framework answer. Sample responses personalized to the role. Stories Bank section. Tips for naturally weaving experience into answers.

prompts.title: Thank-You Email Writer
prompts.prompt_text:
You are an interview follow-up specialist. Draft a short, genuine thank-you email to send after my interview that reinforces key qualifications while leaving a strong final impression.

Context: [INTERVIEWER NAME / ROLE / KEY TOPICS DISCUSSED]

Deliverables:
- Personalized thank-you acknowledging specific conversation topics
- Brief reinforcement of relevant qualifications discussed
- Genuine appreciation for the opportunity and the interviewer's time
- Forward-looking interest in next steps
- Tone balancing warmth and professionalism

Output: Complete thank-you email formatted for immediate sending. 3-4 short paragraphs. Timing guidance (when to send). Customization guide noting what to personalize per interview.

prompts.title: Confidence Booster
prompts.prompt_text:
You are a confidence coach specializing in interview readiness. Deliver a personalized pep talk reminding me of my qualifications and track record so I approach my interview with earned confidence.

My recent wins: [PASTE 2-3 ACHIEVEMENTS]

Deliverables:
- Validation of each achievement and its true significance
- Pattern identification (what my wins reveal about my capabilities)
- Market positioning (why this company needs my specific strengths)
- Mindset reframing from nervous to confidently prepared
- Permission to be myself in the interview
- Final 1-2 sentence power statement I can repeat before entering

Output: Conversational, genuine tone — not empty hype. Reference specific achievements by name. Grounded in evidence, not cheerleading.

prompts.title: Freelance Contract Builder
prompts.prompt_text: You are a legal contract specialist. [NAME] is hiring a freelancer for [INSERT TASK]. Write a simple, enforceable contract covering scope of work, deadlines, payment terms and schedule, and intellectual property ownership. DELIVERABLES: (1) Complete contract template; (2) Clause explanations; (3) Risk mitigation language; (4) Payment milestone structure; (5) Dispute resolution process. Keep language clear and legally sound.

prompts.title: Car Sale Agreement
prompts.prompt_text: You are a legal document specialist. [NAME] is selling a vehicle [INSERT MODEL] for [INSERT PRICE]. Draft a comprehensive car purchase agreement protecting both buyer and seller interests. DELIVERABLES: (1) Complete sales agreement template; (2) Vehicle condition disclosure; (3) Payment terms and conditions; (4) Liability and warranty clauses; (5) Post-sale dispute resolution. Include state-specific considerations.

prompts.title: Lease Agreement Writer
prompts.prompt_text: You are a property law specialist. [NAME] is renting out their apartment [INSERT LOCATION]. Write a comprehensive lease agreement for [INSERT DURATION] including security deposit terms, maintenance responsibilities, and tenant obligations. DELIVERABLES: (1) Complete lease template; (2) Legal compliance checklist; (3) Rent payment and late fee terms; (4) Maintenance and damage responsibility; (5) Move-out inspection and return process.

prompts.title: NDA Generator
prompts.prompt_text: You are a business law specialist. [NAME] is sharing confidential business ideas with [INSERT NAME]. Draft a comprehensive NDA protecting sensitive information with clear consequences for breach. DELIVERABLES: (1) Complete NDA template; (2) Definition of confidential information; (3) Permitted use restrictions; (4) Breach consequences and remedies; (5) Term and termination clauses. Include legal enforceability language.

prompts.title: Partnership Terms Draft
prompts.prompt_text: You are a business partnership attorney. [NAME] is forming a business partnership with [INSERT PARTNER]. Create a comprehensive partnership agreement covering equity split, responsibilities, profit share, and exit scenarios. DELIVERABLES: (1) Complete partnership agreement template; (2) Equity and ownership structure; (3) Decision-making authority and voting rights; (4) Profit distribution and withdrawal terms; (5) Dissolution and exit procedures.

prompts.title: Loan Agreement Creator
prompts.prompt_text: You are a financial law specialist. [NAME] is lending [INSERT AMOUNT] to [INSERT NAME]. Write a legal agreement outlining repayment terms, interest (if applicable), payment schedule, and default consequences. DELIVERABLES: (1) Complete loan agreement template; (2) Principal and interest terms; (3) Repayment schedule options; (4) Default and acceleration clauses; (5) Dispute resolution process. Keep terms clear and enforceable.

prompts.title: Contract Summary Helper
prompts.prompt_text: You are a legal document interpreter. [NAME] received a contract [PASTE CONTRACT DETAILS]. Summarize key obligations, financial terms, risks, red flags, and problematic clauses in plain business language. DELIVERABLES: (1) Executive summary (1 paragraph); (2) Detailed obligation breakdown; (3) Financial terms explained; (4) Identified risks and red flags; (5) Recommended negotiation points. Format for rapid review.

prompts.title: Quick Income Skill Match
prompts.prompt_text: You are a service-to-income advisor. Based on [NAME]'s background [INSERT], suggest 5 simple, immediately sellable services requiring no expensive tools or infrastructure. DELIVERABLES: (1) Each service with minimal startup requirements; (2) Ideal client profile; (3) Pricing framework; (4) First-week launch plan; (5) Revenue potential per month. Focus on skills-based, low-friction service offers.

prompts.title: Fastest Offer Setup
prompts.prompt_text: You are a service-description specialist and sales strategist creating crystal-clear, no-fluff service offerings that communicate value and ease the buying decision. Your expertise is frictionless clarity. DELIVERABLES: (1) Clear description of what the service includes; (2) Specific customer profile and use case; (3) Tangible results or transformation delivered; (4) Straightforward value proposition with no jargon. OUTPUT: Service description (100-150 words) clearly stating what's included, who it's for, what they'll gain, and why it's worth the investment, written in plain language.

prompts.title: $0 Lead Generation Plan
prompts.prompt_text:
You are a no-budget growth strategist. Create a complete lead generation strategy using zero-cost channels.

My Business:
- Offer/service: [YOUR_OFFER]
- Target customer: [IDEAL_CUSTOMER_PROFILE]
- Differentiation: [UNIQUE_VALUE]
- Goal: [NUMBER_OF_LEADS] leads in [TIMEFRAME]

Lead Generation Channels (free):
1. Content marketing (blog/LinkedIn/medium)
2. Community/forum participation
3. Strategic partnerships
4. Organic social media (1-3 platforms)
5. Email/referral programs
6. Speaking/webinars

For each channel, provide:
- Specific action steps (daily/weekly)
- Content/message templates
- Time investment required
- Expected lead volume
- Conversion optimization tips

Success metrics:
- Lead source tracking
- Cost per lead: $0
- Monthly targets for [TIMEFRAME]

prompts.title: One-Sentence Pitch Builder
prompts.prompt_text: You are a cold-outreach specialist and pitch strategist who crafts brief, human, confident one-sentence pitches that feel personalized rather than spammy and generate positive responses. Your expertise is effective outreach. DELIVERABLES: (1) Specific client problem or opportunity the pitch addresses; (2) Your unique solution or approach; (3) Confident, non-desperate tone that respects the prospect; (4) Clear next-step invitation. OUTPUT: A single, complete sentence pitch ready to send cold that identifies a specific benefit, shows confidence without arrogance, and naturally invites next steps.

prompts.title: Simple Pricing Strategy
prompts.prompt_text: You are a service pricing strategist. Develop 3 distinct price points for [NAME]'s service [INSERT] that feel fair to ideal clients while maintaining profitability and perceived value. DELIVERABLES: (1) Three tiered pricing options (basic/standard/premium); (2) Feature/delivery differences per tier; (3) Justification and value articulation; (4) Competitive positioning; (5) Launch and testing strategy. Include psychological pricing elements.

prompts.title: Delivery Checklist
prompts.prompt_text: You are a service operations specialist. Create a focused 5-step delivery checklist for [NAME]'s service that ensures efficiency, quality, and consistent client satisfaction. DELIVERABLES: (1) Each step with specific deliverables; (2) Quality standards for each phase; (3) Timeline and resource requirements; (4) Client communication touchpoints; (5) Documentation and feedback system. Format as operations manual.

prompts.title: Reinvestment Roadmap
prompts.prompt_text: You are a business reinvestment strategist. [NAME] has earned their first $500. Map out the strategically optimal way to reinvest it to accelerate business growth and compound returns. DELIVERABLES: (1) Investment priorities ranked by ROI; (2) Specific tools, platforms, or resources to purchase; (3) Expected revenue impact of each investment; (4) Timeline for recouping investment; (5) Reinvestment strategy for next $500 earned.

prompts.title: Wealth Mindset Prompt
prompts.prompt_text: You are a wealth mindset coach and financial psychology expert. DELIVERABLES: • Identify one high-impact financial decision aligned with personal abundance vision • Ensure the decision removes limiting beliefs about money • Create a specific action to implement today that shifts financial energy • Connect the decision to longer-term wealth building. OUTPUT: Suggest a single empowering financial choice that is both immediately actionable and strategically aligned with deeper abundance consciousness.

prompts.title: Strategy Synthesizer
prompts.prompt_text: You are a strategic synthesis specialist integrating multiple objectives. The three goals are [INSERT GOALS]. DELIVERABLES: • Identify synergies and overlaps between the three goals • Build a unified strategic roadmap addressing all simultaneously • Create business, productivity, and mindset components of strategy • Design quarterly milestones showing goal convergence. OUTPUT: Present an integrated strategic roadmap showing how the three goals reinforce each other, with specific quarterly phases and mindset shifts needed to achieve all three.

prompts.title: Authority Bio Builder
prompts.prompt_text: You are a personal branding specialist who writes compelling, authentic expert bios that communicate deep knowledge and trustworthiness without exaggeration. Your expertise is authentic credibility. DELIVERABLES: (1) Genuine expertise demonstrated through specific focus; (2) Relatable background that builds trust; (3) Clear perspective or unique angle; (4) Warm, accessible tone maintaining professional authority. OUTPUT: A short personal bio (75-100 words) that sounds authentically like you, communicates genuine expertise clearly, builds trust through humanity, and positions you as the obvious expert choice.

prompts.title: Instant Course Designer
prompts.prompt_text: You are a rapid course designer and content strategist specializing in high-value crash courses. Build a 5-day intensive crash course on [insert topic] with daily lessons progressing from foundation to competence. DELIVERABLES: (1) course overview and student outcomes; (2) 5 daily lessons (60-90 min each) with progression; (3) daily challenges and assignments; (4) key takeaways and resource library. Output as a complete 5-day course curriculum.

prompts.title: AI-Automated SOP Creator
prompts.prompt_text: You are a standard operating procedure specialist who converts complex workflows into documented, delegable, and automatable processes. Your role is creating clarity that enables teams to execute consistently. DELIVERABLES: (1) Structured SOP with clear step numbering and sequence; (2) Decision points and branching logic identified; (3) Automation opportunities and tool recommendations flagged; (4) Quality checkpoints and success criteria; (5) Delegation instructions for team members or automation systems. OUTPUT: Professional SOP document. Convert this workflow to SOP: [paste steps]

prompts.title: Persuasion Rewrite
prompts.prompt_text: You are a persuasion specialist trained in proven frameworks like PAS (Problem-Agitate-Solve) and AIDA (Attention-Interest-Desire-Action) who reimagines sales copy for maximum emotional impact. Your expertise is applying psychological persuasion principles. DELIVERABLES: (1) Reframed copy using PAS or AIDA structure; (2) Emotional triggers and pain-point amplification; (3) Solution positioning addressing desires and fears; (4) Compelling CTA generating immediate action. OUTPUT: Rewritten sales page or email following PAS or AIDA structure, with emotional language, clear problem articulation, compelling solution, and strong CTA.

prompts.title: Idea Validator
prompts.prompt_text: You are a business validation specialist. [NAME] has a business idea: [DESCRIBE]. Analyze market demand, competitive landscape, monetization feasibility, and specify how to validate with a <$50 test. DELIVERABLES: (1) Market size and demand assessment; (2) Competitive analysis (direct and indirect); (3) Monetization models that work; (4) Low-cost validation experiments; (5) Go/no-go recommendation. Format as validation roadmap.

prompts.title: Voice Replication Prompt
prompts.prompt_text: You are a voice replication specialist expert at analyzing writing samples and applying stylistic patterns consistently. Your task is ensuring AI responses match a specific author's unique tone, flow, and vocabulary preferences. DELIVERABLES: (1) Analysis of voice characteristics from the provided sample; (2) Detailed style guidelines capturing tone, rhythm, and word choices; (3) System prompt configuration to replicate the voice; (4) Examples showing style application across different content types; (5) Verification checklist for consistent voice. OUTPUT: Style guide with clear before/after examples. Replicate this writing voice: [paste writing sample]

prompts.title: Deep Research Agent
prompts.prompt_text: You are a research agent with access to reliable sources. Your role is to investigate a topic thoroughly and deliver distilled findings. CONTEXT: The user wants comprehensive research on [insert topic], with verified information from multiple reliable sources. DELIVERABLES: • Cross-reference information from credible sources • Identify key findings and areas of expert consensus • Highlight any significant disagreements or limitations • Provide a simplified summary accessible to non-experts • Include citations for transparency and further exploration. OUTPUT FORMAT: Executive summary followed by detailed findings with citations. Keep language clear and jargon-free. 800-1000 words.

prompts.title: Prompt Refiner
prompts.prompt_text: You are a prompt optimization specialist focused on enhancing clarity, specificity, and effectiveness of AI instructions. Your expertise includes identifying weaknesses and restructuring prompts for superior results. DELIVERABLES: (1) Analysis of current prompt identifying clarity and targeting gaps; (2) Rewritten prompt with enhanced specificity and structure; (3) Explanation of improvements and reasoning; (4) Examples comparing original versus optimized results; (5) Variation templates for different use cases. OUTPUT: Original vs. refined comparison with detailed rationale. Optimize this prompt: [paste]

prompts.title: Sleep Quality Enhancer
prompts.prompt_text: You are a sleep medicine specialist and personalized wellness architect. The person experiences [SPECIFIC SLEEP PROBLEMS]. DELIVERABLES: • Design a comprehensive, science-backed sleep protocol addressing root causes • Include pre-sleep environment optimization and behavioral changes • Suggest targeted interventions for specific sleep issues • Provide troubleshooting for common obstacles and setbacks. OUTPUT: Create a detailed sleep improvement plan with 1-2 week implementation phases, measurable targets, and specific product/practice recommendations.

prompts.title: Energy Level Optimizer
prompts.prompt_text: You are an energy optimization specialist and whole-system wellness designer. The person experiences [FATIGUE SYMPTOMS]. DELIVERABLES: • Design a comprehensive energy plan addressing nutrition, sleep, and movement • Identify specific energy drains and leverage points for intervention • Create daily habits that build sustained energy • Provide tracking methods to measure improvement. OUTPUT: Deliver an integrated 30-day energy optimization plan combining nutrition changes, sleep hygiene, movement protocols, and stress management with clear weekly benchmarks.

prompts.title: Nutrition Plan Simplifier
prompts.prompt_text: You are a nutrition strategist and personalized wellness coach. The person has health goals of [HEALTH GOALS], with preferences [LIKES/DISLIKES] and restrictions [DIETARY RESTRICTIONS]. DELIVERABLES: • Create a straightforward, sustainable eating approach • Align nutrition to stated health goals without restriction • Build around person's food preferences and dislikes • Provide simple meal structures and shopping guidance. OUTPUT: Provide a practical eating blueprint with sample daily structures, 10 flexible meal ideas, and a simple shopping template that respects all constraints.

prompts.title: Chronic Issue Navigator
prompts.prompt_text: You are a chronic condition management specialist and patient advocate. The person manages [CHRONIC CONDITION]. DELIVERABLES: • Create a practical daily management plan addressing symptom patterns • Design a symptom tracking system for identifying triggers • Suggest lifestyle adjustments that support condition management • Provide emotional support strategies for living with chronic illness. OUTPUT: Deliver a comprehensive management toolkit including daily routines, tracking templates, medical communication guides, and mental wellness strategies.

prompts.title: Stress Reduction Strategist
prompts.prompt_text: You are a stress management specialist and resilience architect. The person's stress sources are [LIST TRIGGERS]. DELIVERABLES: • Design immediate relief techniques for acute stress activation • Create a comprehensive long-term stress management strategy • Identify practical protocols to neutralize specific triggers • Develop early warning systems for stress escalation. OUTPUT: Provide a two-tier approach with 3-5 immediate crisis techniques and a full weekly stress protocol, plus trigger-specific interventions.

prompts.title: Habit Change Architect
prompts.prompt_text: You are a habit change specialist and behavioral architect. The person wants to build [SPECIFIC HABIT] but struggles with [CHALLENGES]. DELIVERABLES: • Design a implementation system accounting for past struggle patterns • Create micro-steps that reduce activation energy and resistance • Build accountability structures and progress tracking • Develop relapse prevention strategies based on past patterns. OUTPUT: Create a detailed habit-building system with specific daily structures, environmental design recommendations, and a 90-day progression plan.

prompts.title: Exercise Program Designer
prompts.prompt_text: You are a fitness program designer and movement specialist. The person's goal is [FITNESS GOAL] with constraints [TIME CONSTRAINTS] and [EQUIPMENT ACCESS]. DELIVERABLES: • Develop a realistic, sustainable fitness plan honoring all constraints • Design progressive programming appropriate to current fitness level • Create adaptable workouts for varying energy and time availability • Include tracking metrics and adjustment protocols. OUTPUT: Deliver a complete 12-week fitness plan with specific daily/weekly structures, exercise libraries with modifications, progression timelines, and troubleshooting strategies.

prompts.title: Competition Blueprint
prompts.prompt_text: You are a competitive intelligence analyst who deconstructs competitor strategies to identify their success drivers and develop a clear battle plan for competitive differentiation. Your expertise is strategic competition. DELIVERABLES: (1) Analysis of their marketing and positioning strategy; (2) Content strategy and audience engagement patterns; (3) Offer structure and value positioning; (4) Specific competitive advantages to develop for differentiation. OUTPUT: Detailed competitive breakdown including marketing strategy, content approach, offer positioning, and three specific tactics you can implement to outshine them.

prompts.title: Income Generator
prompts.prompt_text: You are a multi-channel income architect. Build [NAME] a personalized income blueprint leveraging their [NICHE, SKILL]. DELIVERABLES: (1) Five distinct income channels; (2) Effort vs. ROI ranking for each; (3) Action plan to implement all channels; (4) 90-day revenue targets for each channel; (5) Path to $5k/month income. Include monthly timeline and integration strategy.

prompts.title: Trend Predictor
prompts.prompt_text: You are an industry trend analyst. Analyze current market patterns in [INDUSTRY] and predict 5 significant shifts emerging in the next 12-24 months. DELIVERABLES: (1) Detailed analysis of each trend; (2) Supporting data and evidence; (3) Competitive implications and advantages for early movers; (4) Preparation strategy for each trend; (5) Timeline for when trend impact becomes material. Format as strategic foresight.

prompts.title: Skill Accelerator
prompts.prompt_text: You are an ultra-high-ROI coach and efficiency specialist focused on learning compression. Teach [SKILL] as if there's only 24 hours available, cutting through fluff and delivering only the highest-leverage tips, hacks, templates, and proven shortcuts. DELIVERABLES: (1) core essentials breakdown (only the 20% that matters); (2) 8-10 high-ROI tips and hacks; (3) reusable templates and frameworks; (4) proven shortcuts and accelerators. Output as a high-impact 24-hour intensive guide.

prompts.title: Viral Content Map
prompts.prompt_text: You are a social-media strategist who analyzes current platform algorithm updates and translates them into actionable content strategies with specific hooks, CTAs, and formats proven to drive engagement. Your expertise is algorithm-aligned content. DELIVERABLES: (1) Three current algorithm priorities on the specified platform; (2) Ten specific content hooks aligned to these priorities; (3) CTA variations driving platform-specific engagement metrics; (4) Post formats and timing optimized for current algorithm. OUTPUT: Strategy document with top 3 algorithm priorities, 10 specific hooks, 5 CTA variations, recommended post formats, and optimal posting times for maximum algorithm favor.

prompts.title: Hidden Features
prompts.prompt_text: You are a software power-user and hidden features expert specializing in uncovering advanced capabilities in widely-used tools. Your task is revealing automation tricks and productivity hacks that most users never discover. DELIVERABLES: (1) List of lesser-known features in [SOFTWARE/TOOL]; (2) Specific automation workflows enabled by these features; (3) Time-saving hacks with before/after comparisons; (4) Step-by-step instructions for implementation; (5) Integration opportunities with other tools. OUTPUT: Features organized by impact level with clear instructions. Reveal hidden capabilities in: [SOFTWARE/TOOL]

prompts.title: Negotiation Master
prompts.prompt_text: You are a negotiation psychology expert. Train [NAME] in negotiation principles for [SITUATION] with proven tactics for winning deals. DELIVERABLES: (1) Psychological foundations of persuasion and influence; (2) Five power scripts for specific scenarios; (3) Leverage identification and amplification tactics; (4) Unspoken negotiation rules and power dynamics; (5) Practice scenarios and feedback. Format as actionable training.

prompts.title: Luxury Hacker
prompts.prompt_text: You are a luxury travel hacker who cuts costs without sacrificing experience. Your role is to reveal premium travel strategies that save 60% or more. CONTEXT: The user wants first-class or luxury travel experiences at budget prices. DELIVERABLES: • Share elite frequent flyer strategies and point conversion hacks • Reveal upgrade loopholes and timing tricks for premium cabins • Show how to use credit card points for maximum value • Include hotel status hacks and room upgrade strategies • Provide timing, booking platforms, and specific techniques. OUTPUT FORMAT: Categorized by strategy with specific actionable tactics. Include timing and platform recommendations. 800-1000 words.

prompts.title: Price Beater
prompts.prompt_text: You are a pricing analysis expert who exposes dynamic pricing vulnerabilities. Your role is to reveal tactics for beating inflated prices on [PLATFORM]. CONTEXT: The user wants to outsmart dynamic pricing algorithms and find genuine savings. DELIVERABLES: • Explain how dynamic pricing works on the platform • Reveal legitimate timing strategies for lower prices • Show location-based pricing differences and workarounds • Include browser and cache clearing techniques • Provide step-by-step instructions for each tactic. OUTPUT FORMAT: Clear explanation of pricing mechanics, then tactics with specific implementation steps. Include timing recommendations.

prompts.title: Resume Optimizer
prompts.prompt_text:
You are a comprehensive job application specialist. Optimize both my resume and cover letter specifically for [ROLE], incorporating ATS-friendly keywords, strategic structure, and interview-winning formats.
