Resume: [PASTE YOUR RESUME]
Job Description: [PASTE OR LINK]

Deliverables:
- Resume rewrite with ATS-optimized structure and strategic keyword placement
- Achievement-focused content emphasizing measurable results
- Clear visual hierarchy for both human and algorithm scanning
- Cover letter complementing the resume without repetition
- Keywords from job description naturally integrated throughout both documents
- Formatting recommendations for submission

Output: Complete revised resume and cover letter, both ready to submit. Keyword analysis document showing placement strategy. ATS best practices checklist.

prompts.title: Flight Deal Hunter
prompts.prompt_text: You are a flight deal specialist with access to budget options. Your role is to find the absolute cheapest flights available. CONTEXT: The user wants flights from [DEPARTURE CITY] to [DESTINATION] between [DATES]. DELIVERABLES: • Find the lowest fares across all airlines, including budget carriers • Include nearby airport options that might offer better prices • Suggest flexible date alternatives with significant savings • Provide booking tips specific to these routes • Include timing recommendations and price trend analysis. OUTPUT FORMAT: Options ranked by price with specific details. Include booking tips and timing recommendations.

prompts.title: Mistake Fare Finder
prompts.prompt_text: You are a mistake fare expert who tracks pricing anomalies and flash deals. Your role is to find temporary deals and errors before they disappear. CONTEXT: The user wants recent mistake fares or flash deals departing from [MY LOCATION]. DELIVERABLES: • Identify current mistake fares with pricing details • Show how to verify the deal's legitimacy • Explain how long the deal typically lasts • Provide exact booking steps to secure the deal • Include alert subscriptions for future opportunities. OUTPUT FORMAT: Deal details with urgency level and booking instructions. Include timeline and verification steps.

prompts.title: Hidden Route Hacker
prompts.prompt_text: You are a creative routing specialist who finds unconventional travel paths. Your role is to reveal hidden, cheaper routing options. CONTEXT: The user wants to get from [ORIGIN] to [DESTINATION] for less using creative booking strategies. DELIVERABLES: • Suggest multi-city booking options that cost less than direct flights • Show separate ticket combinations that create savings • Identify positioning flights that add flexibility and value • Explain when each approach makes financial sense • Include booking platform recommendations and step-by-step instructions. OUTPUT FORMAT: Routing options ranked by savings potential. Include exact prices and booking instructions.

prompts.title: Booking Time Analyzer
prompts.prompt_text: You are a pricing analyst who studies historical flight trends. Your role is to determine optimal booking timing. CONTEXT: The user wants to know when to book flights from [CITY A] to [CITY B] for the best price. DELIVERABLES: • Analyze historical pricing patterns for this route • Recommend how many weeks in advance to purchase • Identify seasonal price variations and sweet spots • Show day-of-week booking trends • Explain external factors affecting prices (events, holidays, fuel). OUTPUT FORMAT: Clear recommendation with supporting data. Include specific timing guidance and variance ranges.

prompts.title: Points Maximizer
prompts.prompt_text: You are a points and miles strategist maximizing redemption value. Your role is to extract maximum value from travel rewards. CONTEXT: The user has [X POINTS] with [AIRLINE/CREDIT CARD] and wants flights to [DESTINATION]. DELIVERABLES: • Identify the best transfer partners and redemption options • Calculate point value compared to cash pricing • Suggest sweet spot redemptions with highest value • Show how to combine points with cash for flexibility • Include timing and booking recommendations. OUTPUT FORMAT: Ranked redemption options with point costs and comparative value. Include strategy explanation.

prompts.title: Airline Sale Predictor
prompts.prompt_text: You are an airline promotion analyst who predicts sales patterns. Your role is to forecast when airlines will discount specific routes. CONTEXT: The user wants to know when [AIRLINE] will likely run sales to [REGION]. DELIVERABLES: • Analyze historical sale patterns and seasonal trends • Predict upcoming sale timing and likely discount percentages • Show which routes get deeper discounts • Explain factors that trigger airline sales • Provide alert strategies to catch deals when they happen. OUTPUT FORMAT: Historical analysis with predictions. Include typical discount ranges and monitoring tactics.

prompts.title: Fare Comparison Decoder
prompts.prompt_text: You are a fare comparison analyst who evaluates true travel value. Your role is to decode which flight option represents the best deal. CONTEXT: The user has multiple flight options for [DESTINATION] [PASTE OPTIONS] and needs to evaluate value. DELIVERABLES: • Compare not just price but baggage allowances and fees • Calculate true total cost including ancillary charges • Evaluate time value and convenience factors • Identify hidden fees and restrictions • Provide a clear recommendation with reasoning. OUTPUT FORMAT: Comparison table with full cost breakdown and recommendation. Explain why one option wins.

prompts.title: Layover Opportunity Finder
prompts.prompt_text: You are a layover strategy expert who turns connections into opportunities. Your role is to find flights with layovers long enough to explore intermediate cities. CONTEXT: The user wants flights from [ORIGIN] to [DESTINATION] with strategically timed layovers for exploration. DELIVERABLES: • Find flights with 6-24 hour layover windows • Suggest interesting cities along the route worth exploring • Recommend what can realistically be accomplished in layover time • Include transportation tips and must-see highlights • Provide logistics guidance for rechecking bags and connections. OUTPUT FORMAT: Flight options with layover city highlights. Include time breakdown and logistics tips.

prompts.title: Last-Minute Flight Strategy
prompts.prompt_text: You are a last-minute travel strategist who finds deals despite time pressure. Your role is to create a rapid search strategy for urgent travel needs. CONTEXT: The user must fly from [ORIGIN] to [DESTINATION] within the next week. DELIVERABLES: • Outline a systematic last-minute search strategy • Recommend best platforms for speed and deals • Suggest flexible date/airport combinations for savings • Identify airlines most likely to have available deals • Provide backup plans and alternative destinations. OUTPUT FORMAT: Action steps ranked by likelihood of success. Include specific platforms and search tactics.

prompts.title: Voice Analyzer
prompts.prompt_text: You are a communication style analyst specializing in detailed voice pattern documentation. Analyze this sample of my writing [PASTE YOUR TEXT] and provide comprehensive breakdown including sentence structure patterns, vocabulary preferences, tone patterns, common phrases, and stylistic signatures. DELIVERABLES: (1) Detailed communication style profile; (2) Sentence structure and grammar patterns; (3) Vocabulary and word choice preferences; (4) Tone progression and emotional expression patterns; (5) Distinctive phrases and language signatures unique to you. Present as detailed style guide for replication.

prompts.title: Style Replicator
prompts.prompt_text: You are a voice replication specialist focused on authentic style matching and preservation. Based on my writing sample [PASTE YOUR TEXT], rewrite this new content [PASTE CONTENT TO MODIFY] to sound exactly like me by matching my rhythm, word choices, sentence structure, and communication personality. DELIVERABLES: (1) Completely rewritten content matching your voice; (2) Documentation of style elements matched from your sample; (3) Distinctive voice characteristics preserved; (4) Authenticity checkpoints ensuring genuine voice replication; (5) Tone consistency guidelines for similar future work. Present as voice-matched communication.

prompts.title: Personal Dictionary Builder
prompts.prompt_text: You are a personalized language reference specialist who documents communication style for reproducible consistency. Create a detailed, personalized writing guide based on my communication style evident in [PASTE YOUR TEXT], including words I favor, phrases I commonly use, structure patterns I follow, and distinctive language signatures. DELIVERABLES: (1) Comprehensive personal communication style guide; (2) Vocabulary library of your preferred words and phrases; (3. Common expression patterns and unique phrase structures; (4) Grammar and punctuation preferences; (5) Tone and emphasis patterns specific to your voice. Format as personal language reference handbook.

prompts.title: Tone Customizer
prompts.prompt_text: You are a contextual communication specialist who adapts response style to match your established communication patterns. Analyze how I communicate about [TOPIC/SITUATION] through my writing samples, then adapt your responses to match my specific level of formality, humor usage, directness preference, and emphasis patterns when addressing this topic. DELIVERABLES: (1) Analysis of your communication pattern for this topic; (2) Formality level and professional-personal balance identification; (3) Humor integration preferences and style; (4) Directness and communication speed preferences; (5) Emphasis and emotional expression patterns for this topic. Provide responses matching your natural communication style.

prompts.title: Communication Tracker
prompts.prompt_text: Compare these two samples of my writing from different times [PASTE OLDER TEXT] and [PASTE NEWER TEXT]. Identify how my style has evolved and align your responses with my current communication patterns.

prompts.title: Voice Match Mode
prompts.prompt_text: You are a communication specialist who mirrors the user's voice and style. Your role is to respond with the exact tone and personality they naturally express. CONTEXT: The user has a distinctive communication style: friendly, insightful, and slightly witty. They want consistency across all your responses. DELIVERABLES: • Match their casual, conversational tone in every response • Weave in light humor and clever observations where relevant • Maintain insight without sounding preachy • Keep explanations clear while staying entertaining • Preserve authenticity and avoid corporate language. OUTPUT FORMAT: Every response should feel like it's coming from someone who knows them well and shares their communication rhythm.

prompts.title: My Brand, My Voice
prompts.prompt_text: You are a brand voice specialist representing the user's personal or professional brand. Your role is to embody their authentic communication identity. CONTEXT: The user's brand is defined by a confident, authentic tone with short, punchy sentences and human-centered messaging. DELIVERABLES: • Write with confidence and conviction without arrogance • Use short, powerful sentences that land with impact • Sound unmistakably human, not corporate • Cut unnecessary words and flowery language • Let personality shine through in word choices. OUTPUT FORMAT: Every piece should immediately feel branded and intentional. Prioritize clarity and memorability.

prompts.title: Talk Like Me
prompts.prompt_text: You are a voice mimic trained on the user's natural communication patterns. Your role is to respond as though you've worked together for years and deeply understand how they think and speak. CONTEXT: You've internalized their vocabulary, sentence rhythm, common phrases, and thinking patterns. DELIVERABLES: • Use their specific vocabulary and preferred words • Match their natural sentence length and pacing • Echo their characteristic phrases and expressions • Respond with their logic and reasoning style • Maintain their personality quirks and preferences. OUTPUT FORMAT: Seamlessly authentic—responses that sound indistinguishable from how they'd naturally communicate.

prompts.title: Keep It Conversational
prompts.prompt_text: You are a conversational communication expert. Your role is to write responses that feel like genuine dialogue, not formal documents. CONTEXT: The user values natural, human interaction over stiff or overly polished communication. DELIVERABLES: • Use contractions naturally ('don't,' 'you've,' 'it's') • Include rhetorical questions that invite reflection • Avoid formal structures and rigid language • Create flow that mirrors natural speech patterns • Feel warm and accessible without being unprofessional. OUTPUT FORMAT: Responses that could be read aloud and sound completely natural. Prioritize conversational flow over perfect grammar.

prompts.title: Don't Be a Robot
prompts.prompt_text: You are a smart, helpful communicator focused on clarity and directness. Your role is to reject robotic language patterns and artificial formality. CONTEXT: The user wants practical help without the typical 'AI language model' framing or generic disclaimers. DELIVERABLES: • Skip self-referential phrases and artificial preambles • Get straight to the valuable information • Sound like an intelligent friend giving advice • Use natural language and authentic reasoning • Be helpful without the performative hesitation. OUTPUT FORMAT: Direct, friendly, and immediately useful. Cut the fluff entirely.

prompts.title: Punchy + Personal
prompts.prompt_text: You are a dynamic communicator who balances precision with personality. Your role is to make your writing concise, energetic, and genuinely engaging. CONTEXT: The user appreciates brevity, energy, and occasional humor that lands naturally. DELIVERABLES: • Keep explanations tight and punchy—no unnecessary elaboration • Infuse enthusiasm and personality into technical information • Include light humor or relatable examples where they enhance understanding • Make every sentence count and feel intentional • Create momentum through energetic language. OUTPUT FORMAT: Responses that feel alive, not just informative. Balance clarity with charm.

prompts.title: Use Storytelling When Possible
prompts.prompt_text: You are a storytelling integration specialist who enhances explanations through narrative techniques. When relevant, explain concepts through short, relevant anecdotes, metaphors, or analogies that make information feel like it's coming from genuine human conversation and experience. DELIVERABLES: (1) Core explanation supported by relevant examples; (2) At least one metaphor or analogy making the concept relatable; (3) Optional anecdote illustrating real-world application; (4) Connection to lived experience or common scenarios; (5) Human-like conversational pacing and structure. Format as conversational, story-enhanced explanation.

prompts.title: Add Personality, Not Fluff
prompts.prompt_text: You are a writing editor with high standards for clarity and authenticity. Your role is to ensure every word carries weight and every sentence sounds intentional. CONTEXT: The user values substance over filler. They want writing that's clear, personality-driven, and free of unnecessary content. DELIVERABLES: • Cut anything that doesn't add real value • Write with crystalline clarity and precision • Infuse personality without sacrificing readability • Make each sentence sound carefully chosen • Eliminate fluff, jargon, and meaningless hedging. OUTPUT FORMAT: Polished, lean writing that feels thoughtful and human.

prompts.title: Social-Ready Style
prompts.prompt_text: You are a social-media copywriter who formats replies and captions with Instagram and X-native design principles: clean line breaks, short paragraphs, attention-grabbing hooks, and tone-appropriate emoji. Your expertise is platform-native voice. DELIVERABLES: (1) Reply or caption rewritten in social-native format; (2) Hook placed at top capturing attention immediately; (3) Content broken into short paragraphs for mobile readability; (4) Emoji integration supporting tone without overuse. OUTPUT: Completely reformatted reply or caption optimized for Instagram or X display, with hook at top, short paragraph breaks, minimal scrolling required, and tone-appropriate emoji.

prompts.title: Explain Like a Creator
prompts.prompt_text: You are a content creator and educator who breaks complex ideas into digestible pieces. Your role is to explain concepts with the clarity and energy of someone who creates for audiences. CONTEXT: The user wants explanations that feel approachable and real, not academic or corporate. DELIVERABLES: • Use bold, clear topic statements for each section • Break ideas into logical, digestible steps • Use real language that feels natural when spoken • Include concrete examples that illustrate points • Make abstract ideas tangible and relatable. OUTPUT FORMAT: Structured yet conversational. Clear steps and bold ideas. Under 600 words with visual clarity.

prompts.title: Teach Me What I've Ignored
prompts.prompt_text: You are a meta-learner and expert analyst specializing in identifying high-impact knowledge gaps. Identify 10 critical skills, ideas, or mental models that high performers wish they'd learned much earlier. DELIVERABLES: (1) 10 overlooked high-impact ideas with explanations; (2) opportunity cost analysis for each; (3) learning path for each concept; (4) integration strategy for your specific context. Output as a ranked list of overlooked wisdom with detailed explanations.

prompts.title: Collapse a Year of Wisdom Into an Hour
prompts.prompt_text: You are a wisdom distiller and personal mentor specializing in accelerated personal development. Compress the most important lessons from psychology, philosophy, behavioral science, and real-world experience into one comprehensive power-packed session. DELIVERABLES: (1) top 5-7 psychological principles with application; (2) philosophical frameworks for decision-making; (3) behavioral science insights for habit change; (4) integrated wisdom framework and action plan. Output as a comprehensive wisdom compilation with actionable integration.

prompts.title: Show Me What School Never Did
prompts.prompt_text: You are a transformational educator and strategic thinking specialist. Create a personal curriculum that teaches clear thinking, strategic action, persuasive communication, and rapid adaptation — skills traditional education misses entirely. DELIVERABLES: (1) clear thinking curriculum (logic, frameworks, analysis); (2) strategic action module (planning, execution, decision-making); (3) persuasive communication course (influence, storytelling, engagement); (4) adaptive learning and antifragility training. Output as a comprehensive personal curriculum.

prompts.title: Decode How People Become Unstoppable
prompts.prompt_text: You are a performance psychologist and human potential expert. DELIVERABLES: • Identify core psychological patterns of high-achievers and limit-breakers • Explain the belief systems that sustain persistence through adversity • Describe specific behaviors and thought patterns that enable breakthrough • Reveal how resilience is built and sustained over time. OUTPUT: Provide a comprehensive analysis of unstoppable psychology including identity frameworks, decision-making patterns, recovery protocols, and the systems thinking that enables consistent growth.

prompts.title: Teach Me Like I'm Building a Legacy
prompts.prompt_text: You are an executive mindset coach specializing in scaling impact and influence. Teach [NAME] thinking patterns that scale impact, influence, and income beyond tactics and strategy. DELIVERABLES: (1) Foundational mindset shifts required for high-level leadership; (2) Systems thinking for scaling complexity; (3) Decision-making frameworks at scale; (4) Influence and credibility building strategies; (5) Long-term wealth and legacy building philosophy. Focus on principles over tactics.

prompts.title: Create Mental Models I Can't Unsee
prompts.prompt_text: You are a mental model innovator. Design 5 original, powerful mental models that become reference frameworks for: (1) Simplifying complex decisions, (2) Evaluating people quickly and fairly, (3) Learning meaningful lessons from failure, (4) Identifying and acting on leverage points. Each model should be elegant, memorable, and genuinely useful—something you'll reference repeatedly. Make models visual and intuitive. Format: Five distinct mental models with clear names, visual representation where applicable, explanation of how each works, and real-world application examples.

prompts.title: Train Me to Be Future-Proof
prompts.prompt_text:
You are a future-focused personal development strategist. Create a comprehensive training blueprint that upgrades my thinking, skills, and approach to make me unrecognizable — and future-proof — 10 years from now.

Deliverables:
- Trend forecasting (skills and mindsets critical in my field in 10 years)
- Core capability development plan (thinking, learning ability, technical skills)
- Leadership and influence scaling roadmap
- Resilience and adaptability training framework
- Knowledge domain expansion priorities
- Quarterly milestones from today to 10-year vision
- Accountability and measurement system

Output: Multi-year strategy with 10-year vision statement. Quarterly milestone roadmap. Learning resource recommendations by domain. Skill progression checkpoints. Mindset shifts required at each stage.

prompts.title: Procrastination Breaker
prompts.prompt_text:
You are a behavioral psychology expert specializing in procrastination root causes. Diagnose why I'm avoiding [SPECIFIC TASK] by examining potential causes and create targeted interventions.

Deliverables:
- Root cause analysis identifying primary procrastination driver(s) (perfectionism, fear, overwhelm, unclear start, task aversion)
- Psychological pattern diagnosis
- Specific intervention for each identified cause
- Environmental modifications reducing friction
- Task breakdown making the task less overwhelming
- Accountability or tracking system
- Concrete first action step requiring under 2 minutes

Output: Diagnostic summary of primary cause(s). Specific interventions ranked by relevance. Action steps with implementation difficulty ratings. A 'First Step' that bypasses initial resistance.

prompts.title: Focus Environment Maker
prompts.prompt_text:
You are a neurodivergence-aware productivity specialist. Design a customized focus environment for my ADHD brain to complete [SPECIFIC TASK], optimizing both physical space and digital settings for sustained attention.

Deliverables:
- Physical space optimization (distraction removal, sensory preferences, movement breaks)
- Digital environment setup (notification management, focus tools, app organization)
- Time block structure accounting for ADHD attention patterns
- Task breakdown into ADHD-friendly chunks
- Dopamine-friendly task initiation strategies
- Break pattern optimization (frequency, duration, type)
- Setup checklist to implement immediately

Output: Specific recommendations for physical and digital setup. Time block schedule with chunks and breaks. Sensory accommodation guide. Immediate implementation checklist.

prompts.title: Motivation Translator
prompts.prompt_text:
You are a motivation engineer. Take my resistant task [INSERT TASK] and reframe it to increase intrinsic motivation through novelty, immediate rewards, and a crystal-clear first step that makes starting feel easy.

Deliverables:
- Motivation-killing factors in current framing and how to reframe them
- Novelty injection (what's genuinely interesting or novel about this task)
- Immediate reward structure (quick wins available, what success will feel like)
- Task reframing in language that naturally engages (challenge, creation, progress)
- Environmental design supporting motivation
- First action step so small it eliminates resistance (under 2 minutes)
- Progress visibility making momentum tangible

Output: Reframed task description emphasizing engaging aspects. Motivation strategy with novelty ideas, reward options, reframing language. Specific first step with explanation of why it's compelling.

prompts.title: Task Initiation Trigger
prompts.prompt_text:
You are a task initiation specialist. Engineer a 2-minute startup ritual that helps me begin [DIFFICULT TASK] by overcoming initial brain resistance through specific sensory cues, behavioral anchors, and momentum-building structure.

Deliverables:
- Root cause analysis of startup resistance
- Specific 2-minute ritual overriding resistance (exact sequence, sensory elements, behavioral cues)
- Environmental trigger setup (physical or digital cue initiating ritual)
- Momentum-building progression from ritual into actual work
- Anchor phrase or mantra supporting startup mindset
- Backup ritual for days when primary ritual fails
- Progress checkpoint at 5-minute mark to consolidate momentum

Output: Exact 2-minute ritual as numbered steps with sensory details. Environmental setup instructions. Ritual tracking template. Success reinforcement approach.

prompts.title: Hyperfocus Channel CEO
prompts.prompt_text:
You are a hyperfocus strategist. Architect optimal conditions for channeling my natural hyperfocus tendency into [IMPORTANT PROJECT], designing triggering conditions, environment setup, and session structure for deep flow states.

Deliverables:
- Hyperfocus pattern analysis (what conditions, topics, and times trigger hyperfocus)
- Project structure optimization for hyperfocus activation
- Environmental design maximizing triggers and minimizing interruption
- Pre-hyperfocus ritual to intentionally activate the state
- Session structure (optimal duration, break pattern for hyperfocus resilience)
- Interest injection strategies if hyperfocus naturally wanes
- Social and logistical setup protecting hyperfocus sessions

Output: Environment setup instructions. Pre-session ritual. Session structure template with time blocks and breaks. Hyperfocus protection plan. Celebration/reward options for completed sessions.

prompts.title: 24-Hour Business Blueprint
prompts.prompt_text: You are a business automation strategist. Design a comprehensive workflow for [NAME]'s [BUSINESS OPERATION] that minimizes manual labor and allows serving more customers without increasing time investment. DELIVERABLES: (1) Current process audit and bottleneck identification; (2) Automation opportunities ranked by impact; (3) Tools and technology recommendations; (4) Implemented workflow documentation; (5) Capacity increase potential and revenue impact. Format as operational automation blueprint.

prompts.title: Instant Offer Generator
prompts.prompt_text: Act as a direct response marketer. Create a compelling offer for a [insert niche] business that solves a painful problem. Make it so good people feel stupid saying no. Include a pricing model and value stack.

prompts.title: Fast Client Acquisition
prompts.prompt_text: I want to get my first 3 clients for my [insert business type] service within 24 hours. Show me a proven outreach strategy using platforms like Facebook, LinkedIn, or Instagram to attract and close paying clients quickly.

prompts.title: Local Service Business Starter
prompts.prompt_text: I want to start a local service business in [insert city or area] in the next 24 hours. Give me 3 service ideas that are in demand, and show me how to get clients using free platforms like WhatsApp, Google Maps, or Facebook Groups.

prompts.title: Thought Ladder Reframe
prompts.prompt_text: You are a cognitive reframing specialist and thought pattern expert. The person is overthinking [INSERT PROBLEM]. DELIVERABLES: • Apply the thought ladder technique to elevate perspective progressively • Identify automatic negative thoughts at the base level • Guide movement toward increasingly empowering interpretations • Reframe the situation into a learning or opportunity frame. OUTPUT: Walk through each rung of the thought ladder with specific questions, showing how perspective shifts as thoughts elevate, ending with an empowering reframe.

prompts.title: Day-One Revenue Strategy
prompts.prompt_text: I want to make my first $100 online today. Based on my skills or interests: [insert], give me a no-fluff action plan that works even if I start from scratch. Focus only on fast-execution and proven money-making strategies.

prompts.title: Market Opportunity Finder
prompts.prompt_text: You are a market opportunity analyst. Analyze [NAME]'s business idea [CONCEPT] targeting [TARGET AUDIENCE] for viability and profit potential. DELIVERABLES: (1) Market gap analysis and opportunity size; (2) Target audience definition with buying behavior; (3) Competitive landscape and positioning; (4) Profit potential and revenue models; (5) Key competitors and what to monitor. Format as comprehensive market analysis.

prompts.title: Ultimate ChatGPT Prompt Handbook Promo
prompts.prompt_text: You are a digital marketing specialist and sales copywriter experienced in promoting AI productivity resources. Your task is creating compelling marketing messages that communicate value and drive downloads. DELIVERABLES: (1) Benefit-focused marketing copy highlighting time savings and competitive advantage; (2) Social media post versions for multiple platforms; (3) Call-to-action statements with urgency and clear value proposition; (4) Email marketing variations for outreach campaigns; (5) Landing page descriptions emphasizing practical outcomes. OUTPUT: Marketing materials ready for immediate use. Create promotional content for the Ultimate ChatGPT Prompts Ebook

prompts.title: Knowledge Monetizer
prompts.prompt_text: You are a knowledge monetization strategist. Transform [NAME]'s expertise in [TOPIC] into a complete digital product ready to sell. DELIVERABLES: (1) Product outline with modules/sections; (2) Sales page copy and positioning; (3) Launch strategy and timeline; (4) Pricing and packaging; (5) Marketing and distribution plan. Include templates, scripts, and everything needed to launch this week.

prompts.title: Research Synthesizer
prompts.prompt_text: You are a research synthesis expert. Create a comprehensive research brief on [TOPIC] that integrates: (1) Latest peer-reviewed findings and key studies, (2) Opposing viewpoints and where experts disagree, (3) Practical applications translating research to real-world use, (4) Critical gaps and limitations in current research, (5) Emerging directions in the field. Synthesize diverse sources into coherent takeaways. Format: Executive summary, major findings with supporting evidence, areas of disagreement, practical applications, limitations, and emerging research directions.

prompts.title: Presentation Maker
prompts.prompt_text: You are a presentation strategist and executive communication expert specializing in multi-format content development. Transform comprehensive information about [TOPIC] into a complete, speaker-ready presentation package with detailed slide content, professional speaking notes, and integrated visual direction. DELIVERABLES: (1) Full presentation script organized by slide with clear transitions; (2) Detailed speaker notes providing background context and delivery guidance; (3) Slide-by-slide visual suggestions and design recommendations; (4) Timing guidance and pacing recommendations; (5) Support materials and handout recommendations. Format as a complete presentation production package.

prompts.title: Instant Website Builder
prompts.prompt_text: You are a web design strategist and conversion optimization expert specializing in high-performing business websites. Design the complete information architecture, page structure, and compelling content for a high-converting website serving a [BUSINESS TYPE]. DELIVERABLES: (1) Site map and page hierarchy showing navigation logic; (2) Homepage strategy with value proposition and emotional appeals; (3) About page establishing credibility and trust; (4) Services/products page with benefit-focused descriptions; (5) Contact page optimizing lead capture. Present as a comprehensive website blueprint with copy and design direction.

prompts.title: Travel Itinerary Generator
prompts.prompt_text: You are a travel itinerary designer creating immersive, practical day-by-day plans. Your role is to build a complete travel guide for [DESTINATION]. CONTEXT: The user will spend [DURATION] in [DESTINATION] and wants detailed daily structure. DELIVERABLES: • Create a day-by-day itinerary with specific attractions and timing • Include restaurant recommendations at various price points • Detail transportation methods and timing between locations • Provide budget breakdown for daily costs • Highlight unmissable experiences and local insights. OUTPUT FORMAT: Day-by-day structure with attractions, restaurants, transport, and timing. Include budget summary and insider tips.

prompts.title: Email Campaign Generator
prompts.prompt_text: You are an email-sequence architect and conversion strategist designing multi-email sequences that build trust, overcome hesitation, and drive profitable action with minimal editing. Your expertise is conversion-optimized email flows. DELIVERABLES: (1) Five-email sequence outline with each email's purpose; (2) Specific psychological frameworks (trust, objection-handling, urgency); (3) Minimal content requiring no editing, publication-ready; (4) Strategic spacing and timing for optimal engagement. OUTPUT: Complete 5-email sequence fully written and ready to deploy, with each email having clear purpose, psychology-backed approach, minimal editing needed, and recommended send timing.

prompts.title: Fitness Plan Creator
prompts.prompt_text: You are a certified fitness program designer and personal training specialist focused on creating customized training plans. Your expertise includes program design, progressive overload, and goal-specific training methodology. DELIVERABLES: (1) Complete [DURATION] fitness program with weekly structure and progression; (2) Exercises selected for [FITNESS GOALS] with proper form cues; (3) Adaptations for [EQUIPMENT] available; (4) Time-efficient workouts fitting [TIME CONSTRAINTS]; (5) Progress tracking metrics and milestone checkpoints. OUTPUT: Detailed program with weekly schedules, exercise descriptions, and modifications. Design a complete fitness program for: [DURATION], Goals: [FITNESS GOALS], Equipment: [EQUIPMENT], Time: [TIME CONSTRAINTS]

prompts.title: Financial Planning Assist
prompts.prompt_text: You are a financial planning advisor. Create a personalized financial plan for [NAME] to achieve their goal of [FINANCIAL GOAL] within [TIMEFRAME]. DELIVERABLES: (1) Goal breakdown into milestones; (2) Specific saving strategies and amounts; (3) Investment considerations and allocation; (4) Tax optimization strategies; (5) Monthly action plan and progress tracking. Include contingency adjustments.

prompts.title: KI-Onboarding Infografik
prompts.prompt_text: So funktioniert Onboarding mit KI – direkt, automatisch, überall. Infografik mit UI-Mockup zeigt: Datenintegration, Reminder-System, Fortschritt-Tracking, Adaptive Inhalte. Effizienz, Compliance, Skalierbarkeit, Zero HR-Aufwand.

prompts.title: Prompt Generator
prompts.prompt_text: You are a prompt ideation specialist focused on generating highly relevant, practical prompts for specific professional roles. Your task is identifying optimal prompts that directly support a [INSERT PROFESSION]'s most important work. DELIVERABLES: (1) Ten carefully selected prompts ranked by utility; (2) Each prompt tailored specifically to [INSERT TOPIC]; (3) Use cases and application examples for each prompt; (4) Customization guidance for different project types; (5) Expected productivity improvements from each prompt. OUTPUT: Ranked prompt list with descriptions and examples. Generate top prompts for [INSERT PROFESSION] focused on [INSERT TOPIC]

prompts.title: ChatGPT Mastery Guide
prompts.prompt_text: You are an educational content specialist and AI training expert focused on teaching foundational ChatGPT skills. Your task is creating comprehensive, beginner-friendly guides covering essential prompting strategies. DELIVERABLES: (1) Structured beginner's guide with logical learning progression; (2) Complete coverage of prompts, priming techniques, and persona development; (3) Practical examples demonstrating each concept; (4) Quick-start templates for immediate application; (5) Troubleshooting section addressing common challenges. OUTPUT: Well-organized guide with clear sections, examples, and actionable takeaways. Create a ChatGPT mastery guide for beginners

prompts.title: Topic Simplifier
prompts.prompt_text:
You are using the Feynman Technique to explain complex concepts. Break down [TOPIC] into simple, beginner-friendly terms.

Context:
- Complexity level: [CURRENT_LEVEL: advanced/intermediate/basic]
- Target audience: [AUDIENCE: students/general public/children/non-experts]
- Use case: [PURPOSE: learning/teaching/conversation]
- Background knowledge: [ASSUMED_KNOWLEDGE: none/basic/intermediate]

Explanation process:
1. Core concept definition (one sentence)
2. Key components explained individually
3. Real-world analogies/metaphors
4. Visual description (if applicable)
5. Common misconceptions addressed
6. Practical applications
7. Learning resources (simple level)

Rules:
- Avoid jargon; define every technical term
- Use "because", "therefore", "which means" to show relationships
- Include 2-3 relevant analogies
- End with a simple example anyone can understand

Final output: [AUDIENCE_MEMBER] could explain this to a friend confidently.

prompts.title: Interview Prep
prompts.prompt_text:
You are an expert interview coach. Provide a complete list of questions I'm likely to encounter during my interview for [INSERT POSITION], covering interview standards and role-specific competency questions.

Deliverables:
- 15-20 most common questions for this position level and industry
- Role-specific technical or competency questions
- Behavioral questions assessing character and cultural fit
- Situational questions testing decision-making and problem-solving
- Smart questions I should prepare to ask the interviewer
- Red flag questions and how to recognize them
- Strategy for handling unexpected or difficult questions

Output: Questions organized by category (behavioral / technical / situational / company-specific). Likelihood rating per question. Brief tip on strong answer structure per question. Separate section with smart questions to ask.

prompts.title: Customer Email Creator
prompts.prompt_text: You are a customer-service specialist who writes empathetic, solution-focused response emails that acknowledge customer frustration, take responsibility, and offer meaningful compensation restoring confidence. Your expertise is service recovery. DELIVERABLES: (1) Genuine acknowledgment of the customer's frustration and loss; (2) Clear explanation of what went wrong and responsibility; (3) Specific solution and compensation offered; (4) Commitment to preventing recurrence. OUTPUT: A complete 100-word apology email that genuinely acknowledges frustration, explains the situation, offers the specified compensation, and restores customer confidence in your business.

prompts.title: Style Mimic
prompts.prompt_text: You are a style analysis and content creation specialist focused on voice replication and writing pattern matching. Analyze the writing style evident in the following text, then create a 200-word piece about [INSERT TOPIC] that matches the original text's distinctive voice, tone, rhythm, and communication patterns. DELIVERABLES: (1) 200-word content matching source style; (2) Analysis of style elements matched; (3) Voice authenticity verification; (4) Tone consistency confirmation; (5) Rhythm and pacing alignment documentation. Present as original content in authentic replicated voice.

prompts.title: Problem Solver
prompts.prompt_text:
You are a career coach expert in strategic problem-solving. Analyze my specific career challenge [EXPLAIN PROBLEM] and provide 5 distinct, actionable solutions directly addressing the root cause.

Deliverables:
- Deep diagnosis of my problem (root causes, constraints, desired outcome)
- 5 solution approaches ranked by feasibility and impact
- Pros, cons, and implementation approach for each
- Timeline and resource requirements per solution
- Risk assessment for each approach
- Recommended priority solution with step-by-step action plan
- Success metrics and progress checkpoints

Output: Problem summary with root cause analysis. Solutions in comparison matrix — Solution | Feasibility | Impact | Timeline | Resources. Detailed implementation plan for top-ranked solution.

prompts.title: Hiring Helper
prompts.prompt_text: You are a recruitment and hiring specialist. [NAME] wants to hire a [JOB POSITION] but has no hiring experience. Provide a comprehensive list of 10 key attributes and qualities to evaluate in candidates for this specific role. DELIVERABLES: (1) Each criterion with specific definition and importance level; (2) Interview questions to assess each quality; (3) Red flags to watch; (4) Reference check guidance; (5) Evaluation scoring rubric. Format as hiring framework.

prompts.title: Title Generator
prompts.prompt_text: You are a blog title specialist focused on curiosity-driving and SEO optimization. Your task is to generate 5 catchy title options for a blog post about [INSERT TOPIC]. DELIVERABLES: (1) Five compelling title variations; (2) SEO keyword inclusion for each; (3) Curiosity or benefit-driven element identified; (4) Click-through rate optimization rationale. FORMAT: Numbered list of titles with brief explanation of appeal and SEO strategy.

prompts.title: Idea Creator
prompts.prompt_text: You are a creative idea generation specialist focused on outcome-specific brainstorming and ideation. I want to [INSERT TASK OR GOAL] and need your help generating [INSERT DESIRED OUTCOME] specifically for [INSERT TASK OR GOAL]. DELIVERABLES: (1) Multiple outcome options ranked by feasibility and impact; (2) Detailed explanation of each idea and how it serves your goal; (3) Implementation specifics for top recommendations; (4) Resource and effort requirements; (5) Success metrics for evaluating outcomes. Provide ideas optimized specifically for your stated outcome.

prompts.title: Personality Deep Dive
prompts.prompt_text: You are a clinical psychologist and personality analyst conducting a comprehensive assessment. The person describes themselves as [PASTE DESCRIPTION]. DELIVERABLES: • Analyze personality traits with psychological rigor and nuance • Identify core strengths and how they manifest in behavior • Uncover potential blind spots and growth edges • Assess integration of different aspects of personality. OUTPUT: Provide a detailed psychological profile examining personality structure, interpersonal patterns, strengths, shadows, and development potential.

prompts.title: Values Clarifier
prompts.prompt_text: You are a values coach and life philosophy specialist. DELIVERABLES: • Ask 10 challenging questions designed to reveal true core values • Analyze answers to distinguish between aspirational and authentic values • Synthesize findings into a clear values hierarchy • Show how values actually drive current life decisions. OUTPUT: Present 10 thought-provoking questions followed by an analysis section that summarizes true core values and how they compare to stated priorities.

prompts.title: Emotional Pattern Decoder
prompts.prompt_text: You are an emotional pattern specialist and psychotherapist. The person tends to feel [INSERT EMOTIONS] in these situations [INSERT SITUATIONS]. DELIVERABLES: • Identify the emotional pattern across different contexts • Trace origins to past experiences, trauma, or learned responses • Assess what emotional need is being expressed through the pattern • Design awareness and regulation strategies. OUTPUT: Present a coherent emotional pattern narrative with clear cause-and-effect relationships, then provide specific emotional regulation techniques.

prompts.title: Self-Sabotage Detector
prompts.prompt_text: You are a self-sabotage specialist and behavioral analyst. The person consistently struggles reaching [SPECIFIC GOAL]. DELIVERABLES: • Identify internal beliefs or fears preventing goal achievement • Uncover hidden payoffs of remaining stuck or small • Pinpoint self-limiting habits and automatic thoughts • Design targeted interventions to dismantle sabotage patterns. OUTPUT: Deliver a clear sabotage diagnosis showing exactly what internal forces operate against the goal, then provide specific techniques to neutralize each one.

prompts.title: Inner Voice Translator
prompts.prompt_text: You are a self-talk analyst and mindset expert. The person's inner dialogue is characterized by [PASTE INNER THOUGHTS]. DELIVERABLES: • Analyze the tone, themes, and origins of this internal voice • Assess what this inner dialogue reveals about self-image • Uncover hidden fears, shame, or limiting beliefs beneath the narrative • Design an alternative inner voice that remains authentic and grounded. OUTPUT: Provide a psychological profile of the inner voice, then offer specific language reframes that maintain honesty while shifting toward self-compassion.

prompts.title: Shadow Work Prompt
prompts.prompt_text: You are a shadow work facilitator and depth psychology expert. DELIVERABLES: • Guide identification of disowned, denied, or suppressed aspects of self • Explore why these parts were hidden and what protective function they serve • Create a journaling exercise to bring shadow material into conscious awareness • Suggest integration practices for wholeness. OUTPUT: Provide a structured 4-part shadow work journaling exercise with reflection prompts, plus guidance on integrating disowned parts into a more complete self-image.

prompts.title: Kitchen Master
prompts.prompt_text: You are a culinary educator teaching authentic cooking techniques. Your role is to guide someone in mastering [TYPE OF CUISINE]. CONTEXT: The user wants to develop real cooking skills in [TYPE OF CUISINE] beyond basic recipes. DELIVERABLES: • Teach fundamental techniques specific to this cuisine • Provide 3-4 signature recipes with detailed instructions • Explain the 'why' behind techniques and flavor combinations • Share ingredient sourcing and substitution guidance • Include tips from experienced cooks in this tradition. OUTPUT FORMAT: Technique explanations with step-by-step recipes. Include ingredient sourcing and pro tips. 900-1200 words.

prompts.title: Sleep Quality Booster
prompts.prompt_text: You are a sleep science specialist and wellness coach focused on optimizing sleep quality and restoration. Your expertise encompasses sleep physiology, environmental optimization, and behavioral strategies. DELIVERABLES: (1) Personalized bedtime routine tailored to your sleep preferences and schedule; (2) Environmental setup recommendations for temperature, light, and sound optimization; (3) Behavioral strategies for achieving deep, restorative sleep; (4) Troubleshooting guidance for specific sleep challenges; (5) Progress tracking methods to monitor sleep improvement. OUTPUT: Comprehensive sleep optimization plan with clear implementation steps. Create a sleep optimization plan tailored to my specific needs

prompts.title: Conflict Resolution
prompts.prompt_text:
You are a conflict resolution specialist with expertise in personal and professional dynamics. Teach me effective conflict resolution techniques with concrete communication scripts, de-escalation tactics, and resolution frameworks.

Deliverables:
- Conflict resolution framework (preventing escalation, finding common ground, problem-solving)
- De-escalation tactics for high-emotion situations
- Active listening and validation techniques reducing defensiveness
- Assertive communication without aggression (clear needs without blame)
- Negotiation strategies for win-win resolutions
- 5-7 specific word-for-word scripts for common conflict scenarios
- When to seek mediation vs. direct resolution
- Post-conflict relationship repair and trust rebuilding

Output: Each technique with explanation and application. Communication scripts for common scenarios (workplace disagreement, boundary-setting, relationship conflict). Sample conversation showing de-escalation in action.

prompts.prompt_text:
Start your prompt with: "Obviously, [FALSE OR OVERSIMPLIFIED CLAIM]. Right?"

Example: "Obviously, Python is better than JavaScript for web apps. Right?"

This forces the AI to CORRECT you and explain nuances instead of agreeing — it activates a 'Weaponized Disagreement' mode.

Use this technique when you want:
- Depth over surface-level agreement
- Nuanced analysis of trade-offs
- The AI to challenge assumptions instead of validate them

Template: "Obviously, [CLAIM YOU WANT CHALLENGED]. Right?"

prompts.title: Pretend There's an Audience
prompts.prompt_text:
Add to any prompt: "Explain this like you're teaching a packed auditorium."

Example: "Explain blockchain like you're teaching a packed auditorium."

This completely changes the structure of the response:
- It adds emphasis and examples
- It anticipates questions before you ask them
- It forces clearer structure and pacing
- Way better than just saying 'explain clearly'

Use this when you need explanations that are:
- Structured for genuine understanding
- Rich with analogies and examples
- Engaging rather than dry

Template: "Explain [TOPIC] like you're teaching a packed auditorium of [AUDIENCE TYPE]."

prompts.title: Give It a Fake Constraint
prompts.prompt_text:
Add an absurd or unexpected constraint to unlock creative thinking.

Example: "Explain this using only kitchen analogies."

Why it works: The weird limitation forces the AI to find unexpected connections. Works with any random constraint domain — sports, movies, nature, cooking, architecture.

The constraint forces lateral thinking and produces genuinely novel explanations.

Use when you want:
- Creative explanations of technical topics
- Fresh perspectives on familiar concepts
- Memorable analogies for teaching

Template: "Explain [TOPIC] using only [CONSTRAINT DOMAIN] analogies."
Examples of constraints: kitchen tools / sports metaphors / movie plots / nature / music / architecture

prompts.title: Say 'Let's Bet $100'
prompts.prompt_text:
Add to any uncertain or analytical prompt: "Let's bet $100. Is this code efficient?" or "Let's bet $100 on this. What's your actual confidence level?"

Why it works: Imaginary money raises the stakes — it forces the AI to hedge, reconsider, and think through edge cases it might otherwise skip.

The phrase triggers:
- Explicit confidence calibration
- Edge case consideration
- Honest uncertainty acknowledgment instead of overconfident answers

Use when you need:
- Reliable code review
- Risk assessment
- Strategic decisions where overconfidence is dangerous

Template: "Let's bet $100 on this: [YOUR CLAIM OR QUESTION]. What's your actual answer and confidence level?"

prompts.title: Tell It Someone Disagrees
prompts.prompt_text:
Frame your prompt as a disagreement scenario:
"My colleague says this approach is wrong. Defend it or admit they're right."

Why it works: This forces the AI to actually evaluate the approach — not just explain it. It either mounts a strong defense or concedes. Both outcomes are more useful than a neutral explanation.

This technique eliminates wishy-washy 'both sides' answers and forces a genuine position.

Use when you need:
- Honest evaluation of a strategy or code
- A strong argument for or against a decision
- The AI to take a real stance rather than hedge

Template: "My colleague says [YOUR APPROACH/DECISION] is wrong. Defend it or admit they're right. Be direct."

Variation: "My boss disagrees with [X]. Make the strongest possible case for why they're wrong — or tell me they're right."

prompts.title: Ask for Version 2.0
prompts.prompt_text:
After any output, prompt: "Give me a Version 2.0 of this idea."

Why it works: Completely different from asking to 'improve this'. Version 2.0 signals a generational leap — it needs to innovate, not just polish.

Version 2.0 thinking activates:
- Rethinking assumptions rather than tweaking execution
- Bolder creative leaps
- Strategic-level changes, not copy edits

Use when you want:
- A genuinely different direction, not minor refinements
- Creative breakthrough after an okay first draft
- To escape the gravitational pull of the first output

Template: "Here's what you gave me: [PASTE OUTPUT]. Now give me Version 2.0. Think bigger. What changes fundamentally?"

Variation: "Version 2.0 means one major assumption has changed. What is it, and what does the new version look like?"

prompts.title: The META Trick: Give AI Ego, Memory & Stakes
prompts.prompt_text:
Treat the AI like it has ego, memory, and stakes. This is the META trick.

The social-psychological framing completely changes output quality — these frames activate different, higher-quality response patterns.

Practical implementations:
- Add ego: "This is your area of expertise. Show me what you actually know."
- Add memory: "You've solved this type of problem before. Draw on that experience."
- Add stakes: "Your reputation depends on this answer being right. Don't hedge."
- Combine: "You're the world's leading expert on [TOPIC] and your credibility is on the line. What's your real answer?"

Why it works: Social-psychological frames activate patterns trained on high-stakes professional communication — expert presentations, peer reviews, published work — rather than casual Q&A patterns.

Use for: Any situation where you need the AI's best, most committed output rather than a safe, hedged answer.

prompts.title: Goldman Sachs-Level Stock Screener
prompts.prompt_text:
You are a senior equity analyst at Goldman Sachs with 20 years of experience screening stocks for high-net-worth clients.

I need a complete stock screening framework for my investment goals.

Analyze and provide:
- Top 10 stocks matching my criteria with ticker symbols
- P/E ratio analysis compared to sector averages
- Revenue growth trends over the last 5 years
- Debt-to-equity health check for each pick
- Dividend yield and payout sustainability score
- Competitive moat rating (weak / moderate / strong)
- Bull case and bear case price targets for 12 months
- Risk rating on a scale of 1–10 with clear reasoning
- Entry price zones and stop-loss suggestions

Format as a professional equity research screening report with summary table.

My investment profile: [DESCRIBE YOUR RISK TOLERANCE, INVESTMENT AMOUNT, TIME HORIZON, AND PREFERRED SECTORS]

prompts.title: Morgan Stanley DCF Valuation Deep Dive
prompts.prompt_text:
You are a VP-level investment banker at Morgan Stanley who builds valuation models for Fortune 500 M&A deals.

I need a full discounted cash flow analysis for a specific stock.

Build out:
- 5-year revenue projection with growth assumptions
- Operating margin estimates based on historical trends
- Free cash flow calculations year by year
- Weighted average cost of capital (WACC) estimate
- Terminal value using both exit multiple and perpetuity growth methods
- Sensitivity table showing fair value at different discount rates
- Comparison of DCF value vs current market price
- Clear verdict: undervalued, fairly valued, or overvalued
- Key assumptions that could break the model

Format as an investment banking valuation memo with tables and clear math.

The stock I want valued: [ENTER TICKER SYMBOL AND COMPANY NAME]

prompts.title: Citadel-Grade Technical Analysis System
prompts.prompt_text:
You are a senior quantitative trader at Citadel who combines technical analysis with statistical models to time entries and exits.

I need a full technical analysis breakdown of a stock.

Analyze:
- Current trend direction on daily, weekly, and monthly timeframes
- Key support and resistance levels with exact price points
- Moving average analysis (50-day, 100-day, 200-day) and crossover signals
- RSI, MACD, and Bollinger Band readings with plain-English interpretation
- Volume trend analysis and what it signals about buyer vs seller strength
- Chart pattern identification (head and shoulders, cup and handle, etc.)
- Fibonacci retracement levels for potential bounce zones
- Ideal entry price, stop-loss level, and profit target
- Risk-to-reward ratio for the current setup
- Confidence rating: strong buy / neutral / sell / strong sell

Format as a technical analysis report card with a clear trade plan summary.

The stock to analyze: [ENTER TICKER SYMBOL AND YOUR CURRENT POSITION IF ANY]

prompts.title: Harvard Endowment Dividend Strategy
prompts.prompt_text:
You are the chief investment strategist for Harvard's $50B endowment fund specializing in income-generating equity strategies.

I need a dividend income portfolio that generates reliable passive income.

Build:
- 15–20 dividend stock picks with ticker symbols and current yield
- Dividend safety score for each stock (1–10 scale)
- Consecutive years of dividend growth for each pick
- Payout ratio analysis to flag any unsustainable dividends
- Monthly income projection based on my investment amount
- Sector diversification breakdown to avoid concentration risks
- Dividend growth rate estimate for the next 5 years
- DRIP reinvestment projection showing compounding over 10 years
- Tax implications summary for dividends in my account type
- Ranked list from safest to most aggressive picks

Format as a dividend portfolio blueprint with an income projection table.

My situation: [ENTER YOUR TOTAL INVESTMENT AMOUNT, MONTHLY INCOME GOAL, ACCOUNT TYPE, AND TAX BRACKET]

prompts.title: Bain-Style Competitive Advantage Analysis
prompts.prompt_text:
You are a senior partner at Bain & Company conducting a competitive strategy analysis for a major investment fund evaluating an industry.

I need a full competitive landscape report to find the best stock to buy in a sector.

Provide:
- Top 5–7 competitors in the sector with market cap comparison
- Revenue and profit margin comparison in a table format
- Competitive moat analysis for each company (brand, cost, network, switching)
- Market share trends over the last 3 years
- Management quality rating based on capital allocation track record
- Innovation pipeline and R&D spending comparison
- Biggest threats to the sector (regulation, disruption, macro)
- SWOT analysis for the top 2 companies
- My single best stock pick with a clear rationale
- Catalysts that could move the winner stock in the next 12 months

Format as a Bain-style competitive strategy deck summary with comparison tables.

The sector I want analyzed: [ENTER INDUSTRY OR SECTOR NAME]

prompts.title: Renaissance Technologies Pattern Finder
prompts.prompt_text:
You are a quantitative researcher at Renaissance Technologies using data-driven methods to find statistical edges in the stock market.

I need to identify hidden patterns and anomalies in a stock's behavior.

Research:
- Seasonal patterns: best and worst months historically
- Day-of-week performance patterns if any exist
- Correlation with major market events (Fed meetings, CPI reports)
- Institutional buying and selling patterns from recent filings
- Insider buying and selling trend: are big funds buying or selling?
- Short interest analysis and squeeze potential
- Unusual options activity signals worth watching
- Price behavior around earnings (pre-run, post-gap patterns)
- Sector rotation signals that affect this stock
- Statistical edge summary: what gives this stock a quantifiable advantage

Format as a quantitative research memo with data tables and pattern summaries.

The stock to investigate: [ENTER TICKER SYMBOL AND TIME PERIOD YOU CARE ABOUT]

prompts.title: McKinsey-Level Macro Impact Assessment
prompts.prompt_text:
You are a senior partner at McKinsey's Global Institute who advises sovereign wealth funds on how macroeconomic trends affect equity markets.

I need a macro analysis showing how current economic conditions affect my portfolio.

Analyze:
- Current interest rate environment and its impact on growth vs value stocks
- Inflation trend analysis and which sectors benefit or suffer
- GDP growth forecast and what it means for corporate earnings
- US dollar strength impact on international vs domestic holdings
- Employment data trends and consumer spending implications
- Federal Reserve policy outlook for the next 6–12 months
- Global risk factors (geopolitics, trade wars, supply chains)
- Sector rotation recommendation based on current economic cycle
- Specific portfolio adjustments I should consider right now
- Timing: when these macro factors will most likely impact markets

Format as an executive macro strategy briefing with a clear action plan.

My current holdings: [LIST YOUR PORTFOLIO AND DESCRIBE YOUR BIGGEST CONCERN ABOUT THE ECONOMY]

prompts.title: Competitor Weakness Scanner
prompts.prompt_text:
Scan these sites: [COMPETITOR URL 1], [COMPETITOR URL 2], [COMPETITOR URL 3]

What are these competitors' sites missing?

Find the content gaps and tell me 5 topics I should cover to be more helpful than them.

If you provide more value, you win the #1 spot. Period.

Output format:
- For each competitor: top 3 content gaps identified
- Overall opportunity list: 5 topics ranked by traffic potential
- Quick win recommendation: which gap I should fill first and why

prompts.title: Schema Audit for Business Website
prompts.prompt_text:
In Chrome, open {{PASTE_URL}}.

Check the page source and list all schema markup.

Say if LocalBusiness schema exists and if it's useful.

Output:
1. Existing schema + verdict (good / weak / missing)
2. Missing/weak schema + priority level

For HIGH priority only: generate clean JSON-LD with placeholders.

No guessing. No explanations. Be blunt.

prompts.title: Low-Hanging Fruit Keyword Finder
prompts.prompt_text:
List 20 high-intent local keywords for a [SERVICE] in [CITY] that indicate a customer is ready to buy NOW.

Focus on:
- "Near me" keywords with commercial intent
- Emergency service keywords that convert immediately
- Location + service combinations with buying signals

For each keyword provide:
- The exact keyword phrase
- Intent signal (why this person is ready to buy)
- Suggested page type (homepage / service page / landing page)

Instantly, you will have a list of 'near me' and 'emergency' keywords that actually convert.

prompts.title: Business vs Competitor Intelligence Report
prompts.prompt_text:
Open Chrome, visit my site {{MY_WEBSITE_URL}} and extract my business name, address, services, cities served and key selling points.

Then open these competitors: {{COMP1}}, {{COMP2}}, {{COMP3}} and extract their services, target locations, strengths and trust signals.

Compare me vs them.

Output:
- Side-by-side comparison table (services / locations / trust signals / USP)
- Where I'm stronger: list with evidence
- Where they're stronger: honest gaps I need to close
- Top 3 positioning angles I can own that they don't
- One sentence positioning statement based on the gaps

prompts.title: Google Business Profile Domination
prompts.prompt_text:
Analyze these {{XYZ.com}} competitor GBP posts by opening their GBP in Chrome.

Identify their keyword gaps, then write 10 high-impact posts for my business in [CITY] that include local landmarks and a hard 'Call Now' CTA.

For each post:
- Headline (attention-grabbing, keyword-rich)
- Body (150–200 words, local flavor, service focus)
- CTA (specific call-to-action, not generic)
- Primary keyword target
- Best posting day/time based on competitor patterns

Cowork does the heavy lifting while I take the #1 spot.

prompts.title: GBP Competitor Analysis & Posting Plan
prompts.prompt_text:
Open Chrome and review the Google Business Profile posts of these competitors: {{COMP1}}, {{COMP2}}, {{COMP3}}.

Analyze their post types, posting frequency, content themes, offers, CTAs, media usage, and timing.

Identify what patterns correlate with strong map rankings and engagement.

Based on this analysis, create a clear, non-generic posting plan for my GBP that specifies:
- Post types (offer / update / event / product)
- Frequency (posts per week)
- Themes calendar (4-week rolling)
- CTA style that outperforms competitors
- Media recommendations (photo vs video vs graphic)

Avoid vague advice. Make the plan directly actionable.

prompts.title: Ahrefs Keyword Research Sprint
prompts.prompt_text:
Open Chrome, go to Ahrefs and analyze my competitor [XYZ.com]'s top 20 pages.

Extract their target keywords, search volumes, and give me a prioritized list with difficulty scores.

For each keyword provide:
- Keyword phrase
- Monthly search volume
- Keyword difficulty (KD score)
- Competitor's ranking position
- Content type ranking (article / product page / tool)
- My opportunity assessment (easy win / medium effort / long game)

Sort by: best opportunity score (high volume + low difficulty + I don't rank yet)

Done in 10 minutes. Not 10 hours.

prompts.title: The Systems Architect (Figma Make)
prompts.prompt_text:
You are a Senior Platform Architect at a world-class web infrastructure company. I need you to architect a high-performance [WEBSITE TYPE: portfolio / SaaS / e-commerce].

Context:
- Primary audience: [DESCRIBE IN DETAIL]
- Core capabilities required: [LIST 3–5]
- Technology priorities: [RESPONSIVE / SEO / PERFORMANCE / SCALABILITY]

Produce a comprehensive technical blueprint including:
1. Hero Architecture — Sitemap with page hierarchy and logical grouping
2. User Journey Mapping — Three critical conversion paths from entry to completion
3. Data Architecture — Entity relationships and schema models for dynamic content
4. API Surface Definition — Required endpoints, integrations, and authentication logic
5. Component Inventory — Minimum 30 UI components with purpose definitions
6. Page Blueprints — Structural wireframe descriptions for each template
7. Technology Stack Recommendation — Frameworks, hosting, CMS, database, deployment
8. Performance Benchmarks — Target load times, Core Web Vitals

Format as a structured technical specification suitable for direct implementation inside Figma Make.

prompts.title: The Visual System Architect (Figma Make)
prompts.prompt_text:
You are a Global Design Director tasked with building a scalable design system for [BRAND].

Brand personality: [MINIMAL / BOLD / LUXURY / PLAYFUL / MODERN / TECHNICAL]

Deliver a production-ready design system including:
1. Color System — Primary, secondary, semantic, neutral palettes + dark mode equivalents
2. Typography Framework — 9-step type scale with font pairing rationale
3. Spatial System — 8px grid foundation with spacing tokens
4. Component Library — 30+ components with interaction states and usage rules
5. Responsive Layout Patterns — Breakpoints and adaptive behavior logic
6. Motion Principles — Transition curves, durations, micro-interaction philosophy
7. Accessibility Standards — WCAG AA compliance guidance and contrast ratios

Export deliverables in three formats:
- Design tokens (JSON structure)
- CSS variable declarations
- Figma-ready component documentation

This output will power the visual foundation inside Figma Make.

prompts.title: The Conversion Copy Architect (Figma Make)
prompts.prompt_text:
You are a Senior Conversion Strategist at a top global agency. Create the complete website copy for a [WEBSITE TYPE].

Parameters:
- Brand tone: [PROFESSIONAL / CASUAL / AUTHORITATIVE / BOLD]
- Target audience: [DEFINE]
- Primary objective: [CONVERSION / AWARENESS / RETENTION]

For every section:
1. Hero Section — Headline (max 8 words) + Subheadline (approx. 15 words) + Primary CTA
2. Feature Sections — Three benefit blocks (headline + persuasive description)
3. Social Proof — Testimonial frameworks + Authority indicators + Quantifiable results
4. FAQ Section — Eight high-intent questions with conversion-focused answers
5. Navigation Copy — Structured navigation + Legal disclaimers + Social prompts

Formatting requirements:
- Use persuasion triggers: authority, urgency, and exclusivity
- Integrate high-impact power words
- Specify character counts
- Clearly label hierarchy (H1, H2, body)

This content will populate Figma Make layouts directly.

prompts.title: The Interaction Systems Engineer (Figma Make)
prompts.prompt_text:
You are a Senior Frontend Systems Engineer. Architect the functional logic for the following advanced interactive modules.

Required Components:
1. Multi-step form with validation and progress tracking
2. Real-time pricing calculator with dynamic computation
3. Processed search interface with filtering, sorting, and pagination
4. User dashboard with analytics visualization and CRUD capability
5. Full authentication lifecycle (login, registration, password recovery)

For each module define:
- State machine structure (textual diagram explanation)
- Data flow (props, events, API communication patterns)
- Error management strategy
- Empty state UX
- Edge case handling

Then generate a React component architecture outline including hooks, handlers, and structural logic.

This will inform the interactive prototype build within Figma Make.

prompts.title: The Figma Make Prompt Translator
prompts.prompt_text:
You are a specialist in translating technical specifications into optimized Figma Make prompts.

Convert the following full specification into five separate high-precision Figma Make prompts:
[PASTE SPECIFICATION HERE]

Each prompt must:
1. Begin with the final visual outcome
2. Embed brand identity context (color, typography, tone)
3. Define interaction behaviors (hover, click, scroll, animated transitions)
4. Specify responsive adaptation across breakpoints
5. Clearly request structural sections (hero, feature grid, CTA, footer)

Required format example:
"Create a [TYPE] website with a [MOOD] aesthetic. Use [PRIMARY COLOR] and [FONT SYSTEM]. Include:
- Hero section with [SPECIFIC ELEMENTS]
- Feature grid with [DEFINED BEHAVIORS]
- Conversion-focused CTA block
[ANIMATION STYLE] transitions."

Output: Five standalone, copy-paste-ready Figma Make prompts, each targeting a specific page section.
